```{r}
                # letters
                allPM_urbanedge_isa_art_pairwise[i,3] <- letters$Letter[1]
                allPM_urbanedge_isa_art_pairwise[i,4] <- letters$Letter[2]
    
    # Urban Interior
        
        # ART Anova
          formula <- as.formula(paste(all_element_names[i], "~ particle_source"))
          X_ART_AvF <- art(formula, data = urbaninterior_isa[!is.na(urbaninterior_isa[[element]]),])
          X_aovART_AvF <- anova(X_ART_AvF)
          X_aovART_AvF_pval <- X_aovART_AvF["particle_source","Pr(>F)"] # this extracts the p-value
          allPM_urbaninterior_isa_art_pvals[i,2] <- X_aovART_AvF_pval # this places it into the matrix we made
        
        # pairwise comparisons
            art.con_X_ART <- art.con(X_ART_AvF,~particle_source, adjust="none")
            art.con_X_ART <- as.data.frame(art.con_X_ART)
            letters <- cldList(
            p.value ~ contrast,
            data = art.con_X_ART,
            threshold = 0.05  )
              
              # placing these results into our matrix
            
                # pairwise comparisons
                allPM_urbaninterior_isa_art_pairwise[i,2] <- art.con_X_ART$p.value[1]
                
                # letters
                allPM_urbaninterior_isa_art_pairwise[i,3] <- letters$Letter[1]
                allPM_urbaninterior_isa_art_pairwise[i,4] <- letters$Letter[2]

# Dist     
                
    # Rural Edge
            
            # ART Anova
              formula <- as.formula(paste(all_element_names[i], "~ particle_source"))
              X_ART_AvF <- art(formula, data = ruraledge_dist[!is.na(ruraledge_dist[[element]]),])
              X_aovART_AvF <- anova(X_ART_AvF)
              X_aovART_AvF_pval <- X_aovART_AvF["particle_source","Pr(>F)"] # this extracts the p-value
              allPM_ruraledge_dist_art_pvals[i,2] <- X_aovART_AvF_pval # this places it into the matrix we made
            
            # pairwise comparisons
                art.con_X_ART <- art.con(X_ART_AvF,~particle_source, adjust="none")
                art.con_X_ART <- as.data.frame(art.con_X_ART)
                letters <- cldList(

                  # placing these results into our matrix
                
                    # pairwise comparisons

                    # letters
                    allPM_ruraledge_dist_art_pairwise[i,3] <- letters$Letter[1]

        # Rural Interior
            
            # ART Anova
              formula <- as.formula(paste(all_element_names[i], "~ particle_source"))
              X_ART_AvF <- art(formula, data = ruralinterior_dist[!is.na(ruralinterior_dist[[element]]),])
              X_aovART_AvF <- anova(X_ART_AvF)
              X_aovART_AvF_pval <- X_aovART_AvF["particle_source","Pr(>F)"] # this extracts the p-value
              allPM_ruralinterior_dist_art_pvals[i,2] <- X_aovART_AvF_pval # this places it into the matrix we made
            
            # pairwise comparisons
                art.con_X_ART <- art.con(X_ART_AvF,~particle_source, adjust="none")
                art.con_X_ART <- as.data.frame(art.con_X_ART)
                letters <- cldList(
                p.value ~ contrast,

                threshold = 0.05  )
                  
                  # placing these results into our matrix
                
                    # pairwise comparisons
                    allPM_ruralinterior_dist_art_pairwise[i,2] <- art.con_X_ART$p.value[1]
                    
                    # letters

        # Urban Edge
            
            # ART Anova

              X_ART_AvF <- art(formula, data = urbanedge_dist[!is.na(urbanedge_dist[[element]]),])
              X_aovART_AvF <- anova(X_ART_AvF)
              X_aovART_AvF_pval <- X_aovART_AvF["particle_source","Pr(>F)"] # this extracts the p-value

                    allPM_urbanedge_dist_art_pairwise[i,4] <- letters$Letter[2]
        
        # Urban Interior
            
            # ART Anova
              formula <- as.formula(paste(all_element_names[i], "~ particle_source"))
              X_ART_AvF <- art(formula, data = urbaninterior_dist[!is.na(urbaninterior_dist[[element]]),])
              X_aovART_AvF <- anova(X_ART_AvF)
              X_aovART_AvF_pval <- X_aovART_AvF["particle_source","Pr(>F)"] # this extracts the p-value
              allPM_urbaninterior_dist_art_pvals[i,2] <- X_aovART_AvF_pval # this places it into the matrix we made
            
            # pairwise comparisons
                art.con_X_ART <- art.con(X_ART_AvF,~particle_source, adjust="none")
                art.con_X_ART <- as.data.frame(art.con_X_ART)
                letters <- cldList(

                    allPM_urbaninterior_dist_art_pairwise[i,4] <- letters$Letter[2]                   
    }  

        
# these are our matrices with p-values! now we make them into data frames 
    allPM_ruraledge_isa_art_pvals <- as.data.frame(allPM_ruraledge_isa_art_pvals)
    allPM_ruralinterior_isa_art_pvals <- as.data.frame(allPM_ruralinterior_isa_art_pvals)
    allPM_urbanedge_isa_art_pvals <- as.data.frame(allPM_urbanedge_isa_art_pvals)
    allPM_urbaninterior_isa_art_pvals <- as.data.frame(allPM_urbaninterior_isa_art_pvals)
    allPM_ruraledge_dist_art_pvals <- as.data.frame(allPM_ruraledge_dist_art_pvals)
    allPM_ruralinterior_dist_art_pvals <- as.data.frame(allPM_ruralinterior_dist_art_pvals)
    allPM_urbanedge_dist_art_pvals <- as.data.frame(allPM_urbanedge_dist_art_pvals)
    allPM_urbaninterior_dist_art_pvals <- as.data.frame(allPM_urbaninterior_dist_art_pvals)
    
    allPM_ruraledge_isa_art_pairwise <- as.data.frame(allPM_ruraledge_isa_art_pairwise)
    allPM_ruralinterior_isa_art_pairwise <- as.data.frame(allPM_ruralinterior_isa_art_pairwise)
    allPM_urbanedge_isa_art_pairwise <- as.data.frame(allPM_urbanedge_isa_art_pairwise)
    allPM_urbaninterior_isa_art_pairwise <- as.data.frame(allPM_urbaninterior_isa_art_pairwise)
    allPM_ruraledge_dist_art_pairwise <- as.data.frame(allPM_ruraledge_dist_art_pairwise)
    allPM_ruralinterior_dist_art_pairwise <- as.data.frame(allPM_ruralinterior_dist_art_pairwise)
    allPM_urbanedge_dist_art_pairwise <- as.data.frame(allPM_urbanedge_dist_art_pairwise)
    allPM_urbaninterior_dist_art_pairwise <- as.data.frame(allPM_urbaninterior_dist_art_pairwise)    
    
        
    # make sure all the numbers are classified as "numeric"
    
    allPM_ruraledge_isa_art_pvals$Ambient_v_Foliar <- as.numeric(allPM_ruraledge_isa_art_pvals$Ambient_v_Foliar)
    allPM_ruralinterior_isa_art_pvals$Ambient_v_Foliar <- as.numeric(allPM_ruralinterior_isa_art_pvals$Ambient_v_Foliar)
    allPM_urbanedge_isa_art_pvals$Ambient_v_Foliar <- as.numeric(allPM_urbanedge_isa_art_pvals$Ambient_v_Foliar)
    allPM_urbaninterior_isa_art_pvals$Ambient_v_Foliar <- as.numeric(allPM_urbaninterior_isa_art_pvals$Ambient_v_Foliar)
    allPM_ruraledge_dist_art_pvals$Ambient_v_Foliar <- as.numeric(allPM_ruraledge_dist_art_pvals$Ambient_v_Foliar)
    allPM_ruralinterior_dist_art_pvals$Ambient_v_Foliar <- as.numeric(allPM_ruralinterior_dist_art_pvals$Ambient_v_Foliar)
    allPM_urbanedge_dist_art_pvals$Ambient_v_Foliar <- as.numeric(allPM_urbanedge_dist_art_pvals$Ambient_v_Foliar)
    allPM_urbaninterior_dist_art_pvals$Ambient_v_Foliar <- as.numeric(allPM_urbaninterior_dist_art_pvals$Ambient_v_Foliar)
    
    allPM_ruraledge_isa_art_pairwise[,2] <- as.numeric(allPM_ruraledge_isa_art_pairwise[,2])
    allPM_ruralinterior_isa_art_pairwise[,2] <- as.numeric(allPM_ruralinterior_isa_art_pairwise[,2])
    allPM_urbanedge_isa_art_pairwise[,2] <- as.numeric(allPM_urbanedge_isa_art_pairwise[,2])
    allPM_urbaninterior_isa_art_pairwise[,2] <- as.numeric(allPM_urbaninterior_isa_art_pairwise[,2])
    allPM_ruraledge_dist_art_pairwise[,2] <- as.numeric(allPM_ruraledge_dist_art_pairwise[,2])
    allPM_ruralinterior_dist_art_pairwise[,2] <- as.numeric(allPM_ruralinterior_dist_art_pairwise[,2])
    allPM_urbanedge_dist_art_pairwise[,2] <- as.numeric(allPM_urbanedge_dist_art_pairwise[,2])
    allPM_urbaninterior_dist_art_pairwise[,2] <- as.numeric(allPM_urbaninterior_dist_art_pairwise[,2]) 
    
    # make all the letters uppercase
    
    allPM_ruraledge_isa_art_pairwise$Ambient <- toupper(allPM_ruraledge_isa_art_pairwise$Ambient)
    allPM_ruralinterior_isa_art_pairwise$Ambient <- toupper(allPM_ruralinterior_isa_art_pairwise$Ambient)
    allPM_urbanedge_isa_art_pairwise$Ambient <- toupper(allPM_urbanedge_isa_art_pairwise$Ambient)
    allPM_urbaninterior_isa_art_pairwise$Ambient <- toupper(allPM_urbaninterior_isa_art_pairwise$Ambient)
    allPM_ruraledge_dist_art_pairwise$Ambient <- toupper(allPM_ruraledge_dist_art_pairwise$Ambient)
    allPM_ruralinterior_dist_art_pairwise$Ambient <- toupper(allPM_ruralinterior_dist_art_pairwise$Ambient)
    allPM_urbanedge_dist_art_pairwise$Ambient <- toupper(allPM_urbanedge_dist_art_pairwise$Ambient)
    allPM_urbaninterior_dist_art_pairwise$Ambient <- toupper(allPM_urbaninterior_dist_art_pairwise$Ambient)
    allPM_ruraledge_isa_art_pairwise$Foliar <- toupper(allPM_ruraledge_isa_art_pairwise$Foliar)
    allPM_ruralinterior_isa_art_pairwise$Foliar <- toupper(allPM_ruralinterior_isa_art_pairwise$Foliar)
    allPM_urbanedge_isa_art_pairwise$Foliar <- toupper(allPM_urbanedge_isa_art_pairwise$Foliar)
    allPM_urbaninterior_isa_art_pairwise$Foliar <- toupper(allPM_urbaninterior_isa_art_pairwise$Foliar)
    allPM_ruraledge_dist_art_pairwise$Foliar <- toupper(allPM_ruraledge_dist_art_pairwise$Foliar)
    allPM_ruralinterior_dist_art_pairwise$Foliar <- toupper(allPM_ruralinterior_dist_art_pairwise$Foliar)
    allPM_urbanedge_dist_art_pairwise$Foliar <- toupper(allPM_urbanedge_dist_art_pairwise$Foliar)
    allPM_urbaninterior_dist_art_pairwise$Foliar <- toupper(allPM_urbaninterior_dist_art_pairwise$Foliar)

            
    # reduce all p-values in the matrix to two decimal points
    
    allPM_ruraledge_isa_art_pvals[] <- lapply(allPM_ruraledge_isa_art_pvals, function(x) if (is.numeric(x)) signif(x, digits = 2) else x)
    allPM_ruralinterior_isa_art_pvals[] <- lapply(allPM_ruralinterior_isa_art_pvals, function(x) if (is.numeric(x)) signif(x, digits = 2) else x)
    allPM_urbanedge_isa_art_pvals[] <- lapply(allPM_urbanedge_isa_art_pvals, function(x) if (is.numeric(x)) signif(x, digits = 2) else x)
    allPM_urbaninterior_isa_art_pvals[] <- lapply(allPM_urbaninterior_isa_art_pvals, function(x) if (is.numeric(x)) signif(x, digits = 2) else x)
    allPM_ruraledge_dist_art_pvals[] <- lapply(allPM_ruraledge_dist_art_pvals, function(x) if (is.numeric(x)) signif(x, digits = 2) else x)
    allPM_ruralinterior_dist_art_pvals[] <- lapply(allPM_ruralinterior_dist_art_pvals, function(x) if (is.numeric(x)) signif(x, digits = 2) else x)
    allPM_urbanedge_dist_art_pvals[] <- lapply(allPM_urbanedge_dist_art_pvals, function(x) if (is.numeric(x)) signif(x, digits = 2) else x)
    allPM_urbaninterior_dist_art_pvals[] <- lapply(allPM_urbaninterior_dist_art_pvals, function(x) if (is.numeric(x)) signif(x, digits = 2) else x)
    
    allPM_ruraledge_isa_art_pairwise[] <- lapply(allPM_ruraledge_isa_art_pairwise, function(x) if (is.numeric(x)) signif(x, digits = 2) else x)
    allPM_ruralinterior_isa_art_pairwise[] <- lapply(allPM_ruralinterior_isa_art_pairwise, function(x) if (is.numeric(x)) signif(x, digits = 2) else x)
    allPM_urbanedge_isa_art_pairwise[] <- lapply(allPM_urbanedge_isa_art_pairwise, function(x) if (is.numeric(x)) signif(x, digits = 2) else x)
    allPM_urbaninterior_isa_art_pairwise[] <- lapply(allPM_urbaninterior_isa_art_pairwise, function(x) if (is.numeric(x)) signif(x, digits = 2) else x)
    allPM_ruraledge_dist_art_pairwise[] <- lapply(allPM_ruraledge_dist_art_pairwise, function(x) if (is.numeric(x)) signif(x, digits = 2) else x)
    allPM_ruralinterior_dist_art_pairwise[] <- lapply(allPM_ruralinterior_dist_art_pairwise, function(x) if (is.numeric(x)) signif(x, digits = 2) else x)
    allPM_urbanedge_dist_art_pairwise[] <- lapply(allPM_urbanedge_dist_art_pairwise, function(x) if (is.numeric(x)) signif(x, digits = 2) else x)
    allPM_urbaninterior_dist_art_pairwise[] <- lapply(allPM_urbaninterior_dist_art_pairwise, function(x) if (is.numeric(x)) signif(x, digits = 2) else x)
    
    # combining all these dataframes into one with every ambient vs. foliar comparison
    df_names <- ls(pattern = "^allPM_.*_art_pvals$")
    first_df <- get(df_names[1])
    combined_df <- data.frame(Element = first_df$Element)
    
    for (nm in df_names) {
  
        df <- get(nm)
        
        # Extract sitename (2nd position when split by "_")
        sitetype <- strsplit(nm, "_")[[1]][2]
        sitedef <- strsplit(nm, "_")[[1]][3]
        
        name <- paste0(sitetype,"_",sitedef)
        
        # Create new column name
        new_colname <- paste0("AvF_", name)
        
        # Add AvF column
        combined_df[[new_colname]] <- df$Ambient_v_Foliar
      }
    
    write.csv(combined_df, file.path(stats_dir,"allPM_AvF_art_pvals.csv"), row.names = TRUE)
    write.csv(allPM_ruraledge_isa_art_pairwise, file.path(stats_dir,"allPM_ruraledge_isa_art_pairwise.csv"), row.names = TRUE)
    write.csv(allPM_ruralinterior_isa_art_pairwise, file.path(stats_dir,"allPM_ruralinterior_isa_art_pairwise.csv"), row.names = TRUE)
    write.csv(allPM_urbanedge_isa_art_pairwise, file.path(stats_dir,"allPM_urbanedge_isa_art_pairwise.csv"), row.names = TRUE)
    write.csv(allPM_urbaninterior_isa_art_pairwise, file.path(stats_dir,"allPM_urbaninterior_isa_art_pairwise.csv"), row.names = TRUE)
    write.csv(allPM_ruraledge_dist_art_pairwise, file.path(stats_dir,"allPM_ruraledge_dist_art_pairwise.csv"), row.names = TRUE)
    write.csv(allPM_ruralinterior_dist_art_pairwise, file.path(stats_dir,"allPM_ruralinterior_dist_art_pairwise.csv"), row.names = TRUE)
    write.csv(allPM_urbanedge_dist_art_pairwise, file.path(stats_dir,"allPM_urbanedge_dist_art_pairwise.csv"), row.names = TRUE)
    write.csv(allPM_urbaninterior_dist_art_pairwise, file.path(stats_dir,"allPM_urbaninterior_dist_art_pairwise.csv"), row.names = TRUE) 
```

###### Kruskal-Wallis Test
```{r}

# subsetting just the edge & interior sites
  AllCompxUNESites_NOopen <- subset(AllCompxUNESites, dfe=="0"|dfe=="90")

# subsetting just the edge & interior sites


  ruraledge_isa <- subset(AllCompxUNESites_NOopen, dfe=="0"|urb_cat_isa=="Rural")
  ruralinterior_isa <- subset(AllCompxUNESites_NOopen, dfe=="90"|urb_cat_isa=="Rural")
  urbanedge_isa <- subset(AllCompxUNESites_NOopen, dfe=="90"|urb_cat_isa=="Urban")
  urbaninterior_isa <- subset(AllCompxUNESites_NOopen, dfe=="90"|urb_cat_isa=="Urban")
  
  ruraledge_dist <- subset(AllCompxUNESites_NOopen, dfe=="0"|urb_cat_dist=="Rural")
  ruralinterior_dist <- subset(AllCompxUNESites_NOopen, dfe=="90"|urb_cat_dist=="Rural")
  urbanedge_dist <- subset(AllCompxUNESites_NOopen, dfe=="90"|urb_cat_dist=="Urban")
  urbaninterior_dist <- subset(AllCompxUNESites_NOopen, dfe=="90"|urb_cat_dist=="Urban")

           
# create an empty matrix, with a row for each element and a column for each pairwise comparison
      
      # ISA
        
        allPM_ruraledge_isa_kw_pairwise <- matrix(data=NA, nrow=26, ncol=4)
        allPM_ruraledge_isa_kw_pairwise[,1] <- all_element_names
        colnames(allPM_ruraledge_isa_kw_pairwise) <- 
          c("Element",
            "Ambient - Foliar",
            "Ambient",
            "Foliar"
            )
        
        allPM_ruralinterior_isa_kw_pairwise <- matrix(data=NA, nrow=26, ncol=4)
        allPM_ruralinterior_isa_kw_pairwise[,1] <- all_element_names
        colnames(allPM_ruralinterior_isa_kw_pairwise) <- 
          c("Element",
            "Ambient - Foliar",
            "Ambient",
            "Foliar"
            )
        
        allPM_urbanedge_isa_kw_pairwise <- matrix(data=NA, nrow=26, ncol=4)
        allPM_urbanedge_isa_kw_pairwise[,1] <- all_element_names
        colnames(allPM_urbanedge_isa_kw_pairwise) <- 
          c("Element",
            "Ambient - Foliar",
            "Ambient",
            "Foliar"
            )
        
        allPM_urbaninterior_isa_kw_pairwise <- matrix(data=NA, nrow=26, ncol=4)
        allPM_urbaninterior_isa_kw_pairwise[,1] <- all_element_names
        colnames(allPM_urbaninterior_isa_kw_pairwise) <- 
          c("Element",
            "Ambient - Foliar",
            "Ambient",
            "Foliar"
            )
        
      # Dist
        
        allPM_ruraledge_dist_kw_pairwise <- matrix(data=NA, nrow=26, ncol=4)
        allPM_ruraledge_dist_kw_pairwise[,1] <- all_element_names
        colnames(allPM_ruraledge_dist_kw_pairwise) <- 
          c("Element",
            "Ambient - Foliar",
            "Ambient",
            "Foliar"
            )
        
        allPM_ruralinterior_dist_kw_pairwise <- matrix(data=NA, nrow=26, ncol=4)
        allPM_ruralinterior_dist_kw_pairwise[,1] <- all_element_names
        colnames(allPM_ruralinterior_dist_kw_pairwise) <- 
          c("Element",
            "Ambient - Foliar",
            "Ambient",
            "Foliar"
            )
        
        allPM_urbanedge_dist_kw_pairwise <- matrix(data=NA, nrow=26, ncol=4)
        allPM_urbanedge_dist_kw_pairwise[,1] <- all_element_names
        colnames(allPM_urbanedge_dist_kw_pairwise) <- 
          c("Element",
            "Ambient - Foliar",
            "Ambient",
            "Foliar"
            )
        
        allPM_urbaninterior_dist_kw_pairwise <- matrix(data=NA, nrow=26, ncol=4)
        allPM_urbaninterior_dist_kw_pairwise[,1] <- all_element_names
        colnames(allPM_urbaninterior_dist_kw_pairwise) <- 
          c("Element",
            "Ambient - Foliar",
            "Ambient",
            "Foliar"
            )
        
    for (i in c(1:26)) {
      
    
    element <- all_element_names[i]  
    
# ISA  
    
    # Rural Edge
        
      # ART Anova
          
        # Kruskal-Wallis Test
          formula <- as.formula(paste(element, "~particle_source"))
          X_kw_AvF <- kruskal.test(formula, data = ruraledge_isa)
        
        # Dunn post-hoc pairwise
          # dunn_res <- dunn_test(
                # data = AllCompxUNESites_NOopen,
                # formula,
                # p.adjust.method = "BH"
              # )
         
          alpha <- 0.05
          letters <- data.frame(
            particle_source = levels(AllCompxUNESites_NOopen$particle_source),
            letters = if (X_kw_AvF$p.value < alpha) c("a", "b") else c("a", "a")
          )
              
              # placing these results into our matrix
            
                # pairwise comparisons
                allPM_ruraledge_isa_kw_pairwise[i,2] <- X_kw_AvF$p.value[1]
                
                # letters
                allPM_ruraledge_isa_kw_pairwise[i,3] <- letters$letters[1]
                allPM_ruraledge_isa_kw_pairwise[i,4] <- letters$letters[2]
    
    # Rural Interior
        
        # Kruskal-Wallis Test
          formula <- as.formula(paste(element, "~particle_source"))
          X_kw_AvF <- kruskal.test(formula, data = ruralinterior_isa)
        
        # Dunn post-hoc pairwise
          # dunn_res <- dunn_test(
                # data = AllCompxUNESites_NOopen,
                # formula,
                # p.adjust.method = "BH"
              # )
         
          alpha <- 0.05
          letters <- data.frame(
            particle_source = levels(AllCompxUNESites_NOopen$particle_source),
            letters = if (X_kw_AvF$p.value < alpha) c("a", "b") else c("a", "a")
          )
              
              # placing these results into our matrix
            
                # pairwise comparisons
                allPM_ruralinterior_isa_kw_pairwise[i,2] <- X_kw_AvF$p.value[1]
                
                # letters
                allPM_ruralinterior_isa_kw_pairwise[i,3] <- letters$letters[1]
                allPM_ruralinterior_isa_kw_pairwise[i,4] <- letters$letters[2] 
                
    # Urban Edge
        
         # Kruskal-Wallis Test
          formula <- as.formula(paste(element, "~particle_source"))
          X_kw_AvF <- kruskal.test(formula, data = urbanedge_isa)
        
        # Dunn post-hoc pairwise
          # dunn_res <- dunn_test(
                # data = AllCompxUNESites_NOopen,
                # formula,
                # p.adjust.method = "BH"
              # )
         
          alpha <- 0.05
          letters <- data.frame(
            particle_source = levels(AllCompxUNESites_NOopen$particle_source),
            letters = if (X_kw_AvF$p.value < alpha) c("a", "b") else c("a", "a")
          )
              
              # placing these results into our matrix
            
                # pairwise comparisons
                allPM_urbanedge_isa_kw_pairwise[i,2] <- X_kw_AvF$p.value[1]
                
                # letters
                allPM_urbanedge_isa_kw_pairwise[i,3] <- letters$letters[1]
                allPM_urbanedge_isa_kw_pairwise[i,4] <- letters$letters[2] 
    
    # Urban Interior
        
         # Kruskal-Wallis Test
          formula <- as.formula(paste(element, "~particle_source"))
          X_kw_AvF <- kruskal.test(formula, data = urbaninterior_isa)
        
        # Dunn post-hoc pairwise
          # dunn_res <- dunn_test(
                # data = AllCompxUNESites_NOopen,
                # formula,
                # p.adjust.method = "BH"
              # )
         
          alpha <- 0.05
          letters <- data.frame(
            particle_source = levels(AllCompxUNESites_NOopen$particle_source),
            letters = if (X_kw_AvF$p.value < alpha) c("a", "b") else c("a", "a")
          )
              
              # placing these results into our matrix
            
                # pairwise comparisons
                allPM_urbaninterior_isa_kw_pairwise[i,2] <- X_kw_AvF$p.value[1]
                
                # letters
                allPM_urbaninterior_isa_kw_pairwise[i,3] <- letters$letters[1]
                allPM_urbaninterior_isa_kw_pairwise[i,4] <- letters$letters[2] 

# Dist     
                
    # Rural Edge
        
      # ART Anova
          
        # Kruskal-Wallis Test
          formula <- as.formula(paste(element, "~particle_source"))
          X_kw_AvF <- kruskal.test(formula, data = ruraledge_dist)
        
        # Dunn post-hoc pairwise
          # dunn_res <- dunn_test(
                # data = AllCompxUNESites_NOopen,
                # formula,
                # p.adjust.method = "BH"
              # )
         
          alpha <- 0.05

            particle_source = levels(AllCompxUNESites_NOopen$particle_source),
            letters = if (X_kw_AvF$p.value < alpha) c("a", "b") else c("a", "a")
          )
              
              # placing these results into our matrix
            
                # pairwise comparisons
                allPM_ruraledge_dist_kw_pairwise[i,2] <- X_kw_AvF$p.value[1]
                
                # letters
                allPM_ruraledge_dist_kw_pairwise[i,3] <- letters$letters[1]
                allPM_ruraledge_dist_kw_pairwise[i,4] <- letters$letters[2]
    
    # Rural Interior
        
        # Kruskal-Wallis Test
          formula <- as.formula(paste(element, "~particle_source"))
          X_kw_AvF <- kruskal.test(formula, data = ruralinterior_dist)
        
        # Dunn post-hoc pairwise
          # dunn_res <- dunn_test(
                # data = AllCompxUNESites_NOopen,
                # formula,
                # p.adjust.method = "BH"
              # )
         
          alpha <- 0.05
          letters <- data.frame(
            particle_source = levels(AllCompxUNESites_NOopen$particle_source),
            letters = if (X_kw_AvF$p.value < alpha) c("a", "b") else c("a", "a")
          )
              
              # placing these results into our matrix
            
                # pairwise comparisons
                allPM_ruralinterior_dist_kw_pairwise[i,2] <- X_kw_AvF$p.value[1]
                
                # letters
                allPM_ruralinterior_dist_kw_pairwise[i,3] <- letters$letters[1]
                allPM_ruralinterior_dist_kw_pairwise[i,4] <- letters$letters[2] 
                
    # Urban Edge
        
         # Kruskal-Wallis Test
          formula <- as.formula(paste(element, "~particle_source"))
          X_kw_AvF <- kruskal.test(formula, data = urbanedge_dist)
        
        # Dunn post-hoc pairwise
          # dunn_res <- dunn_test(
                # data = AllCompxUNESites_NOopen,
                # formula,
                # p.adjust.method = "BH"
              # )
         
          alpha <- 0.05
          letters <- data.frame(
            particle_source = levels(AllCompxUNESites_NOopen$particle_source),
            letters = if (X_kw_AvF$p.value < alpha) c("a", "b") else c("a", "a")
          )
              
              # placing these results into our matrix
            
                # pairwise comparisons
                allPM_urbanedge_dist_kw_pairwise[i,2] <- X_kw_AvF$p.value[1]
                
                # letters

                allPM_urbanedge_dist_kw_pairwise[i,4] <- letters$letters[2] 
    
    # Urban Interior
        
         # Kruskal-Wallis Test
          formula <- as.formula(paste(element, "~particle_source"))
          X_kw_AvF <- kruskal.test(formula, data = urbaninterior_dist)
        
        # Dunn post-hoc pairwise
          # dunn_res <- dunn_test(
                # data = AllCompxUNESites_NOopen,
                # formula,
                # p.adjust.method = "BH"
              # )
         
          alpha <- 0.05

            particle_source = levels(AllCompxUNESites_NOopen$particle_source),
            letters = if (X_kw_AvF$p.value < alpha) c("a", "b") else c("a", "a")
          )

                # pairwise comparisons

                allPM_urbaninterior_dist_kw_pairwise[i,4] <- letters$letters[2]                   
    }  

        
# these are our matrices with p-values! now we make them into data frames 
    
    allPM_ruraledge_isa_kw_pairwise <- as.data.frame(allPM_ruraledge_isa_kw_pairwise)
    allPM_ruralinterior_isa_kw_pairwise <- as.data.frame(allPM_ruralinterior_isa_kw_pairwise)
    allPM_urbanedge_isa_kw_pairwise <- as.data.frame(allPM_urbanedge_isa_kw_pairwise)
    allPM_urbaninterior_isa_kw_pairwise <- as.data.frame(allPM_urbaninterior_isa_kw_pairwise)
    allPM_ruraledge_dist_kw_pairwise <- as.data.frame(allPM_ruraledge_dist_kw_pairwise)
    allPM_ruralinterior_dist_kw_pairwise <- as.data.frame(allPM_ruralinterior_dist_kw_pairwise)
    allPM_urbanedge_dist_kw_pairwise <- as.data.frame(allPM_urbanedge_dist_kw_pairwise)
    allPM_urbaninterior_dist_kw_pairwise <- as.data.frame(allPM_urbaninterior_dist_kw_pairwise)    
    
        
    # make sure all the numbers are classified as "numeric"
    
    allPM_ruraledge_isa_kw_pairwise[,2] <- as.numeric(allPM_ruraledge_isa_kw_pairwise[,2])
    allPM_ruralinterior_isa_kw_pairwise[,2] <- as.numeric(allPM_ruralinterior_isa_kw_pairwise[,2])
    allPM_urbanedge_isa_kw_pairwise[,2] <- as.numeric(allPM_urbanedge_isa_kw_pairwise[,2])
    allPM_urbaninterior_isa_kw_pairwise[,2] <- as.numeric(allPM_urbaninterior_isa_kw_pairwise[,2])
    allPM_ruraledge_dist_kw_pairwise[,2] <- as.numeric(allPM_ruraledge_dist_kw_pairwise[,2])
    allPM_ruralinterior_dist_kw_pairwise[,2] <- as.numeric(allPM_ruralinterior_dist_kw_pairwise[,2])
    allPM_urbanedge_dist_kw_pairwise[,2] <- as.numeric(allPM_urbanedge_dist_kw_pairwise[,2])
    allPM_urbaninterior_dist_kw_pairwise[,2] <- as.numeric(allPM_urbaninterior_dist_kw_pairwise[,2]) 
    
    # make all the letters uppercase
    
    allPM_ruraledge_isa_kw_pairwise$Ambient <- toupper(allPM_ruraledge_isa_kw_pairwise$Ambient)
    allPM_ruralinterior_isa_kw_pairwise$Ambient <- toupper(allPM_ruralinterior_isa_kw_pairwise$Ambient)
    allPM_urbanedge_isa_kw_pairwise$Ambient <- toupper(allPM_urbanedge_isa_kw_pairwise$Ambient)
    allPM_urbaninterior_isa_kw_pairwise$Ambient <- toupper(allPM_urbaninterior_isa_kw_pairwise$Ambient)
    allPM_ruraledge_dist_kw_pairwise$Ambient <- toupper(allPM_ruraledge_dist_kw_pairwise$Ambient)
    allPM_ruralinterior_dist_kw_pairwise$Ambient <- toupper(allPM_ruralinterior_dist_kw_pairwise$Ambient)
    allPM_urbanedge_dist_kw_pairwise$Ambient <- toupper(allPM_urbanedge_dist_kw_pairwise$Ambient)
    allPM_urbaninterior_dist_kw_pairwise$Ambient <- toupper(allPM_urbaninterior_dist_kw_pairwise$Ambient)
    allPM_ruraledge_isa_kw_pairwise$Foliar <- toupper(allPM_ruraledge_isa_kw_pairwise$Foliar)
    allPM_ruralinterior_isa_kw_pairwise$Foliar <- toupper(allPM_ruralinterior_isa_kw_pairwise$Foliar)
    allPM_urbanedge_isa_kw_pairwise$Foliar <- toupper(allPM_urbanedge_isa_kw_pairwise$Foliar)
    allPM_urbaninterior_isa_kw_pairwise$Foliar <- toupper(allPM_urbaninterior_isa_kw_pairwise$Foliar)
    allPM_ruraledge_dist_kw_pairwise$Foliar <- toupper(allPM_ruraledge_dist_kw_pairwise$Foliar)
    allPM_ruralinterior_dist_kw_pairwise$Foliar <- toupper(allPM_ruralinterior_dist_kw_pairwise$Foliar)
    allPM_urbanedge_dist_kw_pairwise$Foliar <- toupper(allPM_urbanedge_dist_kw_pairwise$Foliar)
    allPM_urbaninterior_dist_kw_pairwise$Foliar <- toupper(allPM_urbaninterior_dist_kw_pairwise$Foliar)

            
    # reduce all p-values in the matrix to two decimal points
    
    allPM_ruraledge_isa_kw_pairwise[] <- lapply(allPM_ruraledge_isa_kw_pairwise, function(x) if (is.numeric(x)) signif(x, digits = 2) else x)
    allPM_ruralinterior_isa_kw_pairwise[] <- lapply(allPM_ruralinterior_isa_kw_pairwise, function(x) if (is.numeric(x)) signif(x, digits = 2) else x)
    allPM_urbanedge_isa_kw_pairwise[] <- lapply(allPM_urbanedge_isa_kw_pairwise, function(x) if (is.numeric(x)) signif(x, digits = 2) else x)
    allPM_urbaninterior_isa_kw_pairwise[] <- lapply(allPM_urbaninterior_isa_kw_pairwise, function(x) if (is.numeric(x)) signif(x, digits = 2) else x)
    allPM_ruraledge_dist_kw_pairwise[] <- lapply(allPM_ruraledge_dist_kw_pairwise, function(x) if (is.numeric(x)) signif(x, digits = 2) else x)
    allPM_ruralinterior_dist_kw_pairwise[] <- lapply(allPM_ruralinterior_dist_kw_pairwise, function(x) if (is.numeric(x)) signif(x, digits = 2) else x)
    allPM_urbanedge_dist_kw_pairwise[] <- lapply(allPM_urbanedge_dist_kw_pairwise, function(x) if (is.numeric(x)) signif(x, digits = 2) else x)
    allPM_urbaninterior_dist_kw_pairwise[] <- lapply(allPM_urbaninterior_dist_kw_pairwise, function(x) if (is.numeric(x)) signif(x, digits = 2) else x)
    
    # combining all these dataframes into one with every ambient vs. foliar comparison
    df_names <- ls(pattern = "^allPM_.*_kw_pairwise$")
    first_df <- get(df_names[1])
    combined_df <- data.frame(Element = first_df$Element)
    
    for (nm in df_names) {
  
        df <- get(nm)
        
        # Extract sitename (2nd position when split by "_")
        sitetype <- strsplit(nm, "_")[[1]][2]
        sitedef <- strsplit(nm, "_")[[1]][3]
        
        name <- paste0(sitetype,"_",sitedef)
        
        # Create new column name
        new_colname <- paste0("AvF_", name)
        
        # Add AvF column
        combined_df[[new_colname]] <- df$`Ambient - Foliar`
      }
    
    write.csv(combined_df, file.path(stats_dir,"allPM_AvF_kw_pvals.csv"), row.names = TRUE)
    write.csv(allPM_ruraledge_isa_kw_pairwise, file.path(stats_dir,"allPM_ruraledge_isa_kw_pairwise.csv"), row.names = TRUE)
    write.csv(allPM_ruralinterior_isa_kw_pairwise, file.path(stats_dir,"allPM_ruralinterior_isa_kw_pairwise.csv"), row.names = TRUE)
    write.csv(allPM_urbanedge_isa_kw_pairwise, file.path(stats_dir,"allPM_urbanedge_isa_kw_pairwise.csv"), row.names = TRUE)
    write.csv(allPM_urbaninterior_isa_kw_pairwise, file.path(stats_dir,"allPM_urbaninterior_isa_kw_pairwise.csv"), row.names = TRUE)
    write.csv(allPM_ruraledge_dist_kw_pairwise, file.path(stats_dir,"allPM_ruraledge_dist_kw_pairwise.csv"), row.names = TRUE)
    write.csv(allPM_ruralinterior_dist_kw_pairwise, file.path(stats_dir,"allPM_ruralinterior_dist_kw_pairwise.csv"), row.names = TRUE)
    write.csv(allPM_urbanedge_dist_kw_pairwise, file.path(stats_dir,"allPM_urbanedge_dist_kw_pairwise.csv"), row.names = TRUE)
    write.csv(allPM_urbaninterior_dist_kw_pairwise, file.path(stats_dir,"allPM_urbaninterior_dist_kw_pairwise.csv"), row.names = TRUE)
```

### Edge Type and Edge/Interior
#### Ambient & Foliar
##### ART ANOVA (includes open sites for ambient)
```{r}
# Foliar
    
    # create an empty matrix, with a row for each element and a column each for: p-value on edge vs. interior, p-value for road vs nonroad p-value for interaction term
    
        foliar_PM_art_edgetype_pvals <- matrix(data=NA, nrow=26, ncol=4)
        colnames(foliar_PM_art_edgetype_pvals) <- c("Element","Edge_vs_Interior","Edge_Type","Interaction")
        foliar_PM_art_edgetype_pvals[,1] <- all_element_names
        
    # create an empty matrix, with a row for each element and a column for each pairwise comparison
        
        foliar_PM_art_edgetype_pairwise <- matrix(data=NA, nrow=26, ncol=11)
        foliar_PM_art_edgetype_pairwise[,1] <- all_element_names
        colnames(foliar_PM_art_edgetype_pairwise) <- 
          c("Element",
            "nonroad,0 - nonroad,90",
            "nonroad,0 - road,0",
            "nonroad,0 - road,90",
            "nonroad,90 - road,0",
            "nonroad,90 - road,90",
            "road,0 - road,90",
            "nonroad0",
            "nonroad90",
            "road0",
            "road90"
            )
        
        
    # now the matrices are ready to go, and we can fill it with these p-values using the loop below
    
    for (i in c(1:26)) {
      
    
    element <- all_element_names[i]
    
    # ART Anova
        
      # Edge vs. Interior
      formula <- as.formula(paste(all_element_names[i], "~ dfe"))
      X_ART_EvI <- art(formula, data = FoliarPMCompxUNESites[!is.na(FoliarPMCompxUNESites[[element]]),])
      X_aovART_EvI <- anova(X_ART_EvI)
      X_aovART_EvI_pval <- X_aovART_EvI["dfe","Pr(>F)"] # this extracts the p-value for edge vs. interior
      foliar_PM_art_edgetype_pvals[i,2] <- X_aovART_EvI_pval # this places it into the matrix we made
      
      # road vs. nonroad
        formula <- as.formula(paste(all_element_names[i], "~edge_type"))
        X_ART <- art(formula, data = FoliarPMCompxUNESites[!is.na(FoliarPMCompxUNESites[[element]]),])
        X_aovART <- anova(X_ART)
        edgetype_art_pval <- X_aovART["edge_type","Pr(>F)"] # this extracts the p-value for road vs. nonroad
        foliar_PM_art_edgetype_pvals[i,3] <- edgetype_art_pval # this places it into the matrix we made
      
     
      # road vs. nonroad and Interaction Term
        formula <- as.formula(paste(all_element_names[i], "~edge_type*dfe"))
        X_ART <- art(formula, data = FoliarPMCompxUNESites[!is.na(FoliarPMCompxUNESites[[element]]),])
        X_aovART <- anova(X_ART)
        edgetype_art_pval <- X_aovART["edge_type","Pr(>F)"] # this extracts the p-value for road vs. nonroad
        Int_art_pval <- X_aovART["edge_type:dfe","Pr(>F)"] # this extracts the p-value for the interaction term
        foliar_PM_art_edgetype_pvals[i,4] <- Int_art_pval # this places it into the matrix we made
    
    
    # pairwise comparisons
    
      # isa
      art.con_X_ART <- art.con(X_ART,~edge_type*dfe, adjust="none")
      art.con_X_ART <- as.data.frame(art.con_X_ART)
      letters <- cldList(
      p.value ~ contrast,
      data = art.con_X_ART,
      threshold = 0.05  
    )
        # placing these results into our matrix
      
          # pairwise comparisons
          foliar_PM_art_edgetype_pairwise[i,2] <- art.con_X_ART$p.value[1]
          foliar_PM_art_edgetype_pairwise[i,3] <- art.con_X_ART$p.value[2]
          foliar_PM_art_edgetype_pairwise[i,4] <- art.con_X_ART$p.value[3]
          foliar_PM_art_edgetype_pairwise[i,5] <- art.con_X_ART$p.value[4]
          foliar_PM_art_edgetype_pairwise[i,6] <- art.con_X_ART$p.value[5]
          foliar_PM_art_edgetype_pairwise[i,7] <- art.con_X_ART$p.value[6]
          
          # letters
          foliar_PM_art_edgetype_pairwise[i,8] <- letters$Letter[1]
          foliar_PM_art_edgetype_pairwise[i,9] <- letters$Letter[2]
          foliar_PM_art_edgetype_pairwise[i,10] <- letters$Letter[3]
          foliar_PM_art_edgetype_pairwise[i,11] <- letters$Letter[4]
          

    }
        # this is the matrix with p-values! now we make it into a data frame 
        foliar_PM_art_edgetype_pvals <- as.data.frame(foliar_PM_art_edgetype_pvals)
        
        # make sure all the numbers are classified as "numeric"
        foliar_PM_art_edgetype_pvals$Edge_vs_Interior <- as.numeric(foliar_PM_art_edgetype_pvals$Edge_vs_Interior)
        foliar_PM_art_edgetype_pvals$Edge_Type <- as.numeric(foliar_PM_art_edgetype_pvals$Edge_Type)
        foliar_PM_art_edgetype_pvals$Interaction <- as.numeric(foliar_PM_art_edgetype_pvals$Interaction)
        
        # reduce all p-values in the matrix to two decimal points
        foliar_PM_art_edgetype_pvals[] <- lapply(foliar_PM_art_edgetype_pvals, function(x) if (is.numeric(x)) signif(x, digits = 2) else x) 
        
        # this is the matrix with p-values! now we make it into a data frame 
        foliar_PM_art_edgetype_pvals <- as.data.frame(foliar_PM_art_edgetype_pvals)
        
        # write the data frame to a csv
        write.csv(foliar_PM_art_edgetype_pvals, file.path(stats_dir,"foliar_PM_art_pvals_edgetype.csv"), row.names = TRUE)
        
    # the other matrices store pairwise comparisons & letters to indicate significance
        
        # isa
          foliar_PM_art_edgetype_pairwise <- as.data.frame(foliar_PM_art_edgetype_pairwise)
          foliar_PM_art_edgetype_pairwise <- as.data.frame(foliar_PM_art_edgetype_pairwise)
        
          # making sure everything is numeric
            foliar_PM_art_edgetype_pairwise[,2] <- as.numeric(foliar_PM_art_edgetype_pairwise[,2])
            foliar_PM_art_edgetype_pairwise[,3] <- as.numeric(foliar_PM_art_edgetype_pairwise[,3])
            foliar_PM_art_edgetype_pairwise[,4] <- as.numeric(foliar_PM_art_edgetype_pairwise[,4])
            foliar_PM_art_edgetype_pairwise[,5] <- as.numeric(foliar_PM_art_edgetype_pairwise[,5])
            foliar_PM_art_edgetype_pairwise[,6] <- as.numeric(foliar_PM_art_edgetype_pairwise[,6])
            foliar_PM_art_edgetype_pairwise[,7] <- as.numeric(foliar_PM_art_edgetype_pairwise[,7])
            
          # reduce all p-values to two decimal points
            foliar_PM_art_edgetype_pairwise[] <- lapply(foliar_PM_art_edgetype_pairwise, function(x) if (is.numeric(x)) signif(x, digits = 2) else x)

            write.csv(foliar_PM_art_edgetype_pairwise, file.path(stats_dir,"foliar_PM_art_edgetype_pairwise.csv"), row.names = TRUE)

    X_aovART_EvI <- anova(X_ART_EvI)

    # road vs nonroad

    # road vs. nonroad and Interaction Term
```

#### One-way Pairwise Comparisons (capital letters)
##### ART ANOVA
```{r}

# subsetting just the edge & interior sites
  AllCompxUNESites_NOopen <- subset(AllCompxUNESites, dfe=="0"|dfe=="90")

# subsetting just the edge & interior sites


  nonroadedge <- subset(AllCompxUNESites_NOopen, dfe=="0"|edge_type=="nonroad")
  nonroadinterior <- subset(AllCompxUNESites_NOopen, dfe=="90"|edge_type=="nonroad")
  roadedge <- subset(AllCompxUNESites_NOopen, dfe=="90"|edge_type=="road")
  roadinterior <- subset(AllCompxUNESites_NOopen, dfe=="90"|edge_type=="road")
    
# create an empty matrix, with a row for each element and a column for p-values comparing ambient & foliar
  
      allPM_nonroadedge_art_pvals <- matrix(data=NA, nrow=26, ncol=2)
        colnames(allPM_nonroadedge_art_pvals) <-
          c("Element",
            "Ambient_v_Foliar" )
        allPM_nonroadedge_art_pvals[,1] <- all_element_names
        
        allPM_nonroadinterior_art_pvals <- matrix(data=NA, nrow=26, ncol=2)
        colnames(allPM_nonroadinterior_art_pvals) <-
          c("Element",
            "Ambient_v_Foliar" )
        allPM_nonroadinterior_art_pvals[,1] <- all_element_names
        
       allPM_roadedge_art_pvals <- matrix(data=NA, nrow=26, ncol=2)
        colnames(allPM_roadedge_art_pvals) <-
          c("Element",
            "Ambient_v_Foliar" )
        allPM_roadedge_art_pvals[,1] <- all_element_names
        
        allPM_roadinterior_art_pvals <- matrix(data=NA, nrow=26, ncol=2)
        colnames(allPM_roadinterior_art_pvals) <-
          c("Element",
            "Ambient_v_Foliar" )
        allPM_roadinterior_art_pvals[,1] <- all_element_names
           
# create an empty matrix, with a row for each element and a column for each pairwise comparison
        
        allPM_nonroadedge_art_pairwise <- matrix(data=NA, nrow=26, ncol=4)
        allPM_nonroadedge_art_pairwise[,1] <- all_element_names
        colnames(allPM_nonroadedge_art_pairwise) <- 
          c("Element",
            "Ambient - Foliar",
            "Ambient",
            "Foliar"
            )
        
        allPM_nonroadinterior_art_pairwise <- matrix(data=NA, nrow=26, ncol=4)
        allPM_nonroadinterior_art_pairwise[,1] <- all_element_names
        colnames(allPM_nonroadinterior_art_pairwise) <- 
          c("Element",
            "Ambient - Foliar",
            "Ambient",
            "Foliar"
            )
        
        allPM_roadedge_art_pairwise <- matrix(data=NA, nrow=26, ncol=4)
        allPM_roadedge_art_pairwise[,1] <- all_element_names
        colnames(allPM_roadedge_art_pairwise) <- 
          c("Element",
            "Ambient - Foliar",
            "Ambient",
            "Foliar"
            )
        
        allPM_roadinterior_art_pairwise <- matrix(data=NA, nrow=26, ncol=4)
        allPM_roadinterior_art_pairwise[,1] <- all_element_names
        colnames(allPM_roadinterior_art_pairwise) <- 
          c("Element",
            "Ambient - Foliar",
            "Ambient",
            "Foliar"
            )

        
    for (i in c(1:26)) {
      
    
    element <- all_element_names[i]  
    
    # nonroad Edge
        
        # ART Anova
          formula <- as.formula(paste(all_element_names[i], "~ particle_source"))
          X_ART_AvF <- art(formula, data = nonroadedge[!is.na(nonroadedge[[element]]),])
          X_aovART_AvF <- anova(X_ART_AvF)
          X_aovART_AvF_pval <- X_aovART_AvF["particle_source","Pr(>F)"] # this extracts the p-value
          allPM_nonroadedge_art_pvals[i,2] <- X_aovART_AvF_pval # this places it into the matrix we made
        
        # pairwise comparisons
            art.con_X_ART <- art.con(X_ART_AvF,~particle_source, adjust="none")
            art.con_X_ART <- as.data.frame(art.con_X_ART)
            letters <- cldList(
            p.value ~ contrast,
            data = art.con_X_ART,
            threshold = 0.05  )
              
              # placing these results into our matrix
            
                # pairwise comparisons
                allPM_nonroadedge_art_pairwise[i,2] <- art.con_X_ART$p.value[1]
                
                # letters
                allPM_nonroadedge_art_pairwise[i,3] <- letters$Letter[1]
                allPM_nonroadedge_art_pairwise[i,4] <- letters$Letter[2]
    
    # nonroad Interior
        
        # ART Anova
          formula <- as.formula(paste(all_element_names[i], "~ particle_source"))
          X_ART_AvF <- art(formula, data = nonroadinterior[!is.na(nonroadinterior[[element]]),])
          X_aovART_AvF <- anova(X_ART_AvF)
          X_aovART_AvF_pval <- X_aovART_AvF["particle_source","Pr(>F)"] # this extracts the p-value
          allPM_nonroadinterior_art_pvals[i,2] <- X_aovART_AvF_pval # this places it into the matrix we made
        
        # pairwise comparisons
            art.con_X_ART <- art.con(X_ART_AvF,~particle_source, adjust="none")
            art.con_X_ART <- as.data.frame(art.con_X_ART)
            letters <- cldList(
            p.value ~ contrast,
            data = art.con_X_ART,
            threshold = 0.05  )
              
              # placing these results into our matrix
            
                # pairwise comparisons
                allPM_nonroadinterior_art_pairwise[i,2] <- art.con_X_ART$p.value[1]
                
                # letters
                allPM_nonroadinterior_art_pairwise[i,3] <- letters$Letter[1]
                allPM_nonroadinterior_art_pairwise[i,4] <- letters$Letter[2]  
                
    # road Edge
        
        # ART Anova
          formula <- as.formula(paste(all_element_names[i], "~ particle_source"))
          X_ART_AvF <- art(formula, data = roadedge[!is.na(roadedge[[element]]),])
          X_aovART_AvF <- anova(X_ART_AvF)
          X_aovART_AvF_pval <- X_aovART_AvF["particle_source","Pr(>F)"] # this extracts the p-value
          allPM_roadedge_art_pvals[i,2] <- X_aovART_AvF_pval # this places it into the matrix we made
        
        # pairwise comparisons
            art.con_X_ART <- art.con(X_ART_AvF,~particle_source, adjust="none")
            art.con_X_ART <- as.data.frame(art.con_X_ART)
            letters <- cldList(
            p.value ~ contrast,
            data = art.con_X_ART,
            threshold = 0.05  )
              
              # placing these results into our matrix
            
                # pairwise comparisons
                allPM_roadedge_art_pairwise[i,2] <- art.con_X_ART$p.value[1]
                
                # letters
                allPM_roadedge_art_pairwise[i,3] <- letters$Letter[1]
                allPM_roadedge_art_pairwise[i,4] <- letters$Letter[2]
    
    # road Interior
        
        # ART Anova
          formula <- as.formula(paste(all_element_names[i], "~ particle_source"))
          X_ART_AvF <- art(formula, data = roadinterior[!is.na(roadinterior[[element]]),])
          X_aovART_AvF <- anova(X_ART_AvF)
          X_aovART_AvF_pval <- X_aovART_AvF["particle_source","Pr(>F)"] # this extracts the p-value
          allPM_roadinterior_art_pvals[i,2] <- X_aovART_AvF_pval # this places it into the matrix we made
        
        # pairwise comparisons
            art.con_X_ART <- art.con(X_ART_AvF,~particle_source, adjust="none")
            art.con_X_ART <- as.data.frame(art.con_X_ART)
            letters <- cldList(
            p.value ~ contrast,
            data = art.con_X_ART,
            threshold = 0.05  )
              
              # placing these results into our matrix

                allPM_roadinterior_art_pairwise[i,4] <- letters$Letter[2]
    }  

        
# these are our matrices with p-values! now we make them into data frames 
    allPM_nonroadedge_art_pvals <- as.data.frame(allPM_nonroadedge_art_pvals)
    allPM_nonroadinterior_art_pvals <- as.data.frame(allPM_nonroadinterior_art_pvals)
    allPM_roadedge_art_pvals <- as.data.frame(allPM_roadedge_art_pvals)
    allPM_roadinterior_art_pvals <- as.data.frame(allPM_roadinterior_art_pvals)
    
    allPM_nonroadedge_art_pairwise <- as.data.frame(allPM_nonroadedge_art_pairwise)
    allPM_nonroadinterior_art_pairwise <- as.data.frame(allPM_nonroadinterior_art_pairwise)
    allPM_roadedge_art_pairwise <- as.data.frame(allPM_roadedge_art_pairwise)
    allPM_roadinterior_art_pairwise <- as.data.frame(allPM_roadinterior_art_pairwise)
    
        
    # make sure all the numbers are classified as "numeric"
    
    allPM_nonroadedge_art_pvals$Ambient_v_Foliar <- as.numeric(allPM_nonroadedge_art_pvals$Ambient_v_Foliar)
    allPM_nonroadinterior_art_pvals$Ambient_v_Foliar <- as.numeric(allPM_nonroadinterior_art_pvals$Ambient_v_Foliar)
    allPM_roadedge_art_pvals$Ambient_v_Foliar <- as.numeric(allPM_roadedge_art_pvals$Ambient_v_Foliar)
    allPM_roadinterior_art_pvals$Ambient_v_Foliar <- as.numeric(allPM_roadinterior_art_pvals$Ambient_v_Foliar)
    
    allPM_nonroadedge_art_pairwise[,2] <- as.numeric(allPM_nonroadedge_art_pairwise[,2])
    allPM_nonroadinterior_art_pairwise[,2] <- as.numeric(allPM_nonroadinterior_art_pairwise[,2])
    allPM_roadedge_art_pairwise[,2] <- as.numeric(allPM_roadedge_art_pairwise[,2])
    allPM_roadinterior_art_pairwise[,2] <- as.numeric(allPM_roadinterior_art_pairwise[,2])
    
    # make all the letters uppercase
    
    allPM_nonroadedge_art_pairwise$Ambient <- toupper(allPM_nonroadedge_art_pairwise$Ambient)
    allPM_nonroadinterior_art_pairwise$Ambient <- toupper(allPM_nonroadinterior_art_pairwise$Ambient)
    allPM_roadedge_art_pairwise$Ambient <- toupper(allPM_roadedge_art_pairwise$Ambient)
    allPM_roadinterior_art_pairwise$Ambient <- toupper(allPM_roadinterior_art_pairwise$Ambient)
    allPM_nonroadedge_art_pairwise$Foliar <- toupper(allPM_nonroadedge_art_pairwise$Foliar)
    allPM_nonroadinterior_art_pairwise$Foliar <- toupper(allPM_nonroadinterior_art_pairwise$Foliar)
    allPM_roadedge_art_pairwise$Foliar <- toupper(allPM_roadedge_art_pairwise$Foliar)
    allPM_roadinterior_art_pairwise$Foliar <- toupper(allPM_roadinterior_art_pairwise$Foliar)
            
    # reduce all p-values in the matrix to two decimal points
    
    allPM_nonroadedge_art_pvals[] <- lapply(allPM_nonroadedge_art_pvals, function(x) if (is.numeric(x)) signif(x, digits = 2) else x)
    allPM_nonroadinterior_art_pvals[] <- lapply(allPM_nonroadinterior_art_pvals, function(x) if (is.numeric(x)) signif(x, digits = 2) else x)
    allPM_roadedge_art_pvals[] <- lapply(allPM_roadedge_art_pvals, function(x) if (is.numeric(x)) signif(x, digits = 2) else x)
    allPM_roadinterior_art_pvals[] <- lapply(allPM_roadinterior_art_pvals, function(x) if (is.numeric(x)) signif(x, digits = 2) else x)
    
    allPM_nonroadedge_art_pairwise[] <- lapply(allPM_nonroadedge_art_pairwise, function(x) if (is.numeric(x)) signif(x, digits = 2) else x)
    allPM_nonroadinterior_art_pairwise[] <- lapply(allPM_nonroadinterior_art_pairwise, function(x) if (is.numeric(x)) signif(x, digits = 2) else x)
    allPM_roadedge_art_pairwise[] <- lapply(allPM_roadedge_art_pairwise, function(x) if (is.numeric(x)) signif(x, digits = 2) else x)
    allPM_roadinterior_art_pairwise[] <- lapply(allPM_roadinterior_art_pairwise, function(x) if (is.numeric(x)) signif(x, digits = 2) else x)
    
    # combining all these dataframes into one with every ambient vs. foliar comparison
    df_names <- ls(pattern = "^allPM_.*_art_pvals$")
    first_df <- get(df_names[1])
    combined_df <- data.frame(Element = first_df$Element)
    
    for (nm in df_names) {
  
        df <- get(nm)
        
        # Extract sitename (2nd position when split by "_")
        sitetype <- strsplit(nm, "_")[[1]][2]
        sitedef <- strsplit(nm, "_")[[1]][3]
        
        name <- paste0(sitetype,"_",sitedef)
        
        # Create new column name
        new_colname <- paste0("AvF_", name)
        
        # Add AvF column
        combined_df[[new_colname]] <- df$Ambient_v_Foliar
      }
    
    write.csv(combined_df, "allPM_AvF_art_pvals.csv", row.names = TRUE)
    write.csv(allPM_nonroadedge_art_pairwise, file.path(stats_dir,"allPM_nonroadedge_art_pairwise.csv"), row.names = TRUE)
    write.csv(allPM_nonroadinterior_art_pairwise, file.path(stats_dir,"allPM_nonroadinterior_art_pairwise.csv"), row.names = TRUE)
    write.csv(allPM_roadedge_art_pairwise, file.path(stats_dir,"allPM_roadedge_art_pairwise.csv"), row.names = TRUE)
    write.csv(allPM_roadinterior_art_pairwise, file.path(stats_dir,"allPM_roadinterior_art_pairwise.csv"), row.names = TRUE)
```

##### Kruskal-Wallis Test
```{r}

# subsetting just the edge & interior sites
  AllCompxUNESites_NOopen <- subset(AllCompxUNESites, dfe=="0"|dfe=="90")

# subsetting just the edge & interior sites


  nonroadedge <- subset(AllCompxUNESites_NOopen, dfe=="0"|edge_type=="nonroad")
  nonroadinterior <- subset(AllCompxUNESites_NOopen, dfe=="90"|edge_type=="nonroad")
  roadedge <- subset(AllCompxUNESites_NOopen, dfe=="90"|edge_type=="road")
  roadinterior <- subset(AllCompxUNESites_NOopen, dfe=="90"|edge_type=="road")

           
# create an empty matrix, with a row for each element and a column for each pairwise comparison
        
        allPM_nonroadedge_kw_pairwise <- matrix(data=NA, nrow=26, ncol=4)
        allPM_nonroadedge_kw_pairwise[,1] <- all_element_names
        colnames(allPM_nonroadedge_kw_pairwise) <- 
          c("Element",
            "Ambient - Foliar",
            "Ambient",
            "Foliar"
            )
        
        allPM_nonroadinterior_kw_pairwise <- matrix(data=NA, nrow=26, ncol=4)
        allPM_nonroadinterior_kw_pairwise[,1] <- all_element_names
        colnames(allPM_nonroadinterior_kw_pairwise) <- 
          c("Element",
            "Ambient - Foliar",
            "Ambient",
            "Foliar"
            )
        
        allPM_roadedge_kw_pairwise <- matrix(data=NA, nrow=26, ncol=4)
        allPM_roadedge_kw_pairwise[,1] <- all_element_names
        colnames(allPM_roadedge_kw_pairwise) <- 
          c("Element",
            "Ambient - Foliar",
            "Ambient",
            "Foliar"
            )
        
        allPM_roadinterior_kw_pairwise <- matrix(data=NA, nrow=26, ncol=4)
        allPM_roadinterior_kw_pairwise[,1] <- all_element_names
        colnames(allPM_roadinterior_kw_pairwise) <- 
          c("Element",
            "Ambient - Foliar",
            "Ambient",
            "Foliar"
            )
        
    for (i in c(1:26)) {
      
    
    element <- all_element_names[i]  
    
    
    # Rural Edge
        
      # ART Anova
          
        # Kruskal-Wallis Test
          formula <- as.formula(paste(element, "~particle_source"))
          X_kw_AvF <- kruskal.test(formula, data = nonroadedge)
        
        # Dunn post-hoc pairwise
          # dunn_res <- dunn_test(
                # data = AllCompxUNESites_NOopen,
                # formula,
                # p.adjust.method = "BH"
              # )
         
          alpha <- 0.05
          letters <- data.frame(
            particle_source = levels(AllCompxUNESites_NOopen$particle_source),
            letters = if (X_kw_AvF$p.value < alpha) c("a", "b") else c("a", "a")
          )
              
              # placing these results into our matrix
            
                # pairwise comparisons
                allPM_nonroadedge_kw_pairwise[i,2] <- X_kw_AvF$p.value[1]
                
                # letters
                allPM_nonroadedge_kw_pairwise[i,3] <- letters$letters[1]
                allPM_nonroadedge_kw_pairwise[i,4] <- letters$letters[2]
    
    # Rural Interior
        
        # Kruskal-Wallis Test
          formula <- as.formula(paste(element, "~particle_source"))
          X_kw_AvF <- kruskal.test(formula, data = nonroadinterior)
        
        # Dunn post-hoc pairwise
          # dunn_res <- dunn_test(
                # data = AllCompxUNESites_NOopen,
                # formula,
                # p.adjust.method = "BH"
              # )
         
          alpha <- 0.05
          letters <- data.frame(
            particle_source = levels(AllCompxUNESites_NOopen$particle_source),
            letters = if (X_kw_AvF$p.value < alpha) c("a", "b") else c("a", "a")
          )
              
              # placing these results into our matrix
            
                # pairwise comparisons
                allPM_nonroadinterior_kw_pairwise[i,2] <- X_kw_AvF$p.value[1]
                
                # letters
                allPM_nonroadinterior_kw_pairwise[i,3] <- letters$letters[1]
                allPM_nonroadinterior_kw_pairwise[i,4] <- letters$letters[2] 
                
    # Urban Edge
        
         # Kruskal-Wallis Test
          formula <- as.formula(paste(element, "~particle_source"))
          X_kw_AvF <- kruskal.test(formula, data = roadedge)
        
        # Dunn post-hoc pairwise
          # dunn_res <- dunn_test(
                # data = AllCompxUNESites_NOopen,
                # formula,
                # p.adjust.method = "BH"
              # )
         
          alpha <- 0.05
          letters <- data.frame(
            particle_source = levels(AllCompxUNESites_NOopen$particle_source),
            letters = if (X_kw_AvF$p.value < alpha) c("a", "b") else c("a", "a")
          )
              
              # placing these results into our matrix
            
                # pairwise comparisons
                allPM_roadedge_kw_pairwise[i,2] <- X_kw_AvF$p.value[1]
                
                # letters
                allPM_roadedge_kw_pairwise[i,3] <- letters$letters[1]
                allPM_roadedge_kw_pairwise[i,4] <- letters$letters[2] 
    
    # Urban Interior
        
         # Kruskal-Wallis Test
          formula <- as.formula(paste(element, "~particle_source"))
          X_kw_AvF <- kruskal.test(formula, data = roadinterior)
        
        # Dunn post-hoc pairwise
          # dunn_res <- dunn_test(
                # data = AllCompxUNESites_NOopen,
                # formula,
                # p.adjust.method = "BH"
              # )
         
          alpha <- 0.05
          letters <- data.frame(
            particle_source = levels(AllCompxUNESites_NOopen$particle_source),
            letters = if (X_kw_AvF$p.value < alpha) c("a", "b") else c("a", "a")
          )
              
              # placing these results into our matrix
            
                # pairwise comparisons
                allPM_roadinterior_kw_pairwise[i,2] <- X_kw_AvF$p.value[1]
                
                # letters
                allPM_roadinterior_kw_pairwise[i,3] <- letters$letters[1]
                allPM_roadinterior_kw_pairwise[i,4] <- letters$letters[2] 

    }  

        
# these are our matrices with p-values! now we make them into data frames 
    
    allPM_nonroadedge_kw_pairwise <- as.data.frame(allPM_nonroadedge_kw_pairwise)
    allPM_nonroadinterior_kw_pairwise <- as.data.frame(allPM_nonroadinterior_kw_pairwise)
    allPM_roadedge_kw_pairwise <- as.data.frame(allPM_roadedge_kw_pairwise)
    allPM_roadinterior_kw_pairwise <- as.data.frame(allPM_roadinterior_kw_pairwise)

    # make sure all the numbers are classified as "numeric"
    
    allPM_nonroadedge_kw_pairwise[,2] <- as.numeric(allPM_nonroadedge_kw_pairwise[,2])
    allPM_nonroadinterior_kw_pairwise[,2] <- as.numeric(allPM_nonroadinterior_kw_pairwise[,2])
    allPM_roadedge_kw_pairwise[,2] <- as.numeric(allPM_roadedge_kw_pairwise[,2])
    allPM_roadinterior_kw_pairwise[,2] <- as.numeric(allPM_roadinterior_kw_pairwise[,2])

    # make all the letters uppercase
    
    allPM_nonroadedge_kw_pairwise$Ambient <- toupper(allPM_nonroadedge_kw_pairwise$Ambient)
    allPM_nonroadinterior_kw_pairwise$Ambient <- toupper(allPM_nonroadinterior_kw_pairwise$Ambient)
    allPM_roadedge_kw_pairwise$Ambient <- toupper(allPM_roadedge_kw_pairwise$Ambient)
    allPM_roadinterior_kw_pairwise$Ambient <- toupper(allPM_roadinterior_kw_pairwise$Ambient)

    allPM_nonroadedge_kw_pairwise$Foliar <- toupper(allPM_nonroadedge_kw_pairwise$Foliar)
    allPM_nonroadinterior_kw_pairwise$Foliar <- toupper(allPM_nonroadinterior_kw_pairwise$Foliar)
    allPM_roadedge_kw_pairwise$Foliar <- toupper(allPM_roadedge_kw_pairwise$Foliar)
    allPM_roadinterior_kw_pairwise$Foliar <- toupper(allPM_roadinterior_kw_pairwise$Foliar)

            
    # reduce all p-values in the matrix to two decimal points
    
    allPM_nonroadedge_kw_pairwise[] <- lapply(allPM_nonroadedge_kw_pairwise, function(x) if (is.numeric(x)) signif(x, digits = 2) else x)
    allPM_nonroadinterior_kw_pairwise[] <- lapply(allPM_nonroadinterior_kw_pairwise, function(x) if (is.numeric(x)) signif(x, digits = 2) else x)
    allPM_roadedge_kw_pairwise[] <- lapply(allPM_roadedge_kw_pairwise, function(x) if (is.numeric(x)) signif(x, digits = 2) else x)
    allPM_roadinterior_kw_pairwise[] <- lapply(allPM_roadinterior_kw_pairwise, function(x) if (is.numeric(x)) signif(x, digits = 2) else x)

    # combining all these dataframes into one with every ambient vs. foliar comparison
    df_names <- ls(pattern = "^allPM_.*_kw_pairwise$")
    first_df <- get(df_names[1])
    combined_df <- data.frame(Element = first_df$Element)
    
    for (nm in df_names) {
  
        df <- get(nm)
        
        # Extract sitename (2nd position when split by "_")
        sitetype <- strsplit(nm, "_")[[1]][2]
        sitedef <- strsplit(nm, "_")[[1]][3]
        
        name <- paste0(sitetype,"_",sitedef)
        
        # Create new column name
        new_colname <- paste0("AvF_", name)
        
        # Add AvF column
        combined_df[[new_colname]] <- df$`Ambient - Foliar`
      }
    
    write.csv(combined_df, file.path(stats_dir,"allPM_AvF_kw_edgetype_pvals.csv"), row.names = TRUE)
    write.csv(allPM_nonroadedge_kw_pairwise, file.path(stats_dir,"allPM_nonroadedge_kw_pairwise.csv"), row.names = TRUE)
    write.csv(allPM_nonroadinterior_kw_pairwise, file.path(stats_dir,"allPM_nonroadinterior_kw_pairwise.csv"), row.names = TRUE)
    write.csv(allPM_roadedge_kw_pairwise, file.path(stats_dir,"allPM_roadedge_kw_pairwise.csv"), row.names = TRUE)
    write.csv(allPM_roadinterior_kw_pairwise, file.path(stats_dir,"allPM_roadinterior_kw_pairwise.csv"), row.names = TRUE)

```

## Categorical Plots for Each Element by Urban/Rural and Edge/Interior
### Means
#### Foliar Means
```{r}
# defining list of element names
element_names <- all_element_names

# creating a list for figures
foliar_element_urbcatxdfe_list <- list()
foliar_element_urbcatxdfe_list_isa <- list()
foliar_element_urbcatxdfe_list_dist <- list()

# loop to make categorical figures 

for (i in c(1:26)) {
  
element <- element_names[i] 

# summarize the element by urbanization and distance from edge
    summary_isa <- cbind(aggregate(FoliarPMCompxUNESites[[element]],                           list(FoliarPMCompxUNESites$dfe,FoliarPMCompxUNESites$urb_cat_isa),FUN=mean),
                     aggregate(FoliarPMCompxUNESites[[element]],                            list(FoliarPMCompxUNESites$dfe,FoliarPMCompxUNESites$urb_cat_isa),FUN=stderr))
    summary_isa <- summary_isa[,c(1:3,6)]
    colnames(summary_isa) <- c("dfe","urb_cat_isa","perc_comp","se")
    
    summary_dist <- cbind(aggregate(FoliarPMCompxUNESites[[element]],
                               list(FoliarPMCompxUNESites$dfe,FoliarPMCompxUNESites$urb_cat_dist),FUN=mean),
                     aggregate(FoliarPMCompxUNESites[[element]],
                               list(FoliarPMCompxUNESites$dfe,FoliarPMCompxUNESites$urb_cat_dist),FUN=stderr))
    summary_dist <- summary_dist[,c(1:3,6)]
    colnames(summary_dist) <- c("dfe","urb_cat_dist","perc_comp","se")
    
 
  # add in the significance letter associated with each group
      summary_isa$letter <- NA
      summary_isa$letter[1] <- foliar_PM_art_pairwise_isa$Rural0[foliar_PM_art_pairwise_isa$Element==element]
      summary_isa$letter[2] <- foliar_PM_art_pairwise_isa$Rural90[foliar_PM_art_pairwise_isa$Element==element]
      summary_isa$letter[3] <- foliar_PM_art_pairwise_isa$Urban0[foliar_PM_art_pairwise_isa$Element==element]
      summary_isa$letter[4] <- foliar_PM_art_pairwise_isa$Urban90[foliar_PM_art_pairwise_isa$Element==element]
      
      summary_isa$LETTER <- NA
      summary_isa$LETTER[1] <- allPM_ruraledge_isa_art_pairwise$`Foliar`[allPM_ruraledge_isa_art_pairwise$Element==element]
      summary_isa$LETTER[2] <- allPM_ruralinterior_isa_art_pairwise$`Foliar`[allPM_ruralinterior_isa_art_pairwise$Element==element]
      summary_isa$LETTER[3] <- allPM_urbanedge_isa_art_pairwise$`Foliar`[allPM_urbanedge_isa_art_pairwise$Element==element]
      summary_isa$LETTER[4] <- allPM_urbaninterior_isa_art_pairwise$`Foliar`[allPM_urbaninterior_isa_art_pairwise$Element==element]
      
      
      summary_dist$letter <- NA
      summary_dist$letter[1] <- foliar_PM_art_pairwise_dist$Rural0[foliar_PM_art_pairwise_dist$Element==element]
      summary_dist$letter[2] <- foliar_PM_art_pairwise_dist$Rural90[foliar_PM_art_pairwise_dist$Element==element]
      summary_dist$letter[3] <- foliar_PM_art_pairwise_dist$Urban0[foliar_PM_art_pairwise_dist$Element==element]
      summary_dist$letter[4] <- foliar_PM_art_pairwise_dist$Urban90[foliar_PM_art_pairwise_dist$Element==element]
      
      summary_dist$LETTER <- NA
      summary_dist$LETTER[1] <- allPM_ruraledge_dist_art_pairwise$`Foliar`[allPM_ruraledge_dist_art_pairwise$Element==element]
      summary_dist$LETTER[2] <- allPM_ruralinterior_dist_art_pairwise$`Foliar`[allPM_ruralinterior_dist_art_pairwise$Element==element]
      summary_dist$LETTER[3] <- allPM_urbanedge_dist_art_pairwise$`Foliar`[allPM_urbanedge_dist_art_pairwise$Element==element]
      summary_dist$LETTER[4] <- allPM_urbaninterior_dist_art_pairwise$`Foliar`[allPM_urbaninterior_dist_art_pairwise$Element==element]
      
  # add in maximum for y axis in each group (for positioning letter)
      summary_isa$max <- NA
      summary_isa$max[1] <- summary_isa$perc_comp[1]+summary_isa$se[1]+(axes_limits$ymax_isa[i]-axes_limits$ymin_isa[i])*0.01
      summary_isa$max[2] <- summary_isa$perc_comp[2]+summary_isa$se[2]+(axes_limits$ymax_isa[i]-axes_limits$ymin_isa[i])*0.01
      summary_isa$max[3] <- summary_isa$perc_comp[3]+summary_isa$se[3]+(axes_limits$ymax_isa[i]-axes_limits$ymin_isa[i])*0.01
      summary_isa$max[4] <- summary_isa$perc_comp[4]+summary_isa$se[4]+(axes_limits$ymax_isa[i]-axes_limits$ymin_isa[i])*0.01
      
      summary_isa$min <- NA
      summary_isa$min[1] <- summary_isa$perc_comp[1]-summary_isa$se[1]-(axes_limits$ymax_isa[i]-axes_limits$ymin_isa[i])*0.01
      summary_isa$min[2] <- summary_isa$perc_comp[2]-summary_isa$se[2]-(axes_limits$ymax_isa[i]-axes_limits$ymin_isa[i])*0.01
      summary_isa$min[3] <- summary_isa$perc_comp[3]-summary_isa$se[3]-(axes_limits$ymax_isa[i]-axes_limits$ymin_isa[i])*0.01
      summary_isa$min[4] <- summary_isa$perc_comp[4]-summary_isa$se[4]-(axes_limits$ymax_isa[i]-axes_limits$ymin_isa[i])*0.01
      
      summary_dist$max <- NA
      summary_dist$max[1] <- summary_dist$perc_comp[1]+summary_dist$se[1]+(axes_limits$ymax_dist[i]-axes_limits$ymin_dist[i])*0.01
      summary_dist$max[2] <- summary_dist$perc_comp[2]+summary_dist$se[2]+(axes_limits$ymax_dist[i]-axes_limits$ymin_dist[i])*0.01
      summary_dist$max[3] <- summary_dist$perc_comp[3]+summary_dist$se[3]+(axes_limits$ymax_dist[i]-axes_limits$ymin_dist[i])*0.01
      summary_dist$max[4] <- summary_dist$perc_comp[4]+summary_dist$se[4]+(axes_limits$ymax_dist[i]-axes_limits$ymin_dist[i])*0.01
      
      summary_dist$min <- NA
      summary_dist$min[1] <- summary_dist$perc_comp[1]-summary_dist$se[1]-(axes_limits$ymax_dist[i]-axes_limits$ymin_dist[i])*0.01
      summary_dist$min[2] <- summary_dist$perc_comp[2]-summary_dist$se[2]-(axes_limits$ymax_dist[i]-axes_limits$ymin_dist[i])*0.01
      summary_dist$min[3] <- summary_dist$perc_comp[3]-summary_dist$se[3]-(axes_limits$ymax_dist[i]-axes_limits$ymin_dist[i])*0.01
      summary_dist$min[4] <- summary_dist$perc_comp[4]-summary_dist$se[4]-(axes_limits$ymax_dist[i]-axes_limits$ymin_dist[i])*0.01
      
# adding text box with p-values

  # calculating an annotation position for the text box with p-values
    # y_max <- max(summary_isa$perc_comp)+max(summary_isa$se)
    # text_pos_isa <- y_max + 0.25 * (y_max)
    # axes_limits[i,2] <- min(summary_isa$perc_comp)-min(summary_isa$se) # adding this min & max into the axes limits dataframe
    # axes_limits[i,3] <- text_pos_isa
      text_pos_isa <- axes_limits$ymax_isa[i]
    
    # y_max <- max(summary_dist$perc_comp)+max(summary_dist$se)
    # text_pos_dist <- y_max + 0.25 * (y_max)
    # axes_limits[i,6] <- min(summary_dist$perc_comp)-min(summary_dist$se) # adding this min & max into the axes limits dataframe
    # axes_limits[i,7] <- text_pos_dist
      text_pos_dist <- axes_limits$ymax_dist[i]

fig_isa <-
  ggplot(data=summary_isa,mapping=aes(x=urb_cat_isa,y=perc_comp,col=dfe)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("grey","black")) +
  geom_point(position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), size = 3) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = perc_comp - se, ymax = perc_comp + se), 
                width = 0.2, 
                position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +
  labs(title = "Foliar PM",
       #x = "Site Type by %ISA",
       x = NULL,
       y = " "
       ) +
  theme_minimal() + 
  ylim(axes_limits$ymin_isa[i],axes_limits$ymax_isa[i]) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size=25)) +
  theme(legend.position="none") +
  annotate(geom = "text", x=0.5, y=text_pos_isa, size = 3, label=paste(
    "Distance from Edge: p",ifelse(foliar_PM_art_pvals$Edge_vs_Interior[i]>0.001,paste("=",foliar_PM_art_pvals$Edge_vs_Interior[i])," < 0.001"),
    "\nUrban vs. Rural: p",ifelse(foliar_PM_art_pvals$Urb_v_Rural_ISA[i]>0.001,paste("=",foliar_PM_art_pvals$Urb_v_Rural_ISA[i])," < 0.001"),
    "\nDfE X Urb. Cat.: p",ifelse(foliar_PM_art_pvals$Interaction_ISA[i]>0.001,paste("=",foliar_PM_art_pvals$Interaction_ISA[i])," < 0.001")),
           hjust=0,
           vjust=1) +
  geom_text(aes(label = letter, y = max), position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), hjust=0.5, vjust=0, size = 5, fontface = "bold") +
  geom_text(aes(label = LETTER, y = min), position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), hjust=0.5, vjust=1.5, size = 5, fontface = "bold") +
  guides(color = guide_legend(title = "Distance\nFrom Edge (m)")) +
  theme(panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        axis.line = element_line(colour = "black"),
        aspect.ratio = 1,
        axis.text.x = element_text(color = "black",size=15),
        axis.title.x = element_text(color = "black",size=15),
        axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black",size=15),
        axis.title.y = element_text(color = "black",size=15))

fig_dist <-
  ggplot(data=summary_dist,mapping=aes(x=urb_cat_dist,y=perc_comp,col=dfe)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("grey","black")) +
  geom_point(position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), size = 3) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = perc_comp - se, ymax = perc_comp + se), 
                width = 0.2, 
                position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +
  labs(#title = paste(element),
    title = " ",
       #x = "Site Type by Distance to Boston", 
       x = NULL,
       y = " "
    ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  ylim(axes_limits$ymin_dist[i],axes_limits$ymax_dist[i]) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size=25)) +
  theme(legend.position="none") +
  annotate(geom = "text", x=0.5, y=text_pos_dist, size = 3, label=paste(
    "Distance from Edge: p",ifelse(foliar_PM_art_pvals$Edge_vs_Interior[i]>0.001,paste("=",foliar_PM_art_pvals$Edge_vs_Interior[i])," < 0.001"),
    "\nUrban vs. Rural: p",ifelse(foliar_PM_art_pvals$Urb_v_Rural_Dist[i]>0.001,paste("=",foliar_PM_art_pvals$Urb_v_Rural_Dist[i])," < 0.001"),
    "\nDfE X Urb. Cat.: p",ifelse(foliar_PM_art_pvals$Interaction_Dist[i]>0.001,paste("=",foliar_PM_art_pvals$Interaction_Dist[i])," < 0.001")),
           hjust=0,
           vjust=1) +
  geom_text(aes(label = letter, y = max), position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), hjust=0.5, vjust=0, size = 5, fontface = "bold") +
  geom_text(aes(label = LETTER, y = min), position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), hjust=0.5, vjust=1.5, size = 5, fontface = "bold") +
  guides(color = guide_legend(title = "Distance\nFrom Edge (m)")) +
  theme(panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        axis.line = element_line(colour = "black"),
        aspect.ratio = 1,
        axis.text.x = element_text(color = "black",size=15),
        axis.title.x = element_text(color = "black",size=15),
        axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black",size=15),
        axis.title.y = element_text(color = "black",size=15))

figs <- plot_grid(fig_isa,fig_dist,labels=NULL,ncol=1,rel_widths=c(1,1))


foliar_element_urbcatxdfe_list_isa[[element]] <- fig_isa
foliar_element_urbcatxdfe_list_dist[[element]] <- fig_dist

foliar_element_urbcatxdfe_list[[element]] <- figs  # Store each figure in the list we made

# printing figure

ggsave(paste(element,"foliar_urbcatxdfe.png"), path = file.path(figures_dir,"Elements/Urban vs. Rural/Means/Foliar"), plot = figs, width = 4,
  height = 8, bg = "white")
}

```

#### Ambient Means
```{r}
element_names <- all_element_names

# making a list to store figures in
ambient_element_urbcatxdfe_list <- list()
ambient_element_urbcatxdfe_list_isa <- list()
ambient_element_urbcatxdfe_list_dist <- list()

# loop to make categorical figures  by % ISA

for (i in c(1:26)) {
  
element <- element_names[i] 

summary_isa <- cbind(aggregate(AmbientPMCompxUNESites[[element]],
                           list(AmbientPMCompxUNESites$dfe,AmbientPMCompxUNESites$urb_cat_isa),FUN=mean),
                 aggregate(AmbientPMCompxUNESites[[element]],
                           list(AmbientPMCompxUNESites$dfe,AmbientPMCompxUNESites$urb_cat_isa),FUN=stderr))
summary_isa <- summary_isa[,c(1:3,6)]
colnames(summary_isa) <- c("dfe","urb_cat_isa","perc_comp","se")

summary_dist <- cbind(aggregate(AmbientPMCompxUNESites[[element]],
                           list(AmbientPMCompxUNESites$dfe,AmbientPMCompxUNESites$urb_cat_dist),FUN=mean),
                 aggregate(AmbientPMCompxUNESites[[element]],
                           list(AmbientPMCompxUNESites$dfe,AmbientPMCompxUNESites$urb_cat_dist),FUN=stderr))
summary_dist <- summary_dist[,c(1:3,6)]
colnames(summary_dist) <- c("dfe","urb_cat_dist","perc_comp","se")

  # add in the significance letter associated with each group
      summary_isa$letter <- NA
      summary_isa$letter[1] <- ambient_PM_art_pairwise_isa$Rural0[ambient_PM_art_pairwise_isa$Element==element]
      summary_isa$letter[2] <- ambient_PM_art_pairwise_isa$Rural90[ambient_PM_art_pairwise_isa$Element==element]
      summary_isa$letter[3] <- ambient_PM_art_pairwise_isa$RuralOpen[ambient_PM_art_pairwise_isa$Element==element]
      summary_isa$letter[4] <- ambient_PM_art_pairwise_isa$Urban0[ambient_PM_art_pairwise_isa$Element==element]
      summary_isa$letter[5] <- ambient_PM_art_pairwise_isa$Urban90[ambient_PM_art_pairwise_isa$Element==element]
      summary_isa$letter[6] <- ambient_PM_art_pairwise_isa$UrbanOpen[ambient_PM_art_pairwise_isa$Element==element]
      
      summary_isa$LETTER <- NA
      summary_isa$LETTER[1] <- allPM_ruraledge_isa_art_pairwise$`Ambient`[allPM_ruraledge_isa_art_pairwise$Element==element]
      summary_isa$LETTER[2] <- allPM_ruralinterior_isa_art_pairwise$`Ambient`[allPM_ruralinterior_isa_art_pairwise$Element==element]
      summary_isa$LETTER[3] <- " "
      summary_isa$LETTER[4] <- allPM_urbanedge_isa_art_pairwise$`Ambient`[allPM_urbanedge_isa_art_pairwise$Element==element]
      summary_isa$LETTER[5] <- allPM_urbaninterior_isa_art_pairwise$`Ambient`[allPM_urbaninterior_isa_art_pairwise$Element==element]
      summary_isa$LETTER[6] <- " "
      
      summary_dist$letter <- NA
      summary_dist$letter[1] <- ambient_PM_art_pairwise_dist$Rural0[ambient_PM_art_pairwise_dist$Element==element]
      summary_dist$letter[2] <- ambient_PM_art_pairwise_dist$Rural90[ambient_PM_art_pairwise_dist$Element==element]
      summary_dist$letter[3] <- ambient_PM_art_pairwise_dist$RuralOpen[ambient_PM_art_pairwise_dist$Element==element]
      summary_dist$letter[4] <- ambient_PM_art_pairwise_dist$Urban0[ambient_PM_art_pairwise_dist$Element==element]
      summary_dist$letter[5] <- ambient_PM_art_pairwise_dist$Urban90[ambient_PM_art_pairwise_dist$Element==element]
      summary_dist$letter[6] <- ambient_PM_art_pairwise_dist$UrbanOpen[ambient_PM_art_pairwise_dist$Element==element]
      
      summary_dist$LETTER <- NA
      summary_dist$LETTER[1] <- allPM_ruraledge_dist_art_pairwise$`Ambient`[allPM_ruraledge_dist_art_pairwise$Element==element]
      summary_dist$LETTER[2] <- allPM_ruralinterior_dist_art_pairwise$`Ambient`[allPM_ruralinterior_dist_art_pairwise$Element==element]
      summary_dist$LETTER[3] <- " "
      summary_dist$LETTER[4] <- allPM_urbanedge_dist_art_pairwise$`Ambient`[allPM_urbanedge_dist_art_pairwise$Element==element]
      summary_dist$LETTER[5] <- allPM_urbaninterior_dist_art_pairwise$`Ambient`[allPM_urbaninterior_dist_art_pairwise$Element==element]
      summary_dist$LETTER[6] <- " "
      
  # add in maximum for y axis in each group (for positioning letter)
      summary_isa$max <- NA
      summary_isa$max[1] <- summary_isa$perc_comp[1]+summary_isa$se[1]+(axes_limits$ymax_isa[i]-axes_limits$ymin_isa[i])*0.01
      summary_isa$max[2] <- summary_isa$perc_comp[2]+summary_isa$se[2]+(axes_limits$ymax_isa[i]-axes_limits$ymin_isa[i])*0.01
      summary_isa$max[3] <- summary_isa$perc_comp[3]+summary_isa$se[3]+(axes_limits$ymax_isa[i]-axes_limits$ymin_isa[i])*0.01
      summary_isa$max[4] <- summary_isa$perc_comp[4]+summary_isa$se[4]+(axes_limits$ymax_isa[i]-axes_limits$ymin_isa[i])*0.01
      summary_isa$max[5] <- summary_isa$perc_comp[5]+summary_isa$se[5]+(axes_limits$ymax_isa[i]-axes_limits$ymin_isa[i])*0.01
      summary_isa$max[6] <- summary_isa$perc_comp[6]+summary_isa$se[6]+(axes_limits$ymax_isa[i]-axes_limits$ymin_isa[i])*0.01
      
      summary_isa$min <- NA
      summary_isa$min[1] <- summary_isa$perc_comp[1]-summary_isa$se[1]-(axes_limits$ymax_isa[i]-axes_limits$ymin_isa[i])*0.01
      summary_isa$min[2] <- summary_isa$perc_comp[2]-summary_isa$se[2]-(axes_limits$ymax_isa[i]-axes_limits$ymin_isa[i])*0.01
      summary_isa$min[3] <- summary_isa$perc_comp[3]-summary_isa$se[3]-(axes_limits$ymax_isa[i]-axes_limits$ymin_isa[i])*0.01
      summary_isa$min[4] <- summary_isa$perc_comp[4]-summary_isa$se[4]-(axes_limits$ymax_isa[i]-axes_limits$ymin_isa[i])*0.01
      summary_isa$min[5] <- summary_isa$perc_comp[5]-summary_isa$se[5]-(axes_limits$ymax_isa[i]-axes_limits$ymin_isa[i])*0.01
      summary_isa$min[6] <- summary_isa$perc_comp[6]-summary_isa$se[6]-(axes_limits$ymax_isa[i]-axes_limits$ymin_isa[i])*0.01
      
      summary_dist$max <- NA
      summary_dist$max[1] <- summary_dist$perc_comp[1]+summary_dist$se[1]+(axes_limits$ymax_dist[i]-axes_limits$ymin_dist[i])*0.01
      summary_dist$max[2] <- summary_dist$perc_comp[2]+summary_dist$se[2]+(axes_limits$ymax_dist[i]-axes_limits$ymin_dist[i])*0.01
      summary_dist$max[3] <- summary_dist$perc_comp[3]+summary_dist$se[3]+(axes_limits$ymax_dist[i]-axes_limits$ymin_dist[i])*0.01
      summary_dist$max[4] <- summary_dist$perc_comp[4]+summary_dist$se[4]+(axes_limits$ymax_dist[i]-axes_limits$ymin_dist[i])*0.01
      summary_dist$max[5] <- summary_dist$perc_comp[5]+summary_dist$se[5]+(axes_limits$ymax_dist[i]-axes_limits$ymin_dist[i])*0.01
      summary_dist$max[6] <- summary_dist$perc_comp[6]+summary_dist$se[6]+(axes_limits$ymax_dist[i]-axes_limits$ymin_dist[i])*0.01
      
      summary_dist$min <- NA
      summary_dist$min[1] <- summary_dist$perc_comp[1]-summary_dist$se[1]-(axes_limits$ymax_dist[i]-axes_limits$ymin_dist[i])*0.01
      summary_dist$min[2] <- summary_dist$perc_comp[2]-summary_dist$se[2]-(axes_limits$ymax_dist[i]-axes_limits$ymin_dist[i])*0.01
      summary_dist$min[3] <- summary_dist$perc_comp[3]-summary_dist$se[3]-(axes_limits$ymax_dist[i]-axes_limits$ymin_dist[i])*0.01
      summary_dist$min[4] <- summary_dist$perc_comp[4]-summary_dist$se[4]-(axes_limits$ymax_dist[i]-axes_limits$ymin_dist[i])*0.01
      summary_dist$min[5] <- summary_dist$perc_comp[5]-summary_dist$se[5]-(axes_limits$ymax_dist[i]-axes_limits$ymin_dist[i])*0.01
      summary_dist$min[6] <- summary_dist$perc_comp[6]-summary_dist$se[6]-(axes_limits$ymax_dist[i]-axes_limits$ymin_dist[i])*0.01
      
      
# adding text box with p-values

  # calculating an annotation position for the text box with p-values
    # y_max <- max(summary_isa$perc_comp)+max(summary_isa$se)
    # text_pos_isa <- y_max + 0.25 * (y_max)
    # axes_limits[i,4] <- min(summary_isa$perc_comp)-min(summary_isa$se) # adding this min & max into the axes limits dataframe
    # axes_limits[i,5] <- text_pos_isa
      text_pos_isa <- axes_limits$ymax_isa[i]
    
    # y_max <- max(summary_dist$perc_comp)+max(summary_dist$se)
```
