```{r}
    # axes_limits[i,9] <- text_pos_dist
      text_pos_dist <- axes_limits$ymax_dist[i]

fig_isa <-
  ggplot(data=summary_isa,mapping=aes(x=urb_cat_isa,y=perc_comp,col=dfe)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("grey","black","lightblue")) +
  geom_point(position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), size = 3) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = perc_comp - se, ymax = perc_comp + se), 
                width = 0.2, 
                position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +
  labs(title = "Ambient PM",
       #x = "Site Type by %ISA",
       x=NULL,
       y = paste("%",element)) +
  theme_minimal() +
  ylim(axes_limits$ymin_isa[i],axes_limits$ymax_isa[i]) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size=25)) +
  theme(legend.position="none") +
  geom_text(aes(label = letter, y = max), position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), hjust=0.5, vjust=0, size = 5, fontface = "bold") +
  geom_text(aes(label = LETTER, y = min), position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), hjust=0.5, vjust=1.5, size = 5, fontface = "bold") +
  annotate(geom = "text", x=0.5, y=text_pos_isa, size = 3, label=paste(
    "Distance from Edge: p",ifelse(ambient_PM_art_pvals$Edge_vs_Interior[i]>0.001,paste("=",ambient_PM_art_pvals$Edge_vs_Interior[i])," < 0.001"),
    "\nUrban vs. Rural: p",ifelse(ambient_PM_art_pvals$Urb_v_Rural_ISA[i]>0.001,paste("=",ambient_PM_art_pvals$Urb_v_Rural_ISA[i])," < 0.001"),
    "\nDfE X Urb. Cat.: p",ifelse(ambient_PM_art_pvals$Interaction_ISA[i]>0.001,paste("=",ambient_PM_art_pvals$Interaction_ISA[i])," < 0.001")),
           hjust=0,
           vjust=1) +
  guides(color = guide_legend(title = "Distance\nFrom Edge (m)")) +
  theme(panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        axis.line = element_line(colour = "black"),
        aspect.ratio = 1,
        axis.text.x = element_text(color = "black",size=15),
        axis.title.x = element_text(color = "black",size=15),
        axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black",size=15),
        axis.title.y = element_text(color = "black",size=15))

fig_dist <-
  ggplot(data=summary_dist,mapping=aes(x=urb_cat_dist,y=perc_comp,col=dfe)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("grey","black","lightblue")) +
  geom_point(position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), size = 3) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = perc_comp - se, ymax = perc_comp + se), 
                width = 0.2, 
                position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +
  labs(#title = paste(element),
       title = " ",
       #x = "Site Type by Distance to Boston",
       x = NULL,
       y = paste("%",element),
       y = NULL
       ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  ylim(axes_limits$ymin_dist[i],axes_limits$ymax_dist[i]) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size=25)) +
  theme(legend.position="none") +
  geom_text(aes(label = letter, y = max), position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), hjust=0.5, vjust=0, size = 5, fontface = "bold") +
  geom_text(aes(label = LETTER, y = min), position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), hjust=0.5, vjust=1.5, size = 5, fontface = "bold") +
    annotate(geom = "text", x=0.5, y=text_pos_dist, size = 3, label=paste(
    "Distance from Edge: p",ifelse(ambient_PM_art_pvals$Edge_vs_Interior[i]>0.001,paste("=",ambient_PM_art_pvals$Edge_vs_Interior[i])," < 0.001"),
    "\nUrban vs. Rural: p",ifelse(ambient_PM_art_pvals$Urb_v_Rural_Dist[i]>0.001,paste("=",ambient_PM_art_pvals$Urb_v_Rural_Dist[i])," < 0.001"),
    "\nDfE X Urb. Cat.: p",ifelse(ambient_PM_art_pvals$Interaction_Dist[i]>0.001,paste("=",ambient_PM_art_pvals$Interaction_Dist[i])," < 0.001")),
           hjust=0,
           vjust=1) +
  guides(color = guide_legend(title = "Distance\nFrom Edge (m)")) +
  theme(panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        axis.line = element_line(colour = "black"),
        aspect.ratio = 1,
        axis.text.x = element_text(color = "black",size=15),
        axis.title.x = element_text(color = "black",size=15),
        axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black",size=15),
        axis.title.y = element_text(color = "black",size=15))

figs <- plot_grid(fig_isa,fig_dist,labels=NULL,ncol=1,rel_widths=c(1,1))

ambient_element_urbcatxdfe_list[[element]] <- figs  # Store each figure in the list we made
ambient_element_urbcatxdfe_list_isa[[element]] <- fig_isa
ambient_element_urbcatxdfe_list_dist[[element]] <- fig_dist

# printing figure


ggsave(paste(element,"ambient_urbcatxdfe.png"), path = file.path(figures_dir,"Elements/Urban vs. Rural/Means/Ambient"), plot = figs, width = 4,
  height = 8, bg = "white")
}
```

#### Comparing Ambient & Foliar Means
```{r}

# making the figure            
  # creating a list for figures
  all_element_cat_list <- list()
  all_element_cat_list_nocap <- list()
  
  # loop to make categorical figures
  
  for (i in c(1:26)) {
    
  element <- all_element_names[i]
  
  summary <- cbind(aggregate(AllCompxUNESites_NOopen[element],
                             list(AllCompxUNESites_NOopen$particle_source),FUN=mean),
                   aggregate(AllCompxUNESites_NOopen[element],
                             list(AllCompxUNESites_NOopen$particle_source),FUN=stderr))
  summary <- summary[,c(1:2,4)]
  colnames(summary) <- c("particle_source","perc_comp","se")
  
  
    # add in maximum for y axis in each group (for positioning letter)
        summary$max <- NA
        
        for (j in c(1:2)) {
        summary$max[j] <- summary$perc_comp[j]+summary$se[j]+(max(summary$perc_comp))*0.01
        }
        
    # add in significance letter associated with each group
        
        summary$letter <- NA
    
        summary$letter[1] <- allPM_art_pairwise[i,3]
        summary$letter[2] <- allPM_art_pairwise[i,4]
          
  
  fig <- ggplot(data=summary, aes(x=particle_source, y=perc_comp, col=particle_source)) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("#B7C9E2", "darkgreen")) +
    geom_point(position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), size = 3) +
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = perc_comp - se, ymax = perc_comp + se),
                  width = 0.2,
                  position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +
    labs(title = "",
         x = "", 
         y = paste("%", element)) +
    theme_minimal() + 
    annotate(geom = "text", x = -Inf, y = Inf, hjust = -0.1,
    vjust = 1.1, size = 3, 
             label=paste("ART ANOVA: p",
                         ifelse(allPM_art_pairwise$`Ambient - Foliar`[i]>0.001,
                                paste("=",allPM_art_pairwise$`Ambient - Foliar`[i]),
                                " < 0.001"),
                          "\nKruskal-Wallis test: p",
                         ifelse(allPM_kw_pairwise$`Ambient - Foliar`[i]>0.001,
                                paste("=",allPM_kw_pairwise$`Ambient - Foliar`[i]),
                                " < 0.001"))) +
    geom_text(data = summary,
      aes(label = letter, y = max), position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), hjust=0.5, vjust=0, size = 5, fontface = "bold") +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(size=25),
          legend.position = "right",
          panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
          panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
          axis.line = element_line(colour = "black"),
          aspect.ratio = 1,
          axis.text.x = element_text(color = "black", size=15),
          axis.title.x = element_text(color = "black", size=15),
          axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", size=15),
          axis.title.y = element_text(color = "black", size=15)) +
    theme(legend.position="none")

# creating a version without the text annotation to add to a multipanel figure
  fig_nocap <- ggplot(data=summary, aes(x=particle_source, y=perc_comp, col=particle_source)) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("#B7C9E2", "darkgreen")) +
    geom_point(position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), size = 3) +
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = perc_comp - se, ymax = perc_comp + se),
                  width = 0.2,
                  position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +
    labs(title = "",
         x = "", 
         y = paste("%", element)) +
    theme_minimal() + 
    geom_text(data = summary,
      aes(label = letter, y = max), position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), hjust=0.5, vjust=0, size = 3, fontface = "bold") +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(size=25),
          legend.position = "right",
          panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
          panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
          axis.line = element_line(colour = "black"),
          aspect.ratio = 1,
          axis.text.x = element_text(color = "black", size=10),
          axis.title.x = element_text(color = "black", size=15),
          axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", size=10),
          axis.title.y = element_text(color = "black", size=10)) +
    theme(legend.position="none")
  
  all_element_cat_list[[element]] <- fig  # Store each figure in the list we made
  all_element_cat_list_nocap[[element]] <- fig_nocap
  
  # printing figure
  
  ggsave(paste(element,"all_cat.png"), plot = fig, path = file.path(figures_dir,"Elements/Ambient vs. Foliar/Means"), width = 6,
    height = 6, bg = "white")
  }

```

#### Combining Them
```{r}

for (i in c(1:26)) {
  element <- element_names[i]
  
  # putting both the ambient + foliar figures by distance to Boston together
    dist_fig <- plot_grid(ambient_element_urbcatxdfe_list_dist[[element]],
                     foliar_element_urbcatxdfe_list_dist[[element]],
                      labels=NULL,ncol=2)
    dist_fig <- plot_grid(dist_fig,
                          ggdraw() + draw_label(
                            label = "by Distance to Boston",
                            size = 12,
                            x = 0.5,
                            hjust = 0.5
                            ),
                          ncol = 1,
                          rel_heights = c(1, 0.08)
                          )
    
    # putting both the ambient + foliar figures by %ISA together
    isa_fig <- plot_grid(ambient_element_urbcatxdfe_list_isa[[element]],
                     foliar_element_urbcatxdfe_list_isa[[element]],
                      labels=NULL,ncol=2)
    isa_fig <- plot_grid(isa_fig,
                          ggdraw() + draw_label(
                            "by %ISA",
                            size = 12,
                            x = 0.5,
                            hjust = 0.5
                            ),
                          ncol = 1,
                          rel_heights = c(1, 0.08))
    
 # putting both the dist + ISA figures together + adding legend
    
  fig <- plot_grid(isa_fig,
                   dist_fig,
                   ncol = 1,
                   labels=NULL)
 
  fig <- plot_grid(fig, 
                   legendopen,
                   rel_widths = c(1, 0.3),
                   labels=NULL,ncol=2)
  
  # adding the ambient vs foliar figure
  
  Avf_fig <- all_element_cat_list_nocap[[element]]
  
  fig <- ggdraw(fig) + 
    draw_plot(Avf_fig,
            x = 0.67,   # horizontal position (0 = left, 1 = right)
            y = 0.01,  # vertical position (0 = bottom, 1 = top)
            width = 0.35,
            height = 0.35)
  
  
  
  # making labels for the Ambient v Foliar p-values to append. i'm using the ART values because they were the same as the K-W values
  
  label <- paste0("Ambient vs. Foliar: p ",
                      ifelse(allPM_art_pairwise$`Ambient - Foliar`[allPM_art_pairwise$Element==element]>0.001,
                             paste(" =",allPM_art_pairwise$`Ambient - Foliar`[allPM_art_pairwise$Element==element]),
                             " < 0.001"))
  
  # putting them all together
  
  fig <- ggdraw(fig) +
    draw_label(label,
    x = 0.96, y = 0.32,
    hjust = 1,
    size = 9)
    
ggsave(paste(element,"_urbcatxdfe.png"), path = file.path(figures_dir,"Elements/Urban vs. Rural/Means"), plot = fig, width = 9,
  height = 8, bg = "white")
}

```
### Medians
#### Foliar
```{r}
# defining list of element names
element_names <- all_element_names

# creating a list for figures
foliar_element_urbcatxdfe_medians_list <- list()
foliar_element_urbcatxdfe_medians_list_isa <- list()
foliar_element_urbcatxdfe_medians_list_dist <- list()
foliar_element_urbcatxdfe_medians_list_isa_pub <- list()

# loop to make categorical figures 

for (i in c(1:26)) {
  
element <- element_names[i] 

# summarize the element by urbanization and distance from edge
    summary_isa <- cbind(aggregate(FoliarPMCompxUNESites[[element]],list(FoliarPMCompxUNESites$urb_cat_isa,FoliarPMCompxUNESites$dfe),FUN=ci95_median_boot))
    summary_isa <- as.matrix(summary_isa)
    colnames(summary_isa) <- c("urb_cat_isa","dfe","perc_comp","lower","upper")
    summary_isa <- as.data.frame(summary_isa)
    summary_isa$perc_comp <- as.numeric(summary_isa$perc_comp)
    summary_isa$lower     <- as.numeric(summary_isa$lower)
    summary_isa$upper     <- as.numeric(summary_isa$upper)

    summary_dist <- cbind(aggregate(FoliarPMCompxUNESites[[element]],list(FoliarPMCompxUNESites$urb_cat_dist,FoliarPMCompxUNESites$dfe),FUN=ci95_median_boot))
    summary_dist <- as.matrix(summary_dist)
    colnames(summary_dist) <- c("urb_cat_dist","dfe","perc_comp","lower","upper")
    summary_dist <- as.data.frame(summary_dist)
    summary_dist$perc_comp <- as.numeric(summary_dist$perc_comp)
    summary_dist$lower     <- as.numeric(summary_dist$lower)
    summary_dist$upper     <- as.numeric(summary_dist$upper)
 
  # add in the significance letter associated with each group
      summary_isa$letter <- NA
      summary_isa$letter[1] <- foliar_PM_art_pairwise_isa$Rural0[foliar_PM_art_pairwise_isa$Element==element]
      summary_isa$letter[2] <- foliar_PM_art_pairwise_isa$Urban0[foliar_PM_art_pairwise_isa$Element==element]
      summary_isa$letter[3] <- foliar_PM_art_pairwise_isa$Rural90[foliar_PM_art_pairwise_isa$Element==element]
      summary_isa$letter[4] <- foliar_PM_art_pairwise_isa$Urban90[foliar_PM_art_pairwise_isa$Element==element]
      
      summary_isa$LETTER <- NA
      summary_isa$LETTER[1] <- allPM_ruraledge_isa_art_pairwise$`Foliar`[allPM_ruraledge_isa_art_pairwise$Element==element]
      summary_isa$LETTER[2] <- allPM_urbanedge_isa_art_pairwise$`Foliar`[allPM_urbanedge_isa_art_pairwise$Element==element]
      summary_isa$LETTER[3] <- allPM_ruralinterior_isa_art_pairwise$`Foliar`[allPM_ruralinterior_isa_art_pairwise$Element==element]
      summary_isa$LETTER[4] <- allPM_urbaninterior_isa_art_pairwise$`Foliar`[allPM_urbaninterior_isa_art_pairwise$Element==element]
      
      summary_dist$letter <- NA
      summary_dist$letter[1] <- foliar_PM_art_pairwise_dist$Rural0[foliar_PM_art_pairwise_dist$Element==element]
      summary_dist$letter[2] <- foliar_PM_art_pairwise_dist$Urban0[foliar_PM_art_pairwise_dist$Element==element]
      summary_dist$letter[3] <- foliar_PM_art_pairwise_dist$Rural90[foliar_PM_art_pairwise_dist$Element==element]
      summary_dist$letter[4] <- foliar_PM_art_pairwise_dist$Urban90[foliar_PM_art_pairwise_dist$Element==element]
      
      summary_dist$LETTER <- NA
      summary_dist$LETTER[1] <- allPM_ruraledge_dist_art_pairwise$`Foliar`[allPM_ruraledge_dist_art_pairwise$Element==element]
      summary_dist$LETTER[2] <- allPM_urbanedge_dist_art_pairwise$`Foliar`[allPM_urbanedge_dist_art_pairwise$Element==element]
      summary_dist$LETTER[3] <- allPM_ruralinterior_dist_art_pairwise$`Foliar`[allPM_ruralinterior_dist_art_pairwise$Element==element]
      summary_dist$LETTER[4] <- allPM_urbaninterior_dist_art_pairwise$`Foliar`[allPM_urbaninterior_dist_art_pairwise$Element==element]

# figures
      
  dodge <- position_dodge(width = 0.3)

    fig_isa <- ggplot(data = summary_isa,
                      mapping = aes(x = urb_cat_isa,
                                    y = perc_comp,
                                    col = dfe,
                                    group = dfe)) +   # ensures consistent dodging
      scale_color_manual(values = c("grey","black")) +
      
        # y limits 
        ylim(axes_limits_medians$ymin_isa[i],axes_limits_medians$ymax_isa[i]) +
      
        # Points
        geom_point(position = dodge, size = 3) +
        
        # Error bars
        geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper),
                      width = 0.2,
                      position = dodge) +
        
        # Significance letters
        geom_text(aes(label = letter, y = upper),
                  position = dodge,
                  hjust = 0.5,
                  vjust = -0.3,
                  size = 5,
                  fontface = "bold") +
        geom_text(aes(label = LETTER, y = lower), 
                  position = dodge, 
                  hjust=0.5, 
                  vjust = 1.3, 
                  size = 5, 
                  fontface = "bold") +
  
        
        # Annotate text for p-values
        annotate(geom = "text", x = 0.5, y = Inf, size = 3,
                 label = paste(
                   "Distance from Edge: p", ifelse(foliar_PM_art_pvals$Edge_vs_Interior[i] > 0.001,
                                                  paste("=", foliar_PM_art_pvals$Edge_vs_Interior[i]),
                                                  " < 0.001"),
                   "\nUrban vs. Rural: p", ifelse(foliar_PM_art_pvals$Urb_v_Rural_ISA[i] > 0.001,
                                                  paste("=", foliar_PM_art_pvals$Urb_v_Rural_ISA[i]),
                                                  " < 0.001"),
                   "\nDfE X Urb. Cat.: p", ifelse(foliar_PM_art_pvals$Interaction_ISA[i] > 0.001,
                                                  paste("=", foliar_PM_art_pvals$Interaction_ISA[i]),
                                                  " < 0.001")),
                 hjust = 0, vjust = 1) +
        
        # Labels and theme
        labs(title = "Foliar PM", x = NULL, y = " ") +
        theme_minimal() +
        theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 25),
              legend.position = "none",
              panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
              panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
              axis.line = element_line(colour = "black"),
              aspect.ratio = 1,
              axis.text.x = element_text(color = "black", size = 15),
              axis.title.x = element_text(color = "black", size = 15),
              axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 15),
              axis.title.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 15)) 
          
    fig_dist <- ggplot(data = summary_dist,
                      mapping = aes(x = urb_cat_dist,
                                    y = perc_comp,
                                    col = dfe,
                                    group = dfe)) +   # ensures consistent dodging
      scale_color_manual(values = c("grey","black")) +
      
        # Points
        geom_point(position = dodge, size = 3) +
      
        # y limits 
        ylim(axes_limits_medians$ymin_dist[i],axes_limits_medians$ymax_dist[i]) +
        
        # Error bars
        geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper),
                      width = 0.2,
                      position = dodge) +
        
        # Significance letters
        geom_text(aes(label = letter, y = upper),
                  position = dodge,
                  hjust = 0.5,
                  vjust = -0.3,
                  size = 5,
                  fontface = "bold") +
        geom_text(aes(label = LETTER, y = lower), 
                  position = dodge, 
                  hjust=0.5, 
                  vjust=1.3, 
                  size = 5, 
                  fontface = "bold") +
        
        # Annotate text for p-values
        annotate(geom = "text", x = 0.5, y = Inf, size = 3,
                 label = paste(
                   "Distance from Edge: p", ifelse(foliar_PM_art_pvals$Edge_vs_Interior[i] > 0.001,
                                                  paste("=", foliar_PM_art_pvals$Edge_vs_Interior[i]),
                                                  " < 0.001"),
                   "\nUrban vs. Rural: p", ifelse(foliar_PM_art_pvals$Urb_v_Rural_ISA[i] > 0.001,
                                                  paste("=", foliar_PM_art_pvals$Urb_v_Rural_Dist[i]),
                                                  " < 0.001"),
                   "\nDfE X Urb. Cat.: p", ifelse(foliar_PM_art_pvals$Interaction_ISA[i] > 0.001,
                                                  paste("=", foliar_PM_art_pvals$Interaction_Dist[i]),
                                                  " < 0.001")),
                 hjust = 0, vjust = 1) +
        
        # Labels and theme
        labs(title = "Foliar PM", x = NULL, y = " ") +
        theme_minimal() +
        theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 25),
              legend.position = "none",
              panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
              panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
              axis.line = element_line(colour = "black"),
              aspect.ratio = 1,
              axis.text.x = element_text(color = "black", size = 15),
              axis.title.x = element_text(color = "black", size = 15),
              axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 15),
              axis.title.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 15)) 
    
    fig_pub <- ggplot(data = summary_isa,
                      mapping = aes(x = urb_cat_isa,
                                    y = perc_comp,
                                    col = dfe,
                                    group = dfe)) +   # ensures consistent dodging
      scale_color_manual(values = c("grey","black")) +
      
        # Points
        geom_point(position = dodge, size = 3) +
      
        # y limits 
        ylim(axes_limits_medians$ymin_isa[i],axes_limits_medians$ymax_isa[i]) +
        
        # Error bars
        geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper),
                      width = 0.2,
                      position = dodge) +
        
        # Significance letters
        geom_text(aes(label = letter, y = upper),
                  position = dodge,
                  hjust = 0.5,
                  vjust = -0.3,
                  size = 5,
                  fontface = "bold") +
        geom_text(aes(label = LETTER, y = lower), 
                  position = dodge, 
                  hjust=0.5, 
                  vjust=1.3, 
                  size = 5, 
                  fontface = "bold") +
        
        # Annotate text for p-values
        annotate(geom = "text", x = 0.5, y = Inf, size = 3,
                 label = paste(
                   "Distance from Edge: p", ifelse(foliar_PM_art_pvals$Edge_vs_Interior[i] > 0.001,
                                                  paste("=", foliar_PM_art_pvals$Edge_vs_Interior[i]),
                                                  " < 0.001"),
                   "\nUrban vs. Rural: p", ifelse(foliar_PM_art_pvals$Urb_v_Rural_ISA[i] > 0.001,
                                                  paste("=", foliar_PM_art_pvals$Urb_v_Rural_ISA[i]),
                                                  " < 0.001"),
                   "\nDfE X Urb. Cat.: p", ifelse(foliar_PM_art_pvals$Interaction_ISA[i] > 0.001,
                                                  paste("=", foliar_PM_art_pvals$Interaction_ISA[i]),
                                                  " < 0.001")),
                 hjust = 0, vjust = 1) +
        
        # Labels and theme
        labs(title = "Foliar PM", x = NULL, 
             # y = paste("% ",element),
             y = " "
             ) +
        theme_minimal() +
        theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 18, hjust = 0.5),
              legend.position = "none",
              panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
              panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
              axis.line = element_line(colour = "black"),
              aspect.ratio = 1,
              axis.text.x = element_text(color = "black", size = 15),
              axis.title.x = element_text(color = "black", size = 15),
              axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 15),
              axis.title.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 15)) 
    
      
figs <- plot_grid(fig_isa,fig_dist,labels=NULL,ncol=1,rel_widths=c(1,1))


foliar_element_urbcatxdfe_medians_list_isa[[element]] <- fig_isa
foliar_element_urbcatxdfe_medians_list_dist[[element]] <- fig_dist

foliar_element_urbcatxdfe_medians_list[[element]] <- figs  # Store each figure in the list we made

# printing figure

  height = 8, bg = "white")
}
```

#### Ambient
```{r}
# defining list of element names
element_names <- all_element_names

ambient_element_urbcatxdfe_medians_list <- list()
ambient_element_urbcatxdfe_medians_list_isa <- list()
ambient_element_urbcatxdfe_medians_list_dist <- list()

# loop to make categorical figures 

for (i in c(1:26)) {
  
element <- element_names[i] 

# summarize the element by urbanization and distance from edge
    summary_isa <- cbind(aggregate(AmbientPMCompxUNESites[[element]],list(AmbientPMCompxUNESites$urb_cat_isa,AmbientPMCompxUNESites$dfe),FUN=ci95_median_boot))
    summary_isa <- as.matrix(summary_isa)

    summary_isa$lower     <- as.numeric(summary_isa$lower)
    summary_isa$upper     <- as.numeric(summary_isa$upper)

    summary_dist <- as.data.frame(summary_dist)
    summary_dist$perc_comp <- as.numeric(summary_dist$perc_comp)
    summary_dist$lower     <- as.numeric(summary_dist$lower)
    summary_dist$upper     <- as.numeric(summary_dist$upper)
 
  # add in the significance letter associated with each group

      summary_isa$LETTER[2] <- allPM_urbanedge_isa_art_pairwise$`Ambient`[allPM_urbanedge_isa_art_pairwise$Element==element]
      summary_isa$LETTER[3] <- allPM_ruralinterior_isa_art_pairwise$`Ambient`[allPM_ruralinterior_isa_art_pairwise$Element==element]
      summary_isa$LETTER[4] <- allPM_urbaninterior_isa_art_pairwise$`Ambient`[allPM_urbaninterior_isa_art_pairwise$Element==element]
      
      summary_dist$letter <- NA
      summary_dist$letter[1] <- ambient_PM_art_pairwise_dist$Rural0[ambient_PM_art_pairwise_dist$Element==element]
      summary_dist$letter[2] <- ambient_PM_art_pairwise_dist$Urban0[ambient_PM_art_pairwise_dist$Element==element]
      summary_dist$letter[3] <- ambient_PM_art_pairwise_dist$Rural90[ambient_PM_art_pairwise_dist$Element==element]
      summary_dist$letter[4] <- ambient_PM_art_pairwise_dist$Urban90[ambient_PM_art_pairwise_dist$Element==element]
      summary_dist$letter[5] <- ambient_PM_art_pairwise_dist$RuralOpen[ambient_PM_art_pairwise_dist$Element==element]
      summary_dist$letter[6] <- ambient_PM_art_pairwise_dist$UrbanOpen[ambient_PM_art_pairwise_dist$Element==element]
      
      summary_dist$LETTER <- NA
      summary_dist$LETTER[1] <- allPM_ruraledge_dist_art_pairwise$`Ambient`[allPM_ruraledge_dist_art_pairwise$Element==element]
      summary_dist$LETTER[2] <- allPM_urbanedge_dist_art_pairwise$`Ambient`[allPM_urbanedge_dist_art_pairwise$Element==element]
      summary_dist$LETTER[3] <- allPM_ruralinterior_dist_art_pairwise$`Ambient`[allPM_ruralinterior_dist_art_pairwise$Element==element]
      summary_dist$LETTER[4] <- allPM_urbaninterior_dist_art_pairwise$`Ambient`[allPM_urbaninterior_dist_art_pairwise$Element==element]
      
# figures
      
  dodge <- position_dodge(width = 0.3)

    fig_isa <- ggplot(data = summary_isa,
                      mapping = aes(x = urb_cat_isa,
                                    y = perc_comp,
                                    col = dfe,
                                    group = dfe)) +   # ensures consistent dodging
      scale_color_manual(values = c("grey","black","lightblue")) +
      
        # Points
        geom_point(position = dodge, size = 3) +
      
        # y limits

        # Error bars

                      position = dodge) +
        
        # Significance letters

                position = dodge,
                  hjust = 0.5,

                  size = 5,
                  fontface = "bold") +
        geom_text(aes(label = LETTER, y = lower),

        # Annotate text for p-values
         annotate(geom = "text", x = 0.5, y = Inf, size = 3,
                 label = paste(

                                                  " < 0.001"),

                                                  paste("=", ambient_PM_art_pvals$Urb_v_Rural_ISA[i]),
                                                  " < 0.001"),
                   "\nDfE X Urb. Cat.: p", ifelse(ambient_PM_art_pvals$Interaction_ISA[i] > 0.001,

                                                  " < 0.001")),
                 hjust = 0, vjust = 1) +
        
        # Labels and theme
        labs(title = "Ambient PM", x = NULL, y = paste("%",element)) +
        theme_minimal() +
        theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 25),
              legend.position = "none",

              axis.title.x = element_text(color = "black", size = 15),
              axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 15),

        guides(color = guide_legend(title = "Distance\nFrom Edge (m)"))
          
    fig_dist <- ggplot(data = summary_dist,
                      mapping = aes(x = urb_cat_dist,
                                    y = perc_comp,
                                    col = dfe,
                                    group = dfe)) +   # ensures consistent dodging
      scale_color_manual(values = c("grey","black","lightblue")) +
      
      
        # y limits 
        ylim(axes_limits_medians$ymin_dist[i],axes_limits_medians$ymax_dist[i]) +
      
        # Points
        geom_point(position = dodge, size = 3) +
        
        # Error bars
        geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper),
                      width = 0.2,
                      position = dodge) +
        
        # Significance letters
        geom_text(aes(label = letter, y = upper),
                  position = dodge,
                  hjust = 0.5,
                  vjust = -0.3,
                  size = 5,
                  fontface = "bold") +
        geom_text(aes(label = LETTER, y = lower), 
                    position = dodge, 
                    hjust=0.5, 
                    vjust=1.3, 
                    size = 5, 
                    fontface = "bold") +
        
        # Annotate text for p-values
         annotate(geom = "text", x = 0.5, y = Inf, size = 3,
                 label = paste(
                   "Distance from Edge: p", ifelse(ambient_PM_art_pvals$Edge_vs_Interior[i] > 0.001,
                                                  paste("=", ambient_PM_art_pvals$Edge_vs_Interior[i]),
                                                  " < 0.001"),
                   "\nUrban vs. Rural: p", ifelse(ambient_PM_art_pvals$Urb_v_Rural_Dist[i] > 0.001,
                                                  paste("=", ambient_PM_art_pvals$Urb_v_Rural_Dist[i]),
                                                  " < 0.001"),
                   "\nDfE X Urb. Cat.: p", ifelse(ambient_PM_art_pvals$Interaction_Dist[i] > 0.001,
                                                  paste("=", ambient_PM_art_pvals$Interaction_Dist[i]),
                                                  " < 0.001")),
                 hjust = 0, vjust = 1) +
        
        # Labels and theme
        labs(title = "Ambient PM", x = NULL, y = paste("%",element)) +
        theme_minimal() +
        theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 25),
              legend.position = "none",
              panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
              panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
              axis.line = element_line(colour = "black"),
              aspect.ratio = 1,
              axis.text.x = element_text(color = "black", size = 15),
              axis.title.x = element_text(color = "black", size = 15),
              axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 15),
              axis.title.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 15))
    
    fig_pub <- ggplot(data = summary_isa,
                      mapping = aes(x = urb_cat_isa,
                                    y = perc_comp,
                                    col = dfe,
                                    group = dfe)) +   # ensures consistent dodging
      scale_color_manual(values = c("grey","black","lightblue")) +
      
        # Points
        geom_point(position = dodge, size = 3) +
      
        # y limits 
        ylim(axes_limits_medians$ymin_isa[i],axes_limits_medians$ymax_isa[i]) +
        
        # Error bars
        geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper),
                      width = 0.2,
                      position = dodge) +
        
        # Significance letters
        geom_text(aes(label = letter, y = upper),
                  position = dodge,
                  hjust = 0.5,
                  vjust = -0.3,
                  size = 5,
                  fontface = "bold") +
        geom_text(aes(label = LETTER, y = lower), 
                  position = dodge, 
                  hjust=0.5, 
                  vjust=1.3, 
                  size = 5, 
                  fontface = "bold") +
        
        # Annotate text for p-values
         annotate(geom = "text", x = 0.5, y = Inf, size = 3,
                 label = paste(
                   "Distance from Edge: p", ifelse(ambient_PM_art_pvals$Edge_vs_Interior[i] > 0.001,
                                                  paste("=", ambient_PM_art_pvals$Edge_vs_Interior[i]),
                                                  " < 0.001"),
                   "\nUrban vs. Rural: p", ifelse(ambient_PM_art_pvals$Urb_v_Rural_ISA[i] > 0.001,
                                                  paste("=", ambient_PM_art_pvals$Urb_v_Rural_ISA[i]),
                                                  " < 0.001"),
                   "\nDfE X Urb. Cat.: p", ifelse(ambient_PM_art_pvals$Interaction_ISA[i] > 0.001,
                                                  paste("=", ambient_PM_art_pvals$Interaction_ISA[i]),
                                                  " < 0.001")),
                 hjust = 0, vjust = 1) +
        
        # Labels and theme
        labs(title = "Ambient PM", x = NULL, y = paste("%",element)) +
        theme_minimal() +
        theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 18, hjust = 0.5),
              legend.position = "none",
              panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
              panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
              axis.line = element_line(colour = "black"),
              aspect.ratio = 1,
              axis.text.x = element_text(color = "black", size = 15),
              axis.title.x = element_text(color = "black", size = 15),
              axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 15),
              axis.title.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 15)) +
        guides(color = guide_legend(title = "Distance\nFrom Edge (m)"))
      
figs <- plot_grid(fig_isa,fig_dist,labels=NULL,ncol=1,rel_widths=c(1,1))


ambient_element_urbcatxdfe_medians_list_isa[[element]] <- fig_isa
ambient_element_urbcatxdfe_medians_list_dist[[element]] <- fig_dist
ambient_element_urbcatxdfe_medians_list_isa_pub[[element]] <- fig_pub
ambient_element_urbcatxdfe_medians_list[[element]] <- figs  # Store each figure in the list we made

# printing figure

ggsave(paste(element,"ambient_urbcatxdfe.png"), plot = figs, path = file.path(figures_dir,"Elements/Urban vs. Rural/Medians/Ambient"), width = 4,
  height = 8, bg = "white")
}

```

#### Comparing Ambient & Foliar Medians
```{r}

# calculating medians for both ambient & foliar groups

        AvFmedians <- matrix(data=NA, nrow=2, ncol=26)
        colnames(AvFmedians) <- all_element_names
        rownames(AvFmedians) <- c("Ambient Median","Foliar Median")
        
  for (i in c(1:26)) {
    
  element <- all_element_names[i]
  summary <- cbind(aggregate(AllCompxUNESites_NOopen[element],
                             list(AllCompxUNESites_NOopen$particle_source),FUN=ci95_median_boot))
  summary <- as.matrix(summary)
  colnames(summary) <- c("particle_source","perc_comp","lower","upper")
  summary <- as.data.frame(summary)
  
  AvFmedians[1,i] <- summary$perc_comp[1]
  AvFmedians[2,i] <- summary$perc_comp[2]
  
  }

# making the figure 

  # creating a list for figures
  all_element_cat_list_median <- list()
  all_element_cat_list_median_nocap <- list()
  
  # loop to make categorical figures
  
  for (i in c(1:26)) {
    
  element <- all_element_names[i]
  summary <- cbind(aggregate(AllCompxUNESites_NOopen[element],
                             list(AllCompxUNESites_NOopen$particle_source),FUN=ci95_median_boot))
  summary <- as.matrix(summary)
  colnames(summary) <- c("particle_source","perc_comp","lower","upper")
  summary <- as.data.frame(summary)
  summary$perc_comp <- as.numeric(summary$perc_comp)
  summary$lower     <- as.numeric(summary$lower)
  summary$upper     <- as.numeric(summary$upper)
  
    # add in significance letter associated with each group
        
        summary$letter <- NA
    
        summary$letter[1] <- allPM_art_pairwise[i,3]
        summary$letter[2] <- allPM_art_pairwise[i,4]
          
  
  fig <- ggplot(data=summary, aes(x=particle_source, y=perc_comp, col=particle_source)) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("#B7C9E2", "darkgreen")) +
    geom_point(position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), size = 4) +
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper),
                  width = 0.2,
                  linewidth = 1.2,
                  position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +
    labs(title = NULL,
         x = NULL, 
         y = paste("%", element)) +
    theme_minimal() + 
    annotate(geom = "text", x = 0.5, y = Inf, hjust = 0,
             vjust = 1, size = 5, 
             label=paste("p",ifelse(allPM_art_pairwise$`Ambient - Foliar`[i]>0.001,
                                paste("=",allPM_art_pairwise$`Ambient - Foliar`[i]),
                                " < 0.001"))) +
    geom_text(data = summary,
      aes(label = letter, y = upper), position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), hjust=0.5, vjust=-0.5, size = 6, fontface = "bold") +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(size=25),
          legend.position = "right",
          panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
          panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
          axis.line = element_line(colour = "black"),
          aspect.ratio = 1,
          axis.text.x = element_text(color = "black", size=15),
          axis.title.x = element_text(color = "black", size=15),
          axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", size=15),
          axis.title.y = element_text(color = "black", size=15)) +
    scale_y_continuous(
    labels = label_number(accuracy = 0.01)) +
    ylim((min(summary$lower)-((max(summary$upper)-min(summary$lower))*0.1)),
         (max(summary$upper)+(max(summary$upper)-min(summary$lower))*0.1))+
    theme(legend.position = "none")

# creating a version without the text annotation to add to a multipanel figure
  
  fig_nocap <- ggplot(data=summary, aes(x=particle_source, y=perc_comp, col=particle_source)) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("#B7C9E2", "darkgreen")) +
    geom_point(position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), size = 3) +
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper),
                  width = 0.2,
                  linewidth = 1.2,
                  position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +
    labs(title = "",
         x = "", 
         y = paste("%", element)) +
    theme_minimal() + 
    geom_text(data = summary,
      aes(label = letter, y = upper), position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), hjust=0.5, vjust=-0.7, size = 3, fontface = "bold") +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(size=25),
          legend.position = "right",
          panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
          panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
          axis.line = element_line(colour = "black"),
          aspect.ratio = 1,
          axis.text.x = element_text(color = "black", size=10),
          axis.title.x = element_text(color = "black", size=15),
          axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", size=10),
          axis.title.y = element_text(color = "black", size=10)) +
    guides(color = guide_legend(title = "Particle Source")) +
    scale_y_continuous(
    labels = label_number(accuracy = 0.01)) +
    ylim((min(summary$lower)-((max(summary$upper)-min(summary$lower))*0.1)),
         (max(summary$upper)+(max(summary$upper)-min(summary$lower))*0.1))+
    theme(legend.position="none")
  
  all_element_cat_list_median[[element]] <- fig  # Store each figure in the list we made
  all_element_cat_list_median_nocap[[element]] <- fig_nocap
  
  # printing figure
  ggsave(paste(element,"all_cat.png"), plot = fig, path = file.path(figures_dir,"Elements/Ambient vs. Foliar/Medians"), width = 5,
    height = 5, bg = "white")
  }
```


#### Combining Them
```{r}

for (i in c(1:26)) {
  element <- element_names[i]
  
  # putting both the ambient + foliar figures by distance to Boston together
    dist_fig <- plot_grid(ambient_element_urbcatxdfe_medians_list_dist[[element]],
                     foliar_element_urbcatxdfe_medians_list_dist[[element]],
                      labels=NULL,ncol=2)
    dist_fig <- plot_grid(dist_fig,
                          ggdraw() + draw_label(
                            label = "by Distance to Boston",
                            size = 12,
                            x = 0.5,
                            hjust = 0.5
                            ),
                          ncol = 1,
                          rel_heights = c(1, 0.08)
                          )
    
    # putting both the ambient + foliar figures by %ISA together
    isa_fig <- plot_grid(ambient_element_urbcatxdfe_medians_list_isa[[element]],
                     foliar_element_urbcatxdfe_medians_list_isa[[element]],
                      labels=NULL,ncol=2)
    isa_fig <- plot_grid(isa_fig,
                          ggdraw() + draw_label(
                            "by %ISA",
                            size = 12,
                            x = 0.5,
                            hjust = 0.5
                            ),
                          ncol = 1,
                          rel_heights = c(1, 0.08))
    
 # putting both the dist + ISA figures together + adding legend
    
  fig <- plot_grid(isa_fig,
                   dist_fig,
                   ncol = 1,
                   labels=NULL)
 
  fig <- plot_grid(fig, 
                   legendopen,
                   rel_widths = c(1, 0.3),
                   labels=NULL,ncol=2)
  
  # adding the ambient vs foliar figure
  
  Avf_fig <- all_element_cat_list_median_nocap[[element]]
  
  fig <- ggdraw(fig) + 
    draw_plot(Avf_fig,
            x = 0.67,   # horizontal position (0 = left, 1 = right)
            y = 0.01,  # vertical position (0 = bottom, 1 = top)
            width = 0.35,
            height = 0.35)
  
  
  
  # making labels for the Ambient v Foliar p-values to append. i'm using the ART values because they were the same as the K-W values
  
  label <- paste0("Ambient vs. Foliar: p ",
                      ifelse(allPM_art_pairwise$`Ambient - Foliar`[allPM_art_pairwise$Element==element]>0.001,
                             paste(" =",allPM_art_pairwise$`Ambient - Foliar`[allPM_art_pairwise$Element==element]),
                             " < 0.001"))
  
  # putting them all together
  
  fig <- ggdraw(fig) +
    draw_label(label,
    x = 0.96, y = 0.32,
    hjust = 1,
    size = 9)
    
ggsave(paste(element,"_urbcatxdfe.png"), plot = fig, width = 9, path = file.path(figures_dir,"Elements/Urban vs. Rural/Medians"),
  height = 8, bg = "white")
}
    
```

### Medians Without Open Sites
#### Foliar
```{r}
# defining list of element names
element_names <- all_element_names

# creating a list for figures
foliar_element_urbcatxdfe_medians_list <- list()
foliar_element_urbcatxdfe_medians_list_isa <- list()
foliar_element_urbcatxdfe_medians_list_dist <- list()
foliar_element_urbcatxdfe_medians_list_isa_pub <- list()

# loop to make categorical figures 

for (i in c(1:26)) {
  
element <- element_names[i] 

# summarize the element by urbanization and distance from edge
    summary_isa <- cbind(aggregate(FoliarPMCompxUNESites[[element]],list(FoliarPMCompxUNESites$urb_cat_isa,FoliarPMCompxUNESites$dfe),FUN=ci95_median_boot))
    summary_isa <- as.matrix(summary_isa)
    colnames(summary_isa) <- c("urb_cat_isa","dfe","perc_comp","lower","upper")
    summary_isa <- as.data.frame(summary_isa)
    summary_isa$perc_comp <- as.numeric(summary_isa$perc_comp)
    summary_isa$lower     <- as.numeric(summary_isa$lower)
    summary_isa$upper     <- as.numeric(summary_isa$upper)

    summary_dist <- cbind(aggregate(FoliarPMCompxUNESites[[element]],list(FoliarPMCompxUNESites$urb_cat_dist,FoliarPMCompxUNESites$dfe),FUN=ci95_median_boot))
    summary_dist <- as.matrix(summary_dist)
    colnames(summary_dist) <- c("urb_cat_dist","dfe","perc_comp","lower","upper")
    summary_dist <- as.data.frame(summary_dist)
    summary_dist$perc_comp <- as.numeric(summary_dist$perc_comp)
    summary_dist$lower     <- as.numeric(summary_dist$lower)
    summary_dist$upper     <- as.numeric(summary_dist$upper)
 
  # add in the significance letter associated with each group
      summary_isa$letter <- NA
      summary_isa$letter[1] <- foliar_PM_art_pairwise_isa$Rural0[foliar_PM_art_pairwise_isa$Element==element]
      summary_isa$letter[2] <- foliar_PM_art_pairwise_isa$Urban0[foliar_PM_art_pairwise_isa$Element==element]
      summary_isa$letter[3] <- foliar_PM_art_pairwise_isa$Rural90[foliar_PM_art_pairwise_isa$Element==element]
      summary_isa$letter[4] <- foliar_PM_art_pairwise_isa$Urban90[foliar_PM_art_pairwise_isa$Element==element]
      
      summary_isa$LETTER <- NA
      summary_isa$LETTER[1] <- allPM_ruraledge_isa_art_pairwise$`Foliar`[allPM_ruraledge_isa_art_pairwise$Element==element]
      summary_isa$LETTER[2] <- allPM_urbanedge_isa_art_pairwise$`Foliar`[allPM_urbanedge_isa_art_pairwise$Element==element]
      summary_isa$LETTER[3] <- allPM_ruralinterior_isa_art_pairwise$`Foliar`[allPM_ruralinterior_isa_art_pairwise$Element==element]
      summary_isa$LETTER[4] <- allPM_urbaninterior_isa_art_pairwise$`Foliar`[allPM_urbaninterior_isa_art_pairwise$Element==element]
      
      summary_dist$letter <- NA
      summary_dist$letter[1] <- foliar_PM_art_pairwise_dist$Rural0[foliar_PM_art_pairwise_dist$Element==element]
      summary_dist$letter[2] <- foliar_PM_art_pairwise_dist$Urban0[foliar_PM_art_pairwise_dist$Element==element]
      summary_dist$letter[3] <- foliar_PM_art_pairwise_dist$Rural90[foliar_PM_art_pairwise_dist$Element==element]
      summary_dist$letter[4] <- foliar_PM_art_pairwise_dist$Urban90[foliar_PM_art_pairwise_dist$Element==element]
      
      summary_dist$LETTER <- NA
      summary_dist$LETTER[1] <- allPM_ruraledge_dist_art_pairwise$`Foliar`[allPM_ruraledge_dist_art_pairwise$Element==element]
      summary_dist$LETTER[2] <- allPM_urbanedge_dist_art_pairwise$`Foliar`[allPM_urbanedge_dist_art_pairwise$Element==element]
      summary_dist$LETTER[3] <- allPM_ruralinterior_dist_art_pairwise$`Foliar`[allPM_ruralinterior_dist_art_pairwise$Element==element]
      summary_dist$LETTER[4] <- allPM_urbaninterior_dist_art_pairwise$`Foliar`[allPM_urbaninterior_dist_art_pairwise$Element==element]

# figures
      
  dodge <- position_dodge(width = 0.3)

    fig_isa <- ggplot(data = summary_isa,
                      mapping = aes(x = urb_cat_isa,
                                    y = perc_comp,
                                    col = dfe,
                                    group = dfe)) +   # ensures consistent dodging
      scale_color_manual(values = c("grey","black")) +
      
        # y limits 
        ylim(axes_limits_medians$ymin_isa[i],axes_limits_medians$ymax_isa[i]) +
      
        # Points
        geom_point(position = dodge, size = 3) +
        
        # Error bars
        geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper),
                      width = 0.2,
                      position = dodge) +
        
        # Significance letters
        geom_text(aes(label = letter, y = upper),
                  position = dodge,
                  hjust = 0.5,
                  vjust = -0.3,
                  size = 5,
                  fontface = "bold") +
        geom_text(aes(label = LETTER, y = lower), 
                  position = dodge, 
                  hjust=0.5, 
                  vjust = 1.3, 
                  size = 5, 
                  fontface = "bold") +
  
        
        # Annotate text for p-values
        annotate(geom = "text", x = 0.5, y = Inf, size = 3,
                 label = paste(
                   "Distance from Edge: p", ifelse(foliar_PM_art_pvals$Edge_vs_Interior[i] > 0.001,
                                                  paste("=", foliar_PM_art_pvals$Edge_vs_Interior[i]),
                                                  " < 0.001"),
                   "\nUrban vs. Rural: p", ifelse(foliar_PM_art_pvals$Urb_v_Rural_ISA[i] > 0.001,
                                                  paste("=", foliar_PM_art_pvals$Urb_v_Rural_ISA[i]),
                                                  " < 0.001"),
                   "\nDfE X Urb. Cat.: p", ifelse(foliar_PM_art_pvals$Interaction_ISA[i] > 0.001,
                                                  paste("=", foliar_PM_art_pvals$Interaction_ISA[i]),
                                                  " < 0.001")),
                 hjust = 0, vjust = 1) +
        
        # Labels and theme
        labs(title = "Foliar PM", x = NULL, y = " ") +
        theme_minimal() +
        theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 25),
              legend.position = "none",
              panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
              panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
              axis.line = element_line(colour = "black"),
              aspect.ratio = 1,
              axis.text.x = element_text(color = "black", size = 15),
              axis.title.x = element_text(color = "black", size = 15),
              axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 15),
              axis.title.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 15)) 
          
    fig_dist <- ggplot(data = summary_dist,
                      mapping = aes(x = urb_cat_dist,
                                    y = perc_comp,
                                    col = dfe,
                                    group = dfe)) +   # ensures consistent dodging
      scale_color_manual(values = c("grey","black")) +
      
        # Points
        geom_point(position = dodge, size = 3) +
      
        # y limits 
        ylim(axes_limits_medians$ymin_dist[i],axes_limits_medians$ymax_dist[i]) +
        
        # Error bars
        geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper),
                      width = 0.2,
                      position = dodge) +
        
        # Significance letters
        geom_text(aes(label = letter, y = upper),
                  position = dodge,
                  hjust = 0.5,
                  vjust = -0.3,
                  size = 5,
                  fontface = "bold") +
        geom_text(aes(label = LETTER, y = lower), 
                  position = dodge, 
                  hjust=0.5, 
                  vjust=1.3, 
                  size = 5, 
                  fontface = "bold") +
        
        # Annotate text for p-values
        annotate(geom = "text", x = 0.5, y = Inf, size = 3,
                 label = paste(
                   "Distance from Edge: p", ifelse(foliar_PM_art_pvals$Edge_vs_Interior[i] > 0.001,
                                                  paste("=", foliar_PM_art_pvals$Edge_vs_Interior[i]),
                                                  " < 0.001"),
                   "\nUrban vs. Rural: p", ifelse(foliar_PM_art_pvals$Urb_v_Rural_ISA[i] > 0.001,
                                                  paste("=", foliar_PM_art_pvals$Urb_v_Rural_Dist[i]),
                                                  " < 0.001"),
                   "\nDfE X Urb. Cat.: p", ifelse(foliar_PM_art_pvals$Interaction_ISA[i] > 0.001,
                                                  paste("=", foliar_PM_art_pvals$Interaction_Dist[i]),
                                                  " < 0.001")),
                 hjust = 0, vjust = 1) +
        
        # Labels and theme
        labs(title = "Foliar PM", x = NULL, y = " ") +
        theme_minimal() +
        theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 25),
              legend.position = "none",
              panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
              panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
              axis.line = element_line(colour = "black"),
              aspect.ratio = 1,
              axis.text.x = element_text(color = "black", size = 15),
              axis.title.x = element_text(color = "black", size = 15),
              axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 15),
              axis.title.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 15)) 
    
    fig_pub <- ggplot(data = summary_isa,
                      mapping = aes(x = urb_cat_isa,
                                    y = perc_comp,
                                    col = dfe,
                                    group = dfe)) +   # ensures consistent dodging
      scale_color_manual(values = c("grey","black")) +
      
        # Points
        geom_point(position = dodge, size = 3) +
      
        # y limits 
        ylim(axes_limits_medians$ymin_isa[i],axes_limits_medians$ymax_isa[i]) +
        
        # Error bars
        geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper),
                      width = 0.2,
                      position = dodge) +
        
        # Significance letters
        geom_text(aes(label = letter, y = upper),
                  position = dodge,
                  hjust = 0.5,
                  vjust = -0.3,
                  size = 5,
                  fontface = "bold") +
        geom_text(aes(label = LETTER, y = lower), 
                  position = dodge, 
                  hjust=0.5, 
                  vjust=1.3, 
                  size = 5, 
                  fontface = "bold") +
        
        # Annotate text for p-values
        annotate(geom = "text", x = 0.5, y = Inf, size = 3,
                 label = paste(
                   "Distance from Edge: p", ifelse(foliar_PM_art_pvals$Edge_vs_Interior[i] > 0.001,
                                                  paste("=", foliar_PM_art_pvals$Edge_vs_Interior[i]),
                                                  " < 0.001"),
                   "\nUrban vs. Rural: p", ifelse(foliar_PM_art_pvals$Urb_v_Rural_ISA[i] > 0.001,
                                                  paste("=", foliar_PM_art_pvals$Urb_v_Rural_ISA[i]),
                                                  " < 0.001"),
                   "\nDfE X Urb. Cat.: p", ifelse(foliar_PM_art_pvals$Interaction_ISA[i] > 0.001,
                                                  paste("=", foliar_PM_art_pvals$Interaction_ISA[i]),
                                                  " < 0.001")),
                 hjust = 0, vjust = 1) +
        
        # Labels and theme
        labs(title = "Foliar PM", x = NULL, 
             # y = paste("% ",element),
             y = " "
             ) +
        theme_minimal() +
        theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 18, hjust = 0.5),
              legend.position = "none",
              panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
              panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
              axis.line = element_line(colour = "black"),
              aspect.ratio = 1,
              axis.text.x = element_text(color = "black", size = 15),
              axis.title.x = element_text(color = "black", size = 15),
              axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 15),
              axis.title.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 15)) 
    
      
figs <- plot_grid(fig_isa,fig_dist,labels=NULL,ncol=1,rel_widths=c(1,1))


foliar_element_urbcatxdfe_medians_list_isa[[element]] <- fig_isa
foliar_element_urbcatxdfe_medians_list_dist[[element]] <- fig_dist
foliar_element_urbcatxdfe_medians_list_isa_pub[[element]] <- fig_pub

foliar_element_urbcatxdfe_medians_list[[element]] <- figs  # Store each figure in the list we made

# printing figure
ggsave(paste(element,"foliar_urbcatxdfe_art.png"), plot = figs, path = file.path(figures_dir,"Elements/Urban vs. Rural/Medians/Foliar"), width = 4,
  height = 8, bg = "white")
}
```

#### Ambient
```{r}
# defining list of element names
element_names <- all_element_names

# creating a list for figures
ambient_element_urbcatxdfe_medians_list <- list()
ambient_element_urbcatxdfe_medians_list_isa <- list()
ambient_element_urbcatxdfe_medians_list_dist <- list()
ambient_element_urbcatxdfe_medians_list_isa_pub <- list()

# loop to make categorical figures 

for (i in c(1:26)) {
  
element <- element_names[i] 

# summarize the element by urbanization and distance from edge
    summary_isa <- cbind(aggregate(AmbientPMCompxUNESites[[element]],list(AmbientPMCompxUNESites$urb_cat_isa,AmbientPMCompxUNESites$dfe),FUN=ci95_median_boot))
    summary_isa <- as.matrix(summary_isa)
    colnames(summary_isa) <- c("urb_cat_isa","dfe","perc_comp","lower","upper")
    summary_isa <- as.data.frame(summary_isa)
    summary_isa$perc_comp <- as.numeric(summary_isa$perc_comp)
    summary_isa$lower     <- as.numeric(summary_isa$lower)
    summary_isa$upper     <- as.numeric(summary_isa$upper)

    summary_dist <- cbind(aggregate(AmbientPMCompxUNESites[[element]],list(AmbientPMCompxUNESites$urb_cat_dist,AmbientPMCompxUNESites$dfe),FUN=ci95_median_boot))
    summary_dist <- as.matrix(summary_dist)
    colnames(summary_dist) <- c("urb_cat_dist","dfe","perc_comp","lower","upper")
    summary_dist <- as.data.frame(summary_dist)
    summary_dist$perc_comp <- as.numeric(summary_dist$perc_comp)
    summary_dist$lower     <- as.numeric(summary_dist$lower)
    summary_dist$upper     <- as.numeric(summary_dist$upper)
 
  # add in the significance letter associated with each group
      summary_isa$letter <- NA
      summary_isa$letter[1] <- ambient_PM_art_pairwise_isa$Rural0[ambient_PM_art_pairwise_isa$Element==element]
      summary_isa$letter[2] <- ambient_PM_art_pairwise_isa$Urban0[ambient_PM_art_pairwise_isa$Element==element]
      summary_isa$letter[3] <- ambient_PM_art_pairwise_isa$Rural90[ambient_PM_art_pairwise_isa$Element==element]
      summary_isa$letter[4] <- ambient_PM_art_pairwise_isa$Urban90[ambient_PM_art_pairwise_isa$Element==element]
      summary_isa$letter[5] <- ambient_PM_art_pairwise_isa$RuralOpen[ambient_PM_art_pairwise_isa$Element==element]
      summary_isa$letter[6] <- ambient_PM_art_pairwise_isa$UrbanOpen[ambient_PM_art_pairwise_isa$Element==element]
      
      summary_isa$LETTER <- NA
      summary_isa$LETTER[1] <- allPM_ruraledge_isa_art_pairwise$`Ambient`[allPM_ruraledge_isa_art_pairwise$Element==element]
      summary_isa$LETTER[2] <- allPM_urbanedge_isa_art_pairwise$`Ambient`[allPM_urbanedge_isa_art_pairwise$Element==element]
      summary_isa$LETTER[3] <- allPM_ruralinterior_isa_art_pairwise$`Ambient`[allPM_ruralinterior_isa_art_pairwise$Element==element]
      summary_isa$LETTER[4] <- allPM_urbaninterior_isa_art_pairwise$`Ambient`[allPM_urbaninterior_isa_art_pairwise$Element==element]
      
      summary_dist$letter <- NA
      summary_dist$letter[1] <- ambient_PM_art_pairwise_dist$Rural0[ambient_PM_art_pairwise_dist$Element==element]
      summary_dist$letter[2] <- ambient_PM_art_pairwise_dist$Urban0[ambient_PM_art_pairwise_dist$Element==element]
      summary_dist$letter[3] <- ambient_PM_art_pairwise_dist$Rural90[ambient_PM_art_pairwise_dist$Element==element]
      summary_dist$letter[4] <- ambient_PM_art_pairwise_dist$Urban90[ambient_PM_art_pairwise_dist$Element==element]
      summary_dist$letter[5] <- ambient_PM_art_pairwise_dist$RuralOpen[ambient_PM_art_pairwise_dist$Element==element]
      summary_dist$letter[6] <- ambient_PM_art_pairwise_dist$UrbanOpen[ambient_PM_art_pairwise_dist$Element==element]
      
      summary_dist$LETTER <- NA
      summary_dist$LETTER[1] <- allPM_ruraledge_dist_art_pairwise$`Ambient`[allPM_ruraledge_dist_art_pairwise$Element==element]
      summary_dist$LETTER[2] <- allPM_urbanedge_dist_art_pairwise$`Ambient`[allPM_urbanedge_dist_art_pairwise$Element==element]
      summary_dist$LETTER[3] <- allPM_ruralinterior_dist_art_pairwise$`Ambient`[allPM_ruralinterior_dist_art_pairwise$Element==element]
      summary_dist$LETTER[4] <- allPM_urbaninterior_dist_art_pairwise$`Ambient`[allPM_urbaninterior_dist_art_pairwise$Element==element]
      
# figures
      
  dodge <- position_dodge(width = 0.3)

    fig_isa <- ggplot(data = summary_isa,
                      mapping = aes(x = urb_cat_isa,
                                    y = perc_comp,
                                    col = dfe,
                                    group = dfe)) +   # ensures consistent dodging
      scale_color_manual(values = c("grey","black","lightblue")) +
      
        # Points
        geom_point(position = dodge, size = 3) +
      
        # y limits 
        ylim(axes_limits_medians$ymin_isa[i],axes_limits_medians$ymax_isa[i]) +
        
        # Error bars
        geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper),
                      width = 0.2,
                      position = dodge) +
        
        # Significance letters
        geom_text(aes(label = letter, y = upper),
                position = dodge,
                  hjust = 0.5,
                  vjust = -0.3,
                  size = 5,
                  fontface = "bold") +
        geom_text(aes(label = LETTER, y = lower), 
                  position = dodge, 
                  hjust=0.5, 
                  vjust=1.3, 
                  size = 5, 
                  fontface = "bold") +
        
        # Annotate text for p-values
         annotate(geom = "text", x = 0.5, y = Inf, size = 3,
                 label = paste(
                   "Distance from Edge: p", ifelse(ambient_PM_art_pvals$Edge_vs_Interior[i] > 0.001,
                                                  paste("=", ambient_PM_art_pvals$Edge_vs_Interior[i]),
                                                  " < 0.001"),
                   "\nUrban vs. Rural: p", ifelse(ambient_PM_art_pvals$Urb_v_Rural_ISA[i] > 0.001,
                                                  paste("=", ambient_PM_art_pvals$Urb_v_Rural_ISA[i]),
                                                  " < 0.001"),
                   "\nDfE X Urb. Cat.: p", ifelse(ambient_PM_art_pvals$Interaction_ISA[i] > 0.001,
                                                  paste("=", ambient_PM_art_pvals$Interaction_ISA[i]),
                                                  " < 0.001")),
                 hjust = 0, vjust = 1) +
        
        # Labels and theme
        labs(title = "Ambient PM", x = NULL, y = paste("%",element)) +
        theme_minimal() +
        theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 25),
              legend.position = "none",
              panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
              panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
              axis.line = element_line(colour = "black"),

        guides(color = guide_legend(title = "Distance\nFrom Edge (m)"))
          
    fig_dist <- ggplot(data = summary_dist,

                                    y = perc_comp,

        # Points

                  position = dodge,

        geom_text(aes(label = LETTER, y = lower), 
                    position = dodge, 
                    hjust=0.5, 
                    vjust=1.3,

        theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 25),
```
