#### Comparing Ambient & Foliar Medians
```{r}

# calculating medians for both ambient & foliar groups

        AvFmedians <- matrix(data=NA, nrow=2, ncol=26)
        colnames(AvFmedians) <- all_element_names
        rownames(AvFmedians) <- c("Ambient Median","Foliar Median")
        
  for (i in c(1:26)) {
    
  element <- all_element_names[i]
  summary <- cbind(aggregate(AllCompxUNESites_NOopen[element],
                             list(AllCompxUNESites_NOopen$particle_source),FUN=ci95_median_boot))
  summary <- as.matrix(summary)
  colnames(summary) <- c("particle_source","perc_comp","lower","upper")
  summary <- as.data.frame(summary)
  
  AvFmedians[1,i] <- summary$perc_comp[1]
  AvFmedians[2,i] <- summary$perc_comp[2]
  
  }

# making the figure 

  # creating a list for figures
  all_element_cat_list_median <- list()
  all_element_cat_list_median_nocap <- list()
  
  # loop to make categorical figures
  
  for (i in c(1:26)) {
    
  element <- all_element_names[i]
  summary <- cbind(aggregate(AllCompxUNESites_NOopen[element],
                             list(AllCompxUNESites_NOopen$particle_source),FUN=ci95_median_boot))
  summary <- as.matrix(summary)
  colnames(summary) <- c("particle_source","perc_comp","lower","upper")
  summary <- as.data.frame(summary)
  summary$perc_comp <- as.numeric(summary$perc_comp)
  summary$lower     <- as.numeric(summary$lower)
  summary$upper     <- as.numeric(summary$upper)
  
    # add in significance letter associated with each group
        
        summary$letter <- NA
    
        summary$letter[1] <- allPM_art_pairwise[i,3]
        summary$letter[2] <- allPM_art_pairwise[i,4]
          
  
  fig <- ggplot(data=summary, aes(x=particle_source, y=perc_comp, col=particle_source)) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("#B7C9E2", "darkgreen")) +
    geom_point(position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), size = 4) +
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper),
                  width = 0.2,
                  linewidth = 1.2,
                  position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +
    labs(title = NULL,
         x = NULL, 
         y = paste("%", element)) +
    theme_minimal() + 
    annotate(geom = "text", x = 0.5, y = Inf, hjust = 0,
             vjust = 1, size = 5, 
             label=paste("p",ifelse(allPM_art_pairwise$`Ambient - Foliar`[i]>0.001,
                                paste("=",allPM_art_pairwise$`Ambient - Foliar`[i]),
                                " < 0.001"))) +
    geom_text(data = summary,
      aes(label = letter, y = upper), position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), hjust=0.5, vjust=-0.5, size = 6, fontface = "bold") +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(size=25),
          legend.position = "right",
          panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
          panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
          axis.line = element_line(colour = "black"),
          aspect.ratio = 1,
          axis.text.x = element_text(color = "black", size=15),
          axis.title.x = element_text(color = "black", size=15),
          axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", size=15),
          axis.title.y = element_text(color = "black", size=15)) +
    scale_y_continuous(
    labels = label_number(accuracy = 0.01)) +
    ylim((min(summary$lower)-((max(summary$upper)-min(summary$lower))*0.1)),
         (max(summary$upper)+(max(summary$upper)-min(summary$lower))*0.1))+
    theme(legend.position = "none")

# creating a version without the text annotation to add to a multipanel figure
  
  fig_nocap <- ggplot(data=summary, aes(x=particle_source, y=perc_comp, col=particle_source)) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("#B7C9E2", "darkgreen")) +
    geom_point(position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), size = 3) +
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper),
                  width = 0.2,
                  linewidth = 1.2,
                  position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +
    labs(title = "",
         x = "", 
         y = paste("%", element)) +
    theme_minimal() + 
    geom_text(data = summary,
      aes(label = letter, y = upper), position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), hjust=0.5, vjust=-0.7, size = 3, fontface = "bold") +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(size=25),
          legend.position = "right",
          panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
          panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
          axis.line = element_line(colour = "black"),
          aspect.ratio = 1,
          axis.text.x = element_text(color = "black", size=10),
          axis.title.x = element_text(color = "black", size=15),
          axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", size=10),
          axis.title.y = element_text(color = "black", size=10)) +
    guides(color = guide_legend(title = "Particle Source")) +
    scale_y_continuous(
    labels = label_number(accuracy = 0.01)) +
    ylim((min(summary$lower)-((max(summary$upper)-min(summary$lower))*0.1)),
         (max(summary$upper)+(max(summary$upper)-min(summary$lower))*0.1))+
    theme(legend.position="none")
  
  all_element_cat_list_median[[element]] <- fig  # Store each figure in the list we made
  all_element_cat_list_median_nocap[[element]] <- fig_nocap
  
  # printing figure
  ggsave(paste(element,"all_cat.png"), path = file.path(figures_dir,"Elements/Ambient vs. Foliar/Medians"), plot = fig, width = 5,
    height = 5, bg = "white")
  }

```

#### Comparing Ambient & Foliar Medians with Urbanization Category & DfE
```{r}
# calculating medians for both ambient & foliar groups
        
  for (i in c(1:26)) {
    
  element <- all_element_names[i]
  summary <- cbind(aggregate(AllCompxUNESites_NOopen[element],
                             list(AllCompxUNESites_NOopen$particle_source,
                                  AllCompxUNESites_NOopen$urb_cat_isa,
                                  AllCompxUNESites_NOopen$dfe),FUN=ci95_median_boot))
  summary <- as.matrix(summary)
  colnames(summary) <- c("particle_source","urb_cat_isa","dfe","perc_comp","lower","upper")
  summary <- as.data.frame(summary)
  
  }

# making the figure 

  # creating a list for figures
  all_element_cat_list_median <- list()
  
  # loop to make categorical figures
  
  for (i in c(1:26)) {
    
  element <- all_element_names[i]
  summary <- cbind(aggregate(AllCompxUNESites_NOopen[element],
                             list(AllCompxUNESites_NOopen$particle_source,
                                  AllCompxUNESites_NOopen$urb_cat_isa,
                                  AllCompxUNESites_NOopen$dfe),FUN=ci95_median_boot))
  summary <- as.matrix(summary)
  colnames(summary) <- c("particle_source","urb_cat_isa","dfe","perc_comp","lower","upper")
  summary <- as.data.frame(summary)
  summary$perc_comp <- as.numeric(summary$perc_comp)
  summary$lower     <- as.numeric(summary$lower)
  summary$upper     <- as.numeric(summary$upper)
  
  fig <- ggplot(data=summary, aes(x=particle_source, y=perc_comp, col=dfe, shape = urb_cat_isa)) +
    # scale_color_manual(values=c("#eab676", "#154c79")) +
    # scale_color_manual(values = c("#B7C9E2", "darkgreen")) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("grey", "black")) +
    geom_point(position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), size = 4) +
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper),
                  width = 0.2,
                  linewidth = 1.2,
                  position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +
    labs(title = NULL,
         x = NULL, 
         y = paste("%", element)) +
    theme_minimal() + 
    annotate(geom = "text", x = 0.5, y = Inf, hjust = 0,
             vjust = 1, size = 5, 
             label=paste("p",ifelse(allPM_art_pairwise$`Ambient - Foliar`[i]>0.001,
                                paste("=",allPM_art_pairwise$`Ambient - Foliar`[i]),
                                " < 0.001"))) +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(size=25),
          legend.position = "right",
          panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
          panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
          axis.line = element_line(colour = "black"),
          aspect.ratio = 1,
          axis.text.x = element_text(color = "black", size=15),
          axis.title.x = element_text(color = "black", size=15),
          axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", size=15),
          axis.title.y = element_text(color = "black", size=15)) +
    scale_y_continuous(
    labels = label_number(accuracy = 0.01)) +
    ylim((min(summary$lower)-((max(summary$upper)-min(summary$lower))*0.1)),
         (max(summary$upper)+(max(summary$upper)-min(summary$lower))*0.1))
  
  # printing figure
  ggsave(paste(element,"all_cat.png"), plot = fig, path = file.path(figures_dir,"Elements/Ambient vs. Foliar/Medians/Urb Cat & AvF"), width = 5,
    height = 5, bg = "white")
  }
```

#### Combining Them
```{r}

for (i in c(1:26)) {
  element <- element_names[i]
  
  # putting both the ambient + foliar figures by distance to Boston together
    dist_fig <- plot_grid(ambient_element_urbcatxdfe_medians_list_dist[[element]],
                     foliar_element_urbcatxdfe_medians_list_dist[[element]],
                      labels=NULL,ncol=2)
    dist_fig <- plot_grid(dist_fig,
                          ggdraw() + draw_label(
                            label = "by Distance to Boston",
                            size = 12,
                            x = 0.5,
                            hjust = 0.5
                            ),
                          ncol = 1,
                          rel_heights = c(1, 0.08)
                          )
    
    # putting both the ambient + foliar figures by %ISA together
    isa_fig <- plot_grid(ambient_element_urbcatxdfe_medians_list_isa[[element]],
                     foliar_element_urbcatxdfe_medians_list_isa[[element]],
                      labels=NULL,ncol=2)
    isa_fig <- plot_grid(isa_fig,
                          ggdraw() + draw_label(
                            "by %ISA",
                            size = 12,
                            x = 0.5,
                            hjust = 0.5
                            ),
                          ncol = 1,
                          rel_heights = c(1, 0.08))
    
 # putting both the dist + ISA figures together + adding legend
    
  fig <- plot_grid(isa_fig,
                   dist_fig,
                   ncol = 1,
                   labels=NULL)
 
  fig <- plot_grid(fig, 
                   legendopen,
                   rel_widths = c(1, 0.3),
                   labels=NULL,ncol=2)
  
  # adding the ambient vs foliar figure
  
  Avf_fig <- all_element_cat_list_median_nocap[[element]]
  
  fig <- ggdraw(fig) + 
    draw_plot(Avf_fig,
            x = 0.67,   # horizontal position (0 = left, 1 = right)
            y = 0.01,  # vertical position (0 = bottom, 1 = top)
            width = 0.35,
            height = 0.35)
  
  
  
  # making labels for the Ambient v Foliar p-values to append. i'm using the ART values because they were the same as the K-W values
  
  label <- paste0("Ambient vs. Foliar: p ",
                      ifelse(allPM_art_pairwise$`Ambient - Foliar`[allPM_art_pairwise$Element==element]>0.001,
                             paste(" =",allPM_art_pairwise$`Ambient - Foliar`[allPM_art_pairwise$Element==element]),
                             " < 0.001"))
  
  # putting them all together
  
  fig <- ggdraw(fig) +
    draw_label(label,
    x = 0.96, y = 0.32,
    hjust = 1,
    size = 9)
    
ggsave(paste(element,"_urbcatxdfe.png"), plot = fig,  path = file.path(figures_dir,"Elements/Urban vs. Rural/Medians"), width = 9,
  height = 8, bg = "white")
}
    
```

### Medians w Jitter
#### Foliar
```{r}
# defining list of element names
element_names <- all_element_names

# creating a list for figures
foliar_element_urbcatxdfe_medians_list <- list()
foliar_element_urbcatxdfe_medians_list_isa <- list()
foliar_element_urbcatxdfe_medians_list_dist <- list()
foliar_element_urbcatxdfe_medians_list_isa_pub <- list()

# loop to make categorical figures 

for (i in c(1:26)) {
  
element <- element_names[i] 

# summarize the element by urbanization and distance from edge
    summary_isa <- cbind(aggregate(FoliarPMCompxUNESites[[element]],list(FoliarPMCompxUNESites$urb_cat_isa,FoliarPMCompxUNESites$dfe),FUN=ci95_median_boot))
    summary_isa <- as.matrix(summary_isa)
    colnames(summary_isa) <- c("urb_cat_isa","dfe","perc_comp","lower","upper")
    summary_isa <- as.data.frame(summary_isa)
    summary_isa$perc_comp <- as.numeric(summary_isa$perc_comp)
    summary_isa$lower     <- as.numeric(summary_isa$lower)
    summary_isa$upper     <- as.numeric(summary_isa$upper)

    summary_dist <- cbind(aggregate(FoliarPMCompxUNESites[[element]],list(FoliarPMCompxUNESites$urb_cat_dist,FoliarPMCompxUNESites$dfe),FUN=ci95_median_boot))
    summary_dist <- as.matrix(summary_dist)
    colnames(summary_dist) <- c("urb_cat_dist","dfe","perc_comp","lower","upper")
    summary_dist <- as.data.frame(summary_dist)
    summary_dist$perc_comp <- as.numeric(summary_dist$perc_comp)
    summary_dist$lower     <- as.numeric(summary_dist$lower)
    summary_dist$upper     <- as.numeric(summary_dist$upper)
 
  # add in the significance letter associated with each group
      summary_isa$letter <- NA
      summary_isa$letter[1] <- foliar_PM_art_pairwise_isa$Rural0[foliar_PM_art_pairwise_isa$Element==element]
      summary_isa$letter[2] <- foliar_PM_art_pairwise_isa$Urban0[foliar_PM_art_pairwise_isa$Element==element]
      summary_isa$letter[3] <- foliar_PM_art_pairwise_isa$Rural90[foliar_PM_art_pairwise_isa$Element==element]
      summary_isa$letter[4] <- foliar_PM_art_pairwise_isa$Urban90[foliar_PM_art_pairwise_isa$Element==element]
      
      summary_isa$LETTER <- NA
      summary_isa$LETTER[1] <- allPM_ruraledge_isa_art_pairwise$`Foliar`[allPM_ruraledge_isa_art_pairwise$Element==element]
      summary_isa$LETTER[2] <- allPM_urbanedge_isa_art_pairwise$`Foliar`[allPM_urbanedge_isa_art_pairwise$Element==element]
      summary_isa$LETTER[3] <- allPM_ruralinterior_isa_art_pairwise$`Foliar`[allPM_ruralinterior_isa_art_pairwise$Element==element]
      summary_isa$LETTER[4] <- allPM_urbaninterior_isa_art_pairwise$`Foliar`[allPM_urbaninterior_isa_art_pairwise$Element==element]
      
      summary_dist$letter <- NA
      summary_dist$letter[1] <- foliar_PM_art_pairwise_dist$Rural0[foliar_PM_art_pairwise_dist$Element==element]
      summary_dist$letter[2] <- foliar_PM_art_pairwise_dist$Urban0[foliar_PM_art_pairwise_dist$Element==element]
      summary_dist$letter[3] <- foliar_PM_art_pairwise_dist$Rural90[foliar_PM_art_pairwise_dist$Element==element]
      summary_dist$letter[4] <- foliar_PM_art_pairwise_dist$Urban90[foliar_PM_art_pairwise_dist$Element==element]
      
      summary_dist$LETTER <- NA
      summary_dist$LETTER[1] <- allPM_ruraledge_dist_art_pairwise$`Foliar`[allPM_ruraledge_dist_art_pairwise$Element==element]
      summary_dist$LETTER[2] <- allPM_urbanedge_dist_art_pairwise$`Foliar`[allPM_urbanedge_dist_art_pairwise$Element==element]
      summary_dist$LETTER[3] <- allPM_ruralinterior_dist_art_pairwise$`Foliar`[allPM_ruralinterior_dist_art_pairwise$Element==element]
      summary_dist$LETTER[4] <- allPM_urbaninterior_dist_art_pairwise$`Foliar`[allPM_urbaninterior_dist_art_pairwise$Element==element]

# figures
      
  dodge <- position_dodge(width = 0.3)

    fig_isa <- ggplot(data = summary_isa,
                      mapping = aes(x = urb_cat_isa,
                                    y = perc_comp,
                                    col = dfe,
                                    group = dfe)) +   # ensures consistent dodging
      scale_color_manual(values = c("darkgrey","black")) +
      
        # y limits 
        ylim(axes_limits_medians$ymin_isa[i],axes_limits_medians$ymax_isa[i]) +
        
        # Significance letters
        geom_text(aes(label = letter, y = upper),
                  position = dodge,
                  hjust = 0.5,
                  vjust = -0.3,
                  size = 5,
                  fontface = "bold") +
        geom_text(aes(label = LETTER, y = lower), 
                  position = dodge, 
                  hjust=0.5, 
                  vjust = 1.3, 
                  size = 5, 
                  fontface = "bold") +
        # Points
        geom_point(position = dodge, size = 4) +
        
        # Error bars
        geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper),
                      width = 0.3,
                      position = dodge,
                      linewidth = 1.2) +
      
        # Raw data points
        geom_point(
          data = FoliarPMCompxUNESites,
          aes(x = urb_cat_isa,
              y = .data[[element]],
              col = dfe),
          position = position_jitterdodge(
            jitter.width = 0.15,
            dodge.width = 0.3
          ),
          alpha = 0.15,
          size = 1.5,
          inherit.aes = FALSE
        ) +
  
        # Annotate text for p-values
        annotate(geom = "text", x = 0.5, y = Inf, size = 3,
                 label = paste(
                   "Distance from Edge: p", ifelse(foliar_PM_art_pvals$Edge_vs_Interior[i] > 0.001,
                                                  paste("=", foliar_PM_art_pvals$Edge_vs_Interior[i]),
                                                  " < 0.001"),
                   "\nUrban vs. Rural: p", ifelse(foliar_PM_art_pvals$Urb_v_Rural_ISA[i] > 0.001,
                                                  paste("=", foliar_PM_art_pvals$Urb_v_Rural_ISA[i]),
                                                  " < 0.001"),
                   "\nDfE X Urb. Cat.: p", ifelse(foliar_PM_art_pvals$Interaction_ISA[i] > 0.001,
                                                  paste("=", foliar_PM_art_pvals$Interaction_ISA[i]),
                                                  " < 0.001")),
                 hjust = 0, vjust = 1) +
        
        # Labels and theme
        labs(title = "Foliar PM", x = NULL, y = " ") +
        theme_minimal() +
        theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 25),
              legend.position = "none",
              panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
              panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
              axis.line = element_line(colour = "black"),
              aspect.ratio = 1,
              axis.text.x = element_text(color = "black", size = 15),
              axis.title.x = element_text(color = "black", size = 15),
              axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 15),
              axis.title.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 15)) 
          
    fig_dist <- ggplot(data = summary_dist,
                      mapping = aes(x = urb_cat_dist,
                                    y = perc_comp,
                                    col = dfe,
                                    group = dfe)) +   # ensures consistent dodging
      scale_color_manual(values = c("grey","black")) +
      
      
        # y limits 
        ylim(axes_limits_medians$ymin_dist[i],axes_limits_medians$ymax_dist[i]) +
        
        
        # Significance letters
        geom_text(aes(label = letter, y = upper),
                  position = dodge,
                  hjust = 0.5,
                  vjust = -0.3,
                  size = 5,
                  fontface = "bold") +
        geom_text(aes(label = LETTER, y = lower), 
                  position = dodge, 
                  hjust=0.5, 
                  vjust=1.3, 
                  size = 5, 
                  fontface = "bold") +
        # Points
        geom_point(position = dodge, size = 4) +
        
        # Error bars
        geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper),
                      width = 0.3,
                      position = dodge,
                      linewidth = 1.2) +
      
        # Raw data points
        geom_point(
          data = FoliarPMCompxUNESites,
          aes(x = urb_cat_isa,
              y = .data[[element]],
              col = dfe),
          position = position_jitterdodge(
            jitter.width = 0.15,
            dodge.width = 0.3
          ),
          alpha = 0.15,
          size = 1.5,
          inherit.aes = FALSE
        ) +
        
        # Annotate text for p-values
        annotate(geom = "text", x = 0.5, y = Inf, size = 3,
                 label = paste(
                   "Distance from Edge: p", ifelse(foliar_PM_art_pvals$Edge_vs_Interior[i] > 0.001,
                                                  paste("=", foliar_PM_art_pvals$Edge_vs_Interior[i]),
                                                  " < 0.001"),
                   "\nUrban vs. Rural: p", ifelse(foliar_PM_art_pvals$Urb_v_Rural_ISA[i] > 0.001,
                                                  paste("=", foliar_PM_art_pvals$Urb_v_Rural_Dist[i]),
                                                  " < 0.001"),
                   "\nDfE X Urb. Cat.: p", ifelse(foliar_PM_art_pvals$Interaction_ISA[i] > 0.001,
                                                  paste("=", foliar_PM_art_pvals$Interaction_Dist[i]),
                                                  " < 0.001")),
                 hjust = 0, vjust = 1) +
        
        # Labels and theme
        labs(title = "Foliar PM", x = NULL, y = " ") +
        theme_minimal() +
        theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 25),
              legend.position = "none",
              panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
              panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
              axis.line = element_line(colour = "black"),
              aspect.ratio = 1,
              axis.text.x = element_text(color = "black", size = 15),
              axis.title.x = element_text(color = "black", size = 15),
              axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 15),
              axis.title.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 15)) 
    
    fig_pub <- ggplot(data = summary_isa,
                      mapping = aes(x = urb_cat_isa,
                                    y = perc_comp,
                                    col = dfe,
                                    group = dfe)) +   # ensures consistent dodging
      scale_color_manual(values = c("grey","black")) +
      
        # y limits 
        ylim(axes_limits_medians$ymin_isa[i],axes_limits_medians$ymax_isa[i]) +
        
        # Significance letters
        geom_text(aes(label = letter, y = upper),
                  position = dodge,
                  hjust = 0.5,
                  vjust = -0.3,
                  size = 5,
                  fontface = "bold") +
        geom_text(aes(label = LETTER, y = lower), 
                  position = dodge, 
                  hjust=0.5, 
                  vjust=1.3, 
                  size = 5, 
                  fontface = "bold") +
      
        # Points

        # Error bars

                      width = 0.3,

        # Raw data points

          aes(x = urb_cat_isa,
              y = .data[[element]],

          position = position_jitterdodge(
            jitter.width = 0.15,
            dodge.width = 0.3

        theme_minimal() +

              axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 15),
              axis.title.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 15))

  height = 8, bg = "white")
```

#### Ambient
```{r}
# defining list of element names
element_names <- all_element_names

# creating a list for figures
ambient_element_urbcatxdfe_medians_list <- list()
ambient_element_urbcatxdfe_medians_list_isa <- list()
ambient_element_urbcatxdfe_medians_list_dist <- list()
ambient_element_urbcatxdfe_medians_list_isa_pub <- list()

# loop to make categorical figures 

for (i in c(1:26)) {
  
element <- element_names[i] 

# summarize the element by urbanization and distance from edge
    summary_isa <- cbind(aggregate(AmbientPMCompxUNESites[[element]],list(AmbientPMCompxUNESites$urb_cat_isa,AmbientPMCompxUNESites$dfe),FUN=ci95_median_boot))
    summary_isa <- as.matrix(summary_isa)
    colnames(summary_isa) <- c("urb_cat_isa","dfe","perc_comp","lower","upper")
    summary_isa <- as.data.frame(summary_isa)
    summary_isa$perc_comp <- as.numeric(summary_isa$perc_comp)
    summary_isa$lower     <- as.numeric(summary_isa$lower)
    summary_isa$upper     <- as.numeric(summary_isa$upper)

    summary_dist <- cbind(aggregate(AmbientPMCompxUNESites[[element]],list(AmbientPMCompxUNESites$urb_cat_dist,AmbientPMCompxUNESites$dfe),FUN=ci95_median_boot))
    summary_dist <- as.matrix(summary_dist)
    colnames(summary_dist) <- c("urb_cat_dist","dfe","perc_comp","lower","upper")
    summary_dist <- as.data.frame(summary_dist)
    summary_dist$perc_comp <- as.numeric(summary_dist$perc_comp)
    summary_dist$lower     <- as.numeric(summary_dist$lower)
    summary_dist$upper     <- as.numeric(summary_dist$upper)
 
  # add in the significance letter associated with each group
      summary_isa$letter <- NA
      summary_isa$letter[1] <- ambient_PM_art_pairwise_isa$Rural0[ambient_PM_art_pairwise_isa$Element==element]
      summary_isa$letter[2] <- ambient_PM_art_pairwise_isa$Urban0[ambient_PM_art_pairwise_isa$Element==element]
      summary_isa$letter[3] <- ambient_PM_art_pairwise_isa$Rural90[ambient_PM_art_pairwise_isa$Element==element]
      summary_isa$letter[4] <- ambient_PM_art_pairwise_isa$Urban90[ambient_PM_art_pairwise_isa$Element==element]
      summary_isa$letter[5] <- ambient_PM_art_pairwise_isa$RuralOpen[ambient_PM_art_pairwise_isa$Element==element]
      summary_isa$letter[6] <- ambient_PM_art_pairwise_isa$UrbanOpen[ambient_PM_art_pairwise_isa$Element==element]
      
      summary_isa$LETTER <- NA
      summary_isa$LETTER[1] <- allPM_ruraledge_isa_art_pairwise$`Ambient`[allPM_ruraledge_isa_art_pairwise$Element==element]
      summary_isa$LETTER[2] <- allPM_urbanedge_isa_art_pairwise$`Ambient`[allPM_urbanedge_isa_art_pairwise$Element==element]
      summary_isa$LETTER[3] <- allPM_ruralinterior_isa_art_pairwise$`Ambient`[allPM_ruralinterior_isa_art_pairwise$Element==element]
      summary_isa$LETTER[4] <- allPM_urbaninterior_isa_art_pairwise$`Ambient`[allPM_urbaninterior_isa_art_pairwise$Element==element]
      
      summary_dist$letter <- NA
      summary_dist$letter[1] <- ambient_PM_art_pairwise_dist$Rural0[ambient_PM_art_pairwise_dist$Element==element]
      summary_dist$letter[2] <- ambient_PM_art_pairwise_dist$Urban0[ambient_PM_art_pairwise_dist$Element==element]
      summary_dist$letter[3] <- ambient_PM_art_pairwise_dist$Rural90[ambient_PM_art_pairwise_dist$Element==element]
      summary_dist$letter[4] <- ambient_PM_art_pairwise_dist$Urban90[ambient_PM_art_pairwise_dist$Element==element]
      summary_dist$letter[5] <- ambient_PM_art_pairwise_dist$RuralOpen[ambient_PM_art_pairwise_dist$Element==element]
      summary_dist$letter[6] <- ambient_PM_art_pairwise_dist$UrbanOpen[ambient_PM_art_pairwise_dist$Element==element]
      
      summary_dist$LETTER <- NA
      summary_dist$LETTER[1] <- allPM_ruraledge_dist_art_pairwise$`Ambient`[allPM_ruraledge_dist_art_pairwise$Element==element]
      summary_dist$LETTER[2] <- allPM_urbanedge_dist_art_pairwise$`Ambient`[allPM_urbanedge_dist_art_pairwise$Element==element]
      summary_dist$LETTER[3] <- allPM_ruralinterior_dist_art_pairwise$`Ambient`[allPM_ruralinterior_dist_art_pairwise$Element==element]
      summary_dist$LETTER[4] <- allPM_urbaninterior_dist_art_pairwise$`Ambient`[allPM_urbaninterior_dist_art_pairwise$Element==element]
      
# figures
      
  dodge <- position_dodge(width = 0.3)

    fig_isa <- ggplot(data = summary_isa,
                      mapping = aes(x = urb_cat_isa,
                                    y = perc_comp,
                                    col = dfe,
                                    group = dfe)) +   # ensures consistent dodging
      scale_color_manual(values = c("grey","black","lightblue")) +
      
        # Points
        geom_point(position = dodge, size = 4) +
        
        # Error bars
        geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper),
                      width = 0.3,
                      position = dodge,
                      linewidth = 1.2) +
      
        # Raw data points
        geom_point(
          data = AmbientPMCompxUNESites,
          aes(x = urb_cat_isa,
              y = .data[[element]],
              col = dfe),
          position = position_jitterdodge(
            jitter.width = 0.15,
            dodge.width = 0.3
          ),
          alpha = 0.15,
          size = 1.5,
          inherit.aes = FALSE
        ) +
      
        # y limits 
        ylim(axes_limits_medians$ymin_isa[i],axes_limits_medians$ymax_isa[i]) +

        # Significance letters
        geom_text(aes(label = letter, y = upper),
                position = dodge,
                  hjust = 0.5,
                  vjust = -0.3,
                  size = 5,
                  fontface = "bold") +
        geom_text(aes(label = LETTER, y = lower), 
                  position = dodge, 
                  hjust=0.5, 
                  vjust=1.3, 
                  size = 5, 
                  fontface = "bold") +
        
        # Annotate text for p-values
         annotate(geom = "text", x = 0.5, y = Inf, size = 3,
                 label = paste(
                   "Distance from Edge: p", ifelse(ambient_PM_art_pvals$Edge_vs_Interior[i] > 0.001,
                                                  paste("=", ambient_PM_art_pvals$Edge_vs_Interior[i]),
                                                  " < 0.001"),
                   "\nUrban vs. Rural: p", ifelse(ambient_PM_art_pvals$Urb_v_Rural_ISA[i] > 0.001,
                                                  paste("=", ambient_PM_art_pvals$Urb_v_Rural_ISA[i]),
                                                  " < 0.001"),
                   "\nDfE X Urb. Cat.: p", ifelse(ambient_PM_art_pvals$Interaction_ISA[i] > 0.001,
                                                  paste("=", ambient_PM_art_pvals$Interaction_ISA[i]),
                                                  " < 0.001")),
                 hjust = 0, vjust = 1) +
        
        # Labels and theme
        labs(title = "Ambient PM", x = NULL, y = paste("%",element)) +
        theme_minimal() +
        theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 25),
              legend.position = "none",
              panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
              panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
              axis.line = element_line(colour = "black"),
              aspect.ratio = 1,
              axis.text.x = element_text(color = "black", size = 15),
              axis.title.x = element_text(color = "black", size = 15),
              axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 15),
              axis.title.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 15)) +
        guides(color = guide_legend(title = "Distance\nFrom Edge (m)"))
          
    fig_dist <- ggplot(data = summary_dist,
                      mapping = aes(x = urb_cat_dist,
                                    y = perc_comp,
                                    col = dfe,
                                    group = dfe)) +   # ensures consistent dodging
      scale_color_manual(values = c("grey","black","lightblue")) +
      
      
        # y limits 
        ylim(axes_limits_medians$ymin_dist[i],axes_limits_medians$ymax_dist[i]) +
      
        # Points
        geom_point(position = dodge, size = 4) +
        
        # Error bars
        geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper),
                      width = 0.3,
                      position = dodge,
                      linewidth = 1.2) +
      
        # Raw data points
        geom_point(
          data = AmbientPMCompxUNESites,
          aes(x = urb_cat_isa,
              y = .data[[element]],
              col = dfe),
          position = position_jitterdodge(
            jitter.width = 0.15,
            dodge.width = 0.3
          ),
          alpha = 0.15,
          size = 1.5,
          inherit.aes = FALSE
        ) +
        
        # Significance letters
        geom_text(aes(label = letter, y = upper),
                  position = dodge,
                  hjust = 0.5,
                  vjust = -0.3,
                  size = 5,
                  fontface = "bold") +
        geom_text(aes(label = LETTER, y = lower), 
                    position = dodge, 
                    hjust=0.5, 
                    vjust=1.3, 
                    size = 5, 
                    fontface = "bold") +
        
        # Annotate text for p-values
         annotate(geom = "text", x = 0.5, y = Inf, size = 3,
                 label = paste(
                   "Distance from Edge: p", ifelse(ambient_PM_art_pvals$Edge_vs_Interior[i] > 0.001,
                                                  paste("=", ambient_PM_art_pvals$Edge_vs_Interior[i]),
                                                  " < 0.001"),
                   "\nUrban vs. Rural: p", ifelse(ambient_PM_art_pvals$Urb_v_Rural_Dist[i] > 0.001,
                                                  paste("=", ambient_PM_art_pvals$Urb_v_Rural_Dist[i]),
                                                  " < 0.001"),
                   "\nDfE X Urb. Cat.: p", ifelse(ambient_PM_art_pvals$Interaction_Dist[i] > 0.001,
                                                  paste("=", ambient_PM_art_pvals$Interaction_Dist[i]),
                                                  " < 0.001")),
                 hjust = 0, vjust = 1) +
        
        # Labels and theme
        labs(title = "Ambient PM", x = NULL, y = paste("%",element)) +
        theme_minimal() +
        theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 25),
              legend.position = "none",
              panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
              panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
              axis.line = element_line(colour = "black"),
              aspect.ratio = 1,
              axis.text.x = element_text(color = "black", size = 15),
              axis.title.x = element_text(color = "black", size = 15),
              axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 15),
              axis.title.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 15))
    
    fig_pub <- ggplot(data = summary_isa,
                      mapping = aes(x = urb_cat_isa,
                                    y = perc_comp,
                                    col = dfe,
                                    group = dfe)) +   # ensures consistent dodging
      scale_color_manual(values = c("grey","black","lightblue")) +

      
        # y limits 
        ylim(axes_limits_medians$ymin_isa[i],axes_limits_medians$ymax_isa[i]) +
        
        # Points
        geom_point(position = dodge, size = 4) +
        
        # Error bars
        geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper),
                      width = 0.3,
                      position = dodge,
                      linewidth = 1.2) +
      
        # Raw data points
        geom_point(
          data = AmbientPMCompxUNESites,
          aes(x = urb_cat_isa,
              y = .data[[element]],
              col = dfe),
          position = position_jitterdodge(
            jitter.width = 0.15,
            dodge.width = 0.3
          ),
          alpha = 0.15,
          size = 1.5,
          inherit.aes = FALSE
        ) +
        # Significance letters
        geom_text(aes(label = letter, y = upper),
                  position = dodge,
                  hjust = 0.5,
                  vjust = -0.3,
                  size = 5,
                  fontface = "bold") +
        geom_text(aes(label = LETTER, y = lower), 
                  position = dodge, 
                  hjust=0.5, 
                  vjust=1.3, 
                  size = 5, 
                  fontface = "bold") +
        
        # Annotate text for p-values
         annotate(geom = "text", x = 0.5, y = Inf, size = 3,
                 label = paste(
                   "Distance from Edge: p", ifelse(ambient_PM_art_pvals$Edge_vs_Interior[i] > 0.001,
                                                  paste("=", ambient_PM_art_pvals$Edge_vs_Interior[i]),
                                                  " < 0.001"),
                   "\nUrban vs. Rural: p", ifelse(ambient_PM_art_pvals$Urb_v_Rural_ISA[i] > 0.001,
                                                  paste("=", ambient_PM_art_pvals$Urb_v_Rural_ISA[i]),
                                                  " < 0.001"),
                   "\nDfE X Urb. Cat.: p", ifelse(ambient_PM_art_pvals$Interaction_ISA[i] > 0.001,
                                                  paste("=", ambient_PM_art_pvals$Interaction_ISA[i]),
                                                  " < 0.001")),
                 hjust = 0, vjust = 1) +
        
        # Labels and theme
        labs(title = "Ambient PM", x = NULL, y = paste("%",element)) +
        theme_minimal() +
        theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 18, hjust = 0.5),
              legend.position = "none",
              panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
              panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
              axis.line = element_line(colour = "black"),
              aspect.ratio = 1,
              axis.text.x = element_text(color = "black", size = 15),
              axis.title.x = element_text(color = "black", size = 15),
              axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 15),
              axis.title.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 15)) +
        guides(color = guide_legend(title = "Distance\nFrom Edge (m)"))
      
figs <- plot_grid(fig_isa,fig_dist,labels=NULL,ncol=1,rel_widths=c(1,1))


ambient_element_urbcatxdfe_medians_list_isa[[element]] <- fig_isa
ambient_element_urbcatxdfe_medians_list_dist[[element]] <- fig_dist
ambient_element_urbcatxdfe_medians_list_isa_pub[[element]] <- fig_pub
ambient_element_urbcatxdfe_medians_list[[element]] <- figs  # Store each figure in the list we made

# printing figure
ggsave(paste(element,"ambient_urbcatxdfe_jit.png"), path = file.path(figures_dir,"Elements/Urban vs. Rural/Medians/Ambient"), plot = figs, width = 4,
  height = 8, bg = "white")
}

```

#### Comparing Ambient & Foliar Medians
```{r}

# calculating medians for both ambient & foliar groups

        AvFmedians <- matrix(data=NA, nrow=2, ncol=26)
        colnames(AvFmedians) <- all_element_names
        rownames(AvFmedians) <- c("Ambient Median","Foliar Median")
        
  for (i in c(1:26)) {
    
  element <- all_element_names[i]
  summary <- cbind(aggregate(AllCompxUNESites_NOopen[element],
                             list(AllCompxUNESites_NOopen$particle_source),FUN=ci95_median_boot))
  summary <- as.matrix(summary)
  colnames(summary) <- c("particle_source","perc_comp","lower","upper")
  summary <- as.data.frame(summary)
  
  AvFmedians[1,i] <- summary$perc_comp[1]
  AvFmedians[2,i] <- summary$perc_comp[2]
  
  }

# making the figure 

  # creating a list for figures
  all_element_cat_list_median <- list()
  all_element_cat_list_median_nocap <- list()
  
  # loop to make categorical figures
  
  for (i in c(1:26)) {
    
  element <- all_element_names[i]
  summary <- cbind(aggregate(AllCompxUNESites_NOopen[element],
                             list(AllCompxUNESites_NOopen$particle_source),FUN=ci95_median_boot))
  summary <- as.matrix(summary)
  colnames(summary) <- c("particle_source","perc_comp","lower","upper")
  summary <- as.data.frame(summary)
  summary$perc_comp <- as.numeric(summary$perc_comp)
  summary$lower     <- as.numeric(summary$lower)
  summary$upper     <- as.numeric(summary$upper)
  
    # add in significance letter associated with each group
        
        summary$letter <- NA
    
        summary$letter[1] <- allPM_art_pairwise[i,3]
        summary$letter[2] <- allPM_art_pairwise[i,4]
          
  
  fig <- ggplot(data=summary, aes(x=particle_source, y=perc_comp, col=particle_source)) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("#B7C9E2", "darkgreen")) +
    labs(title = NULL,
         x = NULL, 
         y = paste("%", element)) +
    theme_minimal() + 
    annotate(geom = "text", x = Inf, y = Inf, hjust = 0,
             vjust = 1, size = 5, 
             label=paste("p",ifelse(allPM_art_pairwise$`Ambient - Foliar`[i]>0.001,
                                paste("=",allPM_art_pairwise$`Ambient - Foliar`[i]),
                                " < 0.001"))) +
    geom_text(data = summary,
      aes(label = letter, y = upper), position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), hjust=0.5, vjust=-0.5, size = 6, fontface = "bold") +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(size=25),
          legend.position = "right",
          panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
          panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
          axis.line = element_line(colour = "black"),
          aspect.ratio = 1,
          axis.text.x = element_text(color = "black", size=15),
          axis.title.x = element_text(color = "black", size=15),
          axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", size=15),
          axis.title.y = element_text(color = "black", size=15)) +
    scale_y_continuous(
    labels = label_number(accuracy = 0.01)) +
    ylim((min(summary$lower)-((max(summary$upper)-min(summary$lower))*0.1)),
         (max(summary$upper)+(max(summary$upper)-min(summary$lower))*0.1))+
    theme(legend.position = "none") +
        # Points
        geom_point(position = dodge, size = 4) +
        # Error bars
        geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper),
                      width = 0.3,
                      position = dodge,
                      linewidth = 1.2) +
        # Raw data points
        geom_point(
          data = AllCompxUNESites_NOopen,
          aes(x = particle_source,
              y = .data[[element]],
              col = particle_source),
          position = position_jitterdodge(
            jitter.width = 0.15,
            dodge.width = 0.3
          ),
          alpha = 0.15,
          size = 1.5,
          inherit.aes = FALSE
        ) 

# creating a version without the text annotation to add to a multipanel figure
  
  fig_nocap <- ggplot(data=summary, aes(x=particle_source, y=perc_comp, col=particle_source)) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("#B7C9E2", "darkgreen")) +
    labs(title = "",
         x = "", 
         y = paste("%", element)) +
    theme_minimal() + 
    geom_text(data = summary,
      aes(label = letter, y = upper), position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), hjust=0.5, vjust=-0.7, size = 3, fontface = "bold") +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(size=25),
          legend.position = "right",
          panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
          panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
          axis.line = element_line(colour = "black"),
          aspect.ratio = 1,
          axis.text.x = element_text(color = "black", size=10),
          axis.title.x = element_text(color = "black", size=15),
          axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", size=10),
          axis.title.y = element_text(color = "black", size=10)) +
    guides(color = guide_legend(title = "Particle Source")) +
    scale_y_continuous(
    labels = label_number(accuracy = 0.01)) +
    theme(legend.position="none") +
    # Error bars
      geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper),
                      width = 0.3,
                      position = dodge,
                      linewidth = 1.2) +
      
    # Raw data points
      geom_point(
          data = AllCompxUNESites_NOopen,
          aes(x = particle_source,
              y = .data[[element]],
              col = particle_source),
          position = position_jitterdodge(
            jitter.width = 0.15,
            dodge.width = 0.3
          ),
          alpha = 0.15,
          size = 1.5,
          inherit.aes = FALSE
        ) 
  
  all_element_cat_list_median[[element]] <- fig  # Store each figure in the list we made
  all_element_cat_list_median_nocap[[element]] <- fig_nocap
  
  # printing figure
  ggsave(paste(element,"all_cat_jit.png"), plot = fig, path = file.path(figures_dir,"Elements/Ambient vs. Foliar/Medians"), width = 5,
    height = 5, bg = "white")
  }
```

```{r}
# calculating medians for both ambient & foliar groups
        
  for (i in c(1:26)) {

  # creating a list for figures

  # loop to make categorical figures
  
  for (i in c(1:26)) {

  summary <- cbind(aggregate(AllCompxUNESites_NOopen[element],
                             list(AllCompxUNESites_NOopen$particle_source,

  summary <- as.matrix(summary)

  summary <- as.data.frame(summary)

    height = 5, bg = "white")
  }
```

#### Combining Them
```{r}

for (i in c(1:26)) {
  element <- element_names[i]
  
  # putting both the ambient + foliar figures by distance to Boston together
    dist_fig <- plot_grid(ambient_element_urbcatxdfe_medians_list_dist[[element]],
                     foliar_element_urbcatxdfe_medians_list_dist[[element]],
                      labels=NULL,ncol=2)
    dist_fig <- plot_grid(dist_fig,
                          ggdraw() + draw_label(
                            label = "by Distance to Boston",
                            size = 12,
                            x = 0.5,
                            hjust = 0.5
                            ),
                          ncol = 1,
                          rel_heights = c(1, 0.08)
                          )
    
    # putting both the ambient + foliar figures by %ISA together
    isa_fig <- plot_grid(ambient_element_urbcatxdfe_medians_list_isa[[element]],
                     foliar_element_urbcatxdfe_medians_list_isa[[element]],
                      labels=NULL,ncol=2)
    isa_fig <- plot_grid(isa_fig,
                          ggdraw() + draw_label(
                            "by %ISA",
                            size = 12,
                            x = 0.5,
                            hjust = 0.5
                            ),
                          ncol = 1,
                          rel_heights = c(1, 0.08))
    
 # putting both the dist + ISA figures together + adding legend
    
  fig <- plot_grid(isa_fig,
                   dist_fig,
                   ncol = 1,
                   labels=NULL)
 
  fig <- plot_grid(fig, 
                   legendopen,
                   rel_widths = c(1, 0.3),
                   labels=NULL,ncol=2)
  
  # adding the ambient vs foliar figure
  
  Avf_fig <- all_element_cat_list_median_nocap[[element]]
  
  fig <- ggdraw(fig) + 
    draw_plot(Avf_fig,
            x = 0.67,   # horizontal position (0 = left, 1 = right)
            y = 0.01,  # vertical position (0 = bottom, 1 = top)
            width = 0.35,
            height = 0.35)
  
  
  
  # making labels for the Ambient v Foliar p-values to append. i'm using the ART values because they were the same as the K-W values
  
  label <- paste0("Ambient vs. Foliar: p ",
                      ifelse(allPM_art_pairwise$`Ambient - Foliar`[allPM_art_pairwise$Element==element]>0.001,
                             paste(" =",allPM_art_pairwise$`Ambient - Foliar`[allPM_art_pairwise$Element==element]),
                             " < 0.001"))
  
  # putting them all together
  
  fig <- ggdraw(fig) +
    draw_label(label,
    x = 0.96, y = 0.32,
    hjust = 1,
    size = 9)
    
ggsave(paste(element,"_urbcatxdfe_jit.png"), plot = fig, path = file.path(figures_dir,"Elements/Urban vs. Rural/Medians"), width = 9,
  height = 8, bg = "white")
}
    
```

### Plotting Individual Sites
#### Foliar
```{r}
# defining list of element names
element_names <- all_element_names

# creating a list for figures
foliar_element_site_list <- list()


# loop to make categorical figures 

for (i in c(1:26)) {
  
element <- element_names[i] 

# summarize the element by urbanization and distance from edge
    summary <- cbind(aggregate(FoliarPMCompxUNESites[[element]],list(FoliarPMCompxUNESites$UNE_site,FoliarPMCompxUNESites$dfe),FUN=ci95_median_boot))
    summary <- as.matrix(summary)
    colnames(summary) <- c("site","dfe","perc_comp","lower","upper")
    summary <- as.data.frame(summary)
    summary$perc_comp <- as.numeric(summary$perc_comp)
    summary$lower     <- as.numeric(summary$lower)
    summary$upper     <- as.numeric(summary$upper)

# figures
      
  dodge <- position_dodge(width = 0.3)

    fig <- ggplot(data = summary,
                      mapping = aes(x = site,
                                    y = perc_comp,
                                    col = dfe,
                                    group = dfe)) +   # ensures consistent dodging
      scale_color_manual(values = c("grey","black")) +
      
      
        # Points
        geom_point(position = dodge, size = 3) +
        
        # Error bars
        geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper),
                      width = 0.2,
                      position = dodge) +

        # Labels and theme
        labs(title = "Foliar PM", x = "UNE Site", y = paste0("% ", element)) +
        theme_minimal() +
        theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 25),
              legend.position = "none",
              panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
              panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
              axis.line = element_line(colour = "black"),
              axis.text.x = element_text(color = "black", size = 15),
              axis.title.x = element_text(color = "black", size = 15),
              axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 15),
              axis.title.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 15)) 
          

foliar_element_site_list[[element]] <- fig  # Store each figure in the list we made

# printing figure
ggsave(paste(element,"foliar_sites.png"), plot = fig, path = file.path(figures_dir,"Elements/By Site"), width = 8,
  height = 4, bg = "white")
}

```

#### Ambient
```{r}
# defining list of element names
element_names <- all_element_names

# creating a list for figures
ambient_element_site_list <- list()

# loop to make categorical figures 

for (i in c(1:26)) {
  
element <- element_names[i] 

# summarize the element by urbanization and distance from edge
    summary <- cbind(aggregate(AmbientPMCompxUNESites[[element]],list(AmbientPMCompxUNESites$UNE_site,AmbientPMCompxUNESites$dfe),FUN=ci95_median_boot))
    summary <- as.matrix(summary)
    colnames(summary) <- c("site","dfe","perc_comp","lower","upper")
    summary <- as.data.frame(summary)
    summary$perc_comp <- as.numeric(summary$perc_comp)
    summary$lower     <- as.numeric(summary$lower)
    summary$upper     <- as.numeric(summary$upper)
      
# figures
      
  dodge <- position_dodge(width = 0.3)

    fig <- ggplot(data = summary,
                      mapping = aes(x = site,
                                    y = perc_comp,
                                    col = dfe)) +   # ensures consistent dodging
      scale_color_manual(values = c("grey","black","lightblue")) +
      
        # Points
        geom_point(position = dodge, size = 3) +
        
        # Error bars
        geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper),
                      width = 0.2,
                      position = dodge) +
        
        # Labels and theme
        labs(title = "Ambient PM", x = "UNE", y = paste("%",element)) +
        theme_minimal() +
        theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 25),
              legend.position = "none",
              panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
              panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
              axis.line = element_line(colour = "black"),
              axis.text.x = element_text(color = "black", size = 15),
              axis.title.x = element_text(color = "black", size = 15),
              axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 15),
              axis.title.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 15)) +
        guides(color = guide_legend(title = "Distance\nFrom Edge (m)"))


ambient_element_site_list[[element]] <- fig

# printing figure
ggsave(paste(element,"ambient_sites.png"), path = file.path(figures_dir,"Elements/By Site"), plot = fig, width = 8,
  height = 4, bg = "white")
}

```

## Categorical Plots for Each Element by Edge Type and Edge/Interior
### Foliar
```{r, eval=FALSE}

# creating a list for figures
foliar_element_edgetypexdfe_list <- list()

# loop to make categorical figures

for (i in c(1:26)) {
  
element <- foliar_element_names[i]
summary <- cbind(aggregate(FoliarPMCompxUNESites[element],
                           list(FoliarPMCompxUNESites$dfe,FoliarPMCompxUNESites$edge_type),FUN=mean),
                 aggregate(FoliarPMCompxUNESites[element],
                           list(FoliarPMCompxUNESites$dfe,FoliarPMCompxUNESites$edge_type),FUN=stderr))
summary <- summary[,c(1:3,6)]
colnames(summary) <- c("dfe","edge_type","perc_comp","se")

# adding annotation to the figure
  # get current y range
    y_max <- max(summary$perc_comp)+max(summary$se)
    
  # calculating an annotation position
    text_pos <- y_max + 0.25 * (y_max)
    
  # add in the significance letter associated with each group
      summary$letter <- NA
      summary$letter[1] <- foliar_PM_art_pairwise_edgetype$nonroad0[i-11]
      summary$letter[2] <- foliar_PM_art_pairwise_edgetype$nonroad90[i-11]
      summary$letter[3] <- foliar_PM_art_pairwise_edgetype$road0[i-11]
      summary$letter[4] <- foliar_PM_art_pairwise_edgetype$road90[i-11]
      
  # add in maximum for y axis in each group (for positioning letter)
      summary$max <- NA
      summary$max[1] <- summary$perc_comp[1]+summary$se[1]+(max(summary$perc_comp))*0.01
      summary$max[2] <- summary$perc_comp[2]+summary$se[2]+(max(summary$perc_comp))*0.01
      summary$max[3] <- summary$perc_comp[3]+summary$se[3]+(max(summary$perc_comp))*0.01
      summary$max[4] <- summary$perc_comp[4]+summary$se[4]+(max(summary$perc_comp))*0.01

fig <-
  ggplot(data=summary,mapping=aes(x=edge_type,y=perc_comp,col=dfe)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("grey","black")) +
  geom_point(position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), size = 3) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = perc_comp - se, ymax = perc_comp + se), 
                width = 0.2, 
                position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +
  labs(title = paste(element),
       x = "Edge Type", 
       y = paste("%",element)) +
  theme_minimal() +   
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size=25)) +
  theme(legend.position="none") +
  annotate(geom = "text", x=0.5, y=text_pos, size = 3, label=paste(
    "Distance from Edge: p",ifelse(foliar_PM_art_pvals_edgetype$Edge_vs_Interior[i-11]>0.001,paste("=",foliar_PM_art_pvals_edgetype$Edge_vs_Interior[i-11])," < 0.001"),
    "\nRoad vs. Nonroad: p",ifelse(foliar_PM_art_pvals_edgetype$Edge_Type[i-11]>0.001,paste("=",foliar_PM_art_pvals_edgetype$Edge_Type[i-11])," < 0.001"),
    "\nDfE X Urb. Cat.: p",ifelse(foliar_PM_art_pvals_edgetype$Interaction[i-11]>0.001,paste("=",foliar_PM_art_pvals_edgetype$Interaction[i-11])," < 0.001")),
           hjust=0,
           vjust=1) +
  geom_text(aes(label = letter, y = max), position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), hjust=0.5, vjust=0, size = 5, fontface = "bold") +
  guides(color = guide_legend(title = "Distance\nFrom Edge (m)")) +
  theme(panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        axis.line = element_line(colour = "black"),
        aspect.ratio = 1,
        axis.text.x = element_text(color = "black",size=15),
        axis.title.x = element_text(color = "black",size=15),
        axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black",size=15),
        axis.title.y = element_text(color = "black",size=15))

foliar_element_edgetypexdfe_list[[i-11]] <- fig  # Store each figure in the list we made

# printing figure
ggsave(paste(element,"foliar_edgetypexdfe.png"), plot = fig, path = file.path(figures_dir,"Elements/Road vs. Nonroad/Foliar"), width = 4,
  height = 4, bg = "white")
}

foliar_elements <- grid.arrange(grobs = foliar_element_edgetypexdfe_list, ncol = 6)

ggsave("foliar_elements_edgetypexdfe.png", plot = foliar_elements, path = file.path(figures_dir,"Elements/Road vs. Nonroad/Foliar"), width = 22, height = 22, bg = "white")

```

```{r, eval=FALSE}
ambient_element_edgetypexdfe_list <- list()

# loop to make categorical figures

for (i in c(5:47)) {

summary <- summary[,c(1:3,6)]

  # add in the significance letter associated with each group

      summary$max[5] <- summary$perc_comp[5]+summary$se[5]+(max(summary$perc_comp))*0.01
      summary$max[6] <- summary$perc_comp[6]+summary$se[6]+(max(summary$perc_comp))*0.01
      
# adding annotation to the figure
  # get current y range
    y_max <- max(summary$perc_comp)+max(summary$se)
    
  # calculating an annotation position
    text_pos <- y_max + 0.25 * (y_max)

fig <-
  ggplot(data=summary,mapping=aes(x=edge_type,y=perc_comp,col=dfe)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("grey","black","lightblue")) +
  geom_point(position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), size = 3) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = perc_comp - se, ymax = perc_comp + se), 
                width = 0.2, 
                position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +
  labs(title = paste(element),
       x = "Edge Type", 
       y = paste("%",element)) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size=25)) +
  theme(legend.position="none") +
  geom_text(aes(label = letter, y = max), position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), hjust=0.5, vjust=0, size = 5, fontface = "bold") +
  annotate(geom = "text", x=0.5, y=text_pos, size = 3, label=paste(
    "Distance from Edge: p",ifelse(ambient_PM_art_pvals_edgetype$Edge_vs_Interior[i-4]>0.001,paste("=",ambient_PM_art_pvals_edgetype$Edge_vs_Interior[i-4])," < 0.001"),
    "\nRoad vs. Nonroad: p",ifelse(ambient_PM_art_pvals_edgetype$Edge_Type[i-4]>0.001,paste("=",ambient_PM_art_pvals_edgetype$Edge_Type[i-4])," < 0.001"),
    "\nDfE X Edge Type: p",ifelse(ambient_PM_art_pvals_edgetype$Interaction[i-4]>0.001,paste("=",ambient_PM_art_pvals_edgetype$Interaction[i-4])," < 0.001")),
           hjust=0,
           vjust=1) +
  guides(color = guide_legend(title = "Distance\nFrom Edge (m)")) +
  theme(panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        axis.line = element_line(colour = "black"),
        aspect.ratio = 1,
        axis.text.x = element_text(color = "black",size=15),
        axis.title.x = element_text(color = "black",size=15),
        axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black",size=15),
        axis.title.y = element_text(color = "black",size=15))

# printing figure

  height = 4, bg = "white")
```

### Medians
#### Foliar
```{r}
# defining list of element names
element_names <- all_element_names

# creating a list for figures
foliar_element_edgetypexdfe_medians_list <- list()

# loop to make categorical figures 

for (i in c(1:26)) {
  
element <- element_names[i] 

# summarize the element by urbanization and distance from edge
    summary <- cbind(aggregate(FoliarPMCompxUNESites[[element]],list(FoliarPMCompxUNESites$edge_type,FoliarPMCompxUNESites$dfe),FUN=ci95_median_boot))
    summary <- as.matrix(summary)
    colnames(summary) <- c("edge_type","dfe","perc_comp","lower","upper")
    summary <- as.data.frame(summary)
    summary$perc_comp <- as.numeric(summary$perc_comp)
    summary$lower     <- as.numeric(summary$lower)
    summary$upper     <- as.numeric(summary$upper)
 
  # add in the significance letter associated with each group
      summary$letter <- NA
      summary$letter[1] <- foliar_PM_art_edgetype_pairwise$nonroad0[foliar_PM_art_edgetype_pairwise$Element==element]
      summary$letter[2] <- foliar_PM_art_edgetype_pairwise$road0[foliar_PM_art_edgetype_pairwise$Element==element]
      summary$letter[3] <- foliar_PM_art_edgetype_pairwise$nonroad90[foliar_PM_art_edgetype_pairwise$Element==element]
      summary$letter[4] <- foliar_PM_art_edgetype_pairwise$road90[foliar_PM_art_edgetype_pairwise$Element==element]
      
      summary$LETTER <- NA
      summary$LETTER[1] <- allPM_nonroadedge_kw_pairwise$`Foliar`[allPM_nonroadedge_kw_pairwise$Element==element]
      summary$LETTER[2] <- allPM_roadedge_kw_pairwise$`Foliar`[allPM_roadedge_kw_pairwise$Element==element]
      summary$LETTER[3] <- allPM_nonroadinterior_kw_pairwise$`Foliar`[allPM_nonroadinterior_kw_pairwise$Element==element]
      summary$LETTER[4] <- allPM_roadinterior_kw_pairwise$`Foliar`[allPM_roadinterior_kw_pairwise$Element==element]

# figures
      
  dodge <- position_dodge(width = 0.3)

    fig <- ggplot(data = summary,
                      mapping = aes(x = edge_type,
                                    y = perc_comp,
                                    col = dfe,
                                    group = dfe)) +   # ensures consistent dodging
      scale_color_manual(values = c("grey","black")) +
      
        # y limits 
        ylim(axes_limits_medians$ymin_isa[i],axes_limits_medians$ymax_isa[i]) +
      
        # Points
        geom_point(position = dodge, size = 3) +
        
        # Error bars
        geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper),
                      width = 0.2,
                      position = dodge) +
        
        # Significance letters
        geom_text(aes(label = letter, y = upper),
                  position = dodge,
                  hjust = 0.5,
                  vjust = -0.3,
                  size = 5,
                  fontface = "bold") +
        geom_text(aes(label = LETTER, y = lower), 
                  position = dodge, 
                  hjust=0.5, 
                  vjust = 1.3, 
                  size = 5, 
                  fontface = "bold") +
  
        
        # Annotate text for p-values
        annotate(geom = "text", x = 0.5, y = Inf, size = 3,
                 label = paste(
                   "Distance from Edge: p", ifelse(foliar_PM_art_edgetype_pvals$Edge_vs_Interior[i] > 0.001,
                                                  paste("=", foliar_PM_art_edgetype_pvals$Edge_vs_Interior[i]),
                                                  " < 0.001"),
                   "\nRoad vs. Nonroad: p", ifelse(foliar_PM_art_edgetype_pvals$Edge_Type[i] > 0.001,
                                                  paste("=", foliar_PM_art_edgetype_pvals$Edge_Type[i]),
                                                  " < 0.001"),
                   "\nDfE X Edge Type: p", ifelse(foliar_PM_art_edgetype_pvals$Interaction[i] > 0.001,
                                                  paste("=", foliar_PM_art_edgetype_pvals$Interaction[i]),
                                                  " < 0.001")),
                 hjust = 0, vjust = 1) +
        
        # Labels and theme
        labs(title = "Foliar PM", x = NULL, y = " ") +
        theme_minimal() +
        theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 25),
              legend.position = "none",
              panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
              panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
              axis.line = element_line(colour = "black"),
              aspect.ratio = 1,
              axis.text.x = element_text(color = "black", size = 15),
              axis.title.x = element_text(color = "black", size = 15),
              axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 15),
              axis.title.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 15)) 


foliar_element_edgetypexdfe_medians_list[[element]] <- fig  # Store each figure in the list we made

# printing figure
ggsave(paste(element,"foliar_edgetypexdfe.png"), path = file.path(figures_dir,"Elements/Road vs. Nonroad/Medians/Foliar"), plot = fig, width = 4,
  height = 8, bg = "white")
}

```

```{r}
         annotate(geom = "text", x = 0.5, y = Inf, size = 3,
```

## Each element by %ISA
### Scatterplots
```{r}
# defining list of element names
element_names <- all_element_names

# creating a list for figures
fol_element_isa_list_dfe <- list()
amb_element_isa_list_dfe <- list()
element_isa_list_urb <- list()

for (i in c(1:26)) {
  
element <- all_element_names[i] 

    # spearman rank correlation for the two variables
      all <- cor.test(y=FoliarPMCompxUNESites[[element]],x=FoliarPMCompxUNESites$ISA, method = 'spearman')
      edge <- cor.test(y=FoliarPMCompxUNESites[[element]][FoliarPMCompxUNESites$dfe == 0], x=FoliarPMCompxUNESites$ISA[FoliarPMCompxUNESites$dfe == 0], method = 'spearman')
      interior <- cor.test(y=FoliarPMCompxUNESites[[element]][FoliarPMCompxUNESites$dfe == 90], x=FoliarPMCompxUNESites$ISA[FoliarPMCompxUNESites$dfe == 90], method = 'spearman')
      urban <- cor.test(y=FoliarPMCompxUNESites[[element]][FoliarPMCompxUNESites$urb_cat_isa == "Urban"], x=FoliarPMCompxUNESites$ISA[FoliarPMCompxUNESites$urb_cat_isa == "Urban"], method = 'spearman')
      rural <- cor.test(y=FoliarPMCompxUNESites[[element]][FoliarPMCompxUNESites$urb_cat_isa == "Rural"], x=FoliarPMCompxUNESites$ISA[FoliarPMCompxUNESites$urb_cat_isa == "Rural"], method = 'spearman')
      
    # making significant lines solid and non-significant lines dashed
      edgeline <- ifelse(edge$p.value < 0.05, "solid", "dashed")
      interiorline <- ifelse(interior$p.value < 0.05, "solid", "dashed")
      urbanline <- ifelse(urban$p.value < 0.05, "solid", "dashed")
      ruralline <- ifelse(rural$p.value < 0.05, "solid", "dashed")
      
    # making labels
      label_dfe <- paste0("Edge: rho = ",signif(edge$estimate, digits = 2),
                        ifelse(edge$p.value > 0.001,
                               paste(", p =",signif(edge$p.value,digits=2)), " , p < 0.001"),
                        "\nInterior: rho = ",signif(interior$estimate, digits = 2),
                        ifelse(interior$p.value > 0.001,
                               paste(", p =",signif(interior$p.value,digits=2)), " , p < 0.001"),
                        "\nAll: rho = ",signif(all$estimate, digits = 2),
                        ifelse(all$p.value > 0.001,
                               paste(", p =",signif(all$p.value, digits = 2)), " , p < 0.001")
                        )
      
      label_urb <- paste0("Urban: rho = ",signif(urban$estimate, digits = 2),
                        ifelse(urban$p.value > 0.001,
                               paste(", p =",signif(urban$p.value,digits=2)), " , p < 0.001"),
                        "\nRural: rho = ",signif(rural$estimate, digits = 2),
                        ifelse(rural$p.value > 0.001,
                               paste(", p =",signif(rural$p.value,digits=2)), " , p < 0.001"),
                        "\nAll: rho = ",signif(all$estimate, digits = 2),
                        ifelse(all$p.value > 0.001,
                               paste(", p =",signif(all$p.value, digits = 2)), " , p < 0.001")
                        )
      
    
# figures

fol_element_ISA_dfe <- 
  ggplot(data=FoliarPMCompxUNESites,mapping=aes(x=ISA,y=.data[[element]],col=dfe)) +
  geom_point(position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), size = 3) +
  theme_minimal() +   
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size=25),
                  legend.position = "right",
                  panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
                  panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
                  axis.line = element_line(colour = "black"),
                  axis.text.x = element_text(color = "black", size=15),
                  axis.title.x = element_text(color = "black", size=15),
                  axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", size=15),
                  axis.title.y = element_text(color = "black", size=15),
                  axis.ticks = element_line(linewidth = 0.5),
                  plot.margin = margin(10, 10, 10, 10)) +
            guides(color = guide_legend(title = "Distance\nFrom Edge (m)")) +
  xlab("% ISA (Impervious Surface Area)") +
  ylab(paste("%",element)) +
  labs(title = " ") +
  guides(color = guide_legend(title = "Distance\nFrom Edge (m)")) +
  theme(axis.title=element_text(size=15))+
  scale_color_manual(values=c("#999999", "#060000")) +
  geom_smooth(data = subset(FoliarPMCompxUNESites, dfe == 0),
                          method = "lm",
                          se = FALSE,
                          linetype = edgeline, na.rm = TRUE) +
  geom_smooth(data = subset(FoliarPMCompxUNESites, dfe == 90),
                          method = "lm",
                          se = FALSE,
                          linetype = interiorline, na.rm = TRUE) +
  geom_text(x = Inf, y = Inf, hjust = 1, vjust = 1, size = 4,
                      label = label_dfe, inherit.aes = FALSE)

fol_element_ISA_urb <- 
  ggplot(data=FoliarPMCompxUNESites,mapping=aes(x=ISA,y=.data[[element]],col=urb_cat_isa)) +
  geom_point(position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), size = 3) +
  theme_minimal() +   
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size=25),
                  legend.position = "right",
                  panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
                  panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
                  axis.line = element_line(colour = "black"),
                  axis.text.x = element_text(color = "black", size=15),
                  axis.title.x = element_text(color = "black", size=15),
                  axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", size=15),
                  axis.title.y = element_text(color = "black", size=15),
                  axis.ticks = element_line(linewidth = 0.5),
                  plot.margin = margin(10, 10, 10, 10)) +
  labs(title = " ") +
  xlab("% ISA (Impervious Surface Area)") +
  ylab(paste("%",element)) +
  guides(color = guide_legend(title = "Urb. Category \nby %ISA")) +
  theme(axis.title=element_text(size=15))+
  scale_color_manual(values=c("#eab676", "#154c79")) +
  geom_smooth(data = subset(FoliarPMCompxUNESites, urb_cat_isa == "Urban"),
                          method = "lm",
                          se = FALSE,
                          linetype = urbanline, na.rm = TRUE) +
  geom_smooth(data = subset(FoliarPMCompxUNESites, urb_cat_isa == "Rural"),
                          method = "lm",
                          se = FALSE,
                          linetype = ruralline, na.rm = TRUE) +
  geom_text(x = Inf, y = Inf, hjust = 1, vjust = 1, size = 4,
                      label = label_urb, inherit.aes = FALSE)


    # spearman rank correlation for the two variables
      all <- cor.test(y=AmbientPMCompxUNESites[[element]],x=AmbientPMCompxUNESites$ISA, method = 'spearman')
      edge <- cor.test(y=AmbientPMCompxUNESites[[element]][AmbientPMCompxUNESites$dfe == 0], x=AmbientPMCompxUNESites$ISA[AmbientPMCompxUNESites$dfe == 0], method = 'spearman')
      interior <- cor.test(y=AmbientPMCompxUNESites[[element]][AmbientPMCompxUNESites$dfe == 90], x=AmbientPMCompxUNESites$ISA[AmbientPMCompxUNESites$dfe == 90], method = 'spearman')
      open <- cor.test(y=AmbientPMCompxUNESites[[element]][AmbientPMCompxUNESites$dfe == "Open"], x=AmbientPMCompxUNESites$ISA[AmbientPMCompxUNESites$dfe == "Open"], method = 'spearman')
      urban <- cor.test(y=AmbientPMCompxUNESites[[element]][AmbientPMCompxUNESites$urb_cat_isa == "Urban"], x=AmbientPMCompxUNESites$ISA[AmbientPMCompxUNESites$urb_cat_isa == "Urban"], method = 'spearman')
      rural <- cor.test(y=AmbientPMCompxUNESites[[element]][AmbientPMCompxUNESites$urb_cat_isa == "Rural"], x=AmbientPMCompxUNESites$ISA[AmbientPMCompxUNESites$urb_cat_isa == "Rural"], method = 'spearman')
      
    # making significant lines solid and non-significant lines dashed
      edgeline <- ifelse(edge$p.value < 0.05, "solid", "dashed")
      interiorline <- ifelse(interior$p.value < 0.05, "solid", "dashed")
      openline <- ifelse(open$p.value < 0.05, "solid", "dashed")
      urbanline <- ifelse(urban$p.value < 0.05, "solid", "dashed")
      ruralline <- ifelse(rural$p.value < 0.05, "solid", "dashed")
      
    # making labels
      label_dfe <- paste0("Edge: rho = ",signif(edge$estimate, digits = 2),
                        ifelse(edge$p.value > 0.001,
                               paste(", p =",signif(edge$p.value,digits=2)), " , p < 0.001"),
                        "\nInterior: rho = ",signif(interior$estimate, digits = 2),
                        ifelse(interior$p.value > 0.001,
                               paste(", p =",signif(interior$p.value,digits=2)), " , p < 0.001"),
                        "\nOpen: rho = ",signif(open$estimate, digits = 2),
                        ifelse(open$p.value > 0.001,
                               paste(", p =",signif(open$p.value,digits=2)), " , p < 0.001"),
                        "\nAll: rho = ",signif(all$estimate, digits = 2),
                        ifelse(all$p.value > 0.001,
                               paste(", p =",signif(all$p.value, digits = 2)), " , p < 0.001")
                        )
      
      label_urb <- paste0("Urban: rho = ",signif(urban$estimate, digits = 2),
                        ifelse(urban$p.value > 0.001,
                               paste(", p =",signif(urban$p.value,digits=2)), " , p < 0.001"),
                        "\nRural: rho = ",signif(rural$estimate, digits = 2),
                        ifelse(rural$p.value > 0.001,
                               paste(", p =",signif(rural$p.value,digits=2)), " , p < 0.001"),
                        "\nAll: rho = ",signif(all$estimate, digits = 2),
                        ifelse(all$p.value > 0.001,
                               paste(", p =",signif(all$p.value, digits = 2)), " , p < 0.001")
                        )

  geom_smooth(data = subset(AmbientPMCompxUNESites, dfe == 0),

  geom_smooth(data = subset(AmbientPMCompxUNESites, dfe == 90),

amb_element_ISA_urb <- 
  ggplot(data=AmbientPMCompxUNESites,mapping=aes(x=ISA,y=.data[[element]],col=urb_cat_isa)) +
  geom_point(position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), size = 3) +

  geom_smooth(data = subset(AmbientPMCompxUNESites, urb_cat_isa == "Rural"),

amb_figs <- plot_grid(amb_element_ISA_dfe,
                  amb_element_ISA_urb,
                  ncol=2, rel_widths=c(1,1))

amb_figs_labeled <- ggdraw(amb_figs) +
  draw_label(
    "Ambient PM",
    x = 0.5,    # centered horizontally
    y = 0.98,   # near top
    hjust = 0.5,
    vjust = 1,
    size = 22
  )


fol_figs <- plot_grid(fol_element_ISA_dfe,
                  fol_element_ISA_urb,
                  ncol=2, rel_widths=c(1,1))

fol_figs_labeled <- ggdraw(fol_figs) +
  draw_label(
    "Foliar PM",
    x = 0.5,    # centered horizontally
    y = 0.98,   # near top
    hjust = 0.5,
    vjust = 1,
    size = 22
  )

figs <- plot_grid(amb_figs_labeled,
                  fol_figs_labeled,
                  ncol=1
                  )

fol_element_isa_list_dfe[[element]] <- fol_element_ISA_dfe
amb_element_isa_list_dfe[[element]] <- amb_element_ISA_dfe

# printing figure
ggsave(paste(element,"_ISA.png"), path = file.path(figures_dir,"Elements/ISA"), plot = figs, width = 20,
  height = 12, bg = "white")

}
```

### Regressions with Site Means
```{r, eval=FALSE}
# defining list of element names
element_names <- all_element_names

# creating a list for figures
element_isa_list_cat <- list()
element_isa_list_urb <- list()

for (i in c(1:26)) {
  
element <- all_element_names[i] 

# summarize the element by urbanization, distance from edge, and %ISA
    summary <- cbind(aggregate(FoliarPMCompxUNESites[[element]],                          list(FoliarPMCompxUNESites$UNE_site,FoliarPMCompxUNESites$dfe,FoliarPMCompxUNESites$urb_cat_isa),FUN=mean,na.rm=TRUE),
                     aggregate(FoliarPMCompxUNESites[[element]],                            list(FoliarPMCompxUNESites$UNE_site,FoliarPMCompxUNESites$dfe,FoliarPMCompxUNESites$urb_cat_isa),FUN=stderr,na.rm=TRUE),
                     aggregate(FoliarPMCompxUNESites$ISA,                          list(FoliarPMCompxUNESites$UNE_site,FoliarPMCompxUNESites$dfe,FoliarPMCompxUNESites$urb_cat_isa),FUN=mean,na.rm=TRUE))
    summary <- summary[,c(1:4,8,12)]
    colnames(summary) <- c("site","dfe","urb_cat_isa","perc_comp","se","ISA")

fol_element_ISA_dfe <- 
  ggplot(data=summary,mapping=aes(x=ISA,y=perc_comp,col=dfe)) +
  geom_smooth(method=lm,se=FALSE)+
  geom_point(position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), size = 3) +
  theme(panel.background = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 1)) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12), 
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12)) +
  theme(axis.line.x = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
        axis.line.y = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5)) +
  xlab("% ISA (Impervious Surface Area)") +
  ylab(paste("%",element)) +
```
