## Each element by Distance to Boston
### Scatterplots
```{r}

# defining list of element names
element_names <- all_element_names

# creating a list for figures
fol_element_dist_list_dfe <- list()
amb_element_dist_list_dfe <- list()

for (i in c(1:26)) {
  
element <- all_element_names[i] 

### 
    # spearman rank correlation for the two variables
      all <- cor.test(y=FoliarPMCompxUNESites[[element]],x=FoliarPMCompxUNESites$distance_to_boston, method = 'spearman')
      edge <- cor.test(y=FoliarPMCompxUNESites[[element]][FoliarPMCompxUNESites$dfe == 0], x=FoliarPMCompxUNESites$distance_to_boston[FoliarPMCompxUNESites$dfe == 0], method = 'spearman')
      interior <- cor.test(y=FoliarPMCompxUNESites[[element]][FoliarPMCompxUNESites$dfe == 90], x=FoliarPMCompxUNESites$distance_to_boston[FoliarPMCompxUNESites$dfe == 90], method = 'spearman')
      urban <- cor.test(y=FoliarPMCompxUNESites[[element]][FoliarPMCompxUNESites$urb_cat_dist == "Urban"], x=FoliarPMCompxUNESites$distance_to_boston[FoliarPMCompxUNESites$urb_cat_dist == "Urban"], method = 'spearman')
      rural <- cor.test(y=FoliarPMCompxUNESites[[element]][FoliarPMCompxUNESites$urb_cat_dist == "Rural"], x=FoliarPMCompxUNESites$distance_to_boston[FoliarPMCompxUNESites$urb_cat_dist == "Rural"], method = 'spearman')
      
    # making significant lines solid and non-significant lines dashed
      edgeline <- ifelse(edge$p.value < 0.05, "solid", "dashed")
      interiorline <- ifelse(interior$p.value < 0.05, "solid", "dashed")
      urbanline <- ifelse(urban$p.value < 0.05, "solid", "dashed")
      ruralline <- ifelse(rural$p.value < 0.05, "solid", "dashed")
      
    # making labels
      label_dfe <- paste0("Edge: rho = ",signif(edge$estimate, digits = 2),
                        ifelse(edge$p.value > 0.001,
                               paste(", p =",signif(edge$p.value,digits=2)), " , p < 0.001"),
                        "\nInterior: rho = ",signif(interior$estimate, digits = 2),
                        ifelse(interior$p.value > 0.001,
                               paste(", p =",signif(interior$p.value,digits=2)), " , p < 0.001"),
                        "\nAll: rho = ",signif(all$estimate, digits = 2),
                        ifelse(all$p.value > 0.001,
                               paste(", p =",signif(all$p.value, digits = 2)), " , p < 0.001")
                        )
      
      label_urb <- paste0("Urban: rho = ",signif(urban$estimate, digits = 2),
                        ifelse(urban$p.value > 0.001,
                               paste(", p =",signif(urban$p.value,digits=2)), " , p < 0.001"),
                        "\nRural: rho = ",signif(rural$estimate, digits = 2),
                        ifelse(rural$p.value > 0.001,
                               paste(", p =",signif(rural$p.value,digits=2)), " , p < 0.001"),
                        "\nAll: rho = ",signif(all$estimate, digits = 2),
                        ifelse(all$p.value > 0.001,
                               paste(", p =",signif(all$p.value, digits = 2)), " , p < 0.001")
                        )
      
    
# figures

fol_element_dist_dfe <- 
  ggplot(data=FoliarPMCompxUNESites,mapping=aes(x=distance_to_boston,y=.data[[element]],col=dfe)) +
  geom_point(position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), size = 3) +
  theme_minimal() +   
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size=25),
                  legend.position = "right",
                  panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
                  panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
                  axis.line = element_line(colour = "black"),
                  axis.text.x = element_text(color = "black", size=15),
                  axis.title.x = element_text(color = "black", size=15),
                  axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", size=15),
                  axis.title.y = element_text(color = "black", size=15),
                  axis.ticks = element_line(linewidth = 0.5),
                  plot.margin = margin(10, 10, 10, 10)) +
            guides(color = guide_legend(title = "Distance\nFrom Edge (m)")) +
  xlab("Distance to Boston (km)") +
  ylab(paste("%",element)) +
  labs(title = " ") +
  guides(color = guide_legend(title = "Distance\nFrom Edge (m)")) +
  theme(axis.title=element_text(size=15))+
  scale_color_manual(values=c("#999999", "#060000")) +
  geom_smooth(data = subset(FoliarPMCompxUNESites, dfe == 0),
                          method = "lm",
                          se = FALSE,
                          linetype = edgeline, na.rm = TRUE) +
  geom_smooth(data = subset(FoliarPMCompxUNESites, dfe == 90),
                          method = "lm",
                          se = FALSE,
                          linetype = interiorline, na.rm = TRUE) +
  geom_text(x = Inf, y = Inf, hjust = 1, vjust = 1, size = 4,
                      label = label_dfe, inherit.aes = FALSE)

fol_element_dist_urb <- 
  ggplot(data=FoliarPMCompxUNESites,mapping=aes(x=distance_to_boston,y=.data[[element]],col=urb_cat_dist)) +
  geom_point(position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), size = 3) +
  theme_minimal() +   
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size=25),
                  legend.position = "right",
                  panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
                  panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
                  axis.line = element_line(colour = "black"),
                  axis.text.x = element_text(color = "black", size=15),
                  axis.title.x = element_text(color = "black", size=15),
                  axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", size=15),
                  axis.title.y = element_text(color = "black", size=15),
                  axis.ticks = element_line(linewidth = 0.5),
                  plot.margin = margin(10, 10, 10, 10)) +
  labs(title = " ") +
  xlab("Distance to Boston (km)") +
  ylab(paste("%",element)) +
  guides(color = guide_legend(title = "Urb. Category by \nDistance to Boston")) +
  theme(axis.title=element_text(size=15))+
  scale_color_manual(values=c("#eab676", "#154c79")) +
  geom_smooth(data = subset(FoliarPMCompxUNESites, urb_cat_dist == "Urban"),
                          method = "lm",
                          se = FALSE,
                          linetype = urbanline, na.rm = TRUE) +
  geom_smooth(data = subset(FoliarPMCompxUNESites, urb_cat_dist == "Rural"),
                          method = "lm",
                          se = FALSE,
                          linetype = ruralline, na.rm = TRUE) +
  geom_text(x = Inf, y = Inf, hjust = 1, vjust = 1, size = 4,
                      label = label_urb, inherit.aes = FALSE)


    # spearman rank correlation for the two variables
      all <- cor.test(y=AmbientPMCompxUNESites[[element]],x=AmbientPMCompxUNESites$distance_to_boston, method = 'spearman')
      edge <- cor.test(y=AmbientPMCompxUNESites[[element]][AmbientPMCompxUNESites$dfe == 0], x=AmbientPMCompxUNESites$distance_to_boston[AmbientPMCompxUNESites$dfe == 0], method = 'spearman')
      interior <- cor.test(y=AmbientPMCompxUNESites[[element]][AmbientPMCompxUNESites$dfe == 90], x=AmbientPMCompxUNESites$distance_to_boston[AmbientPMCompxUNESites$dfe == 90], method = 'spearman')
      open <- cor.test(y=AmbientPMCompxUNESites[[element]][AmbientPMCompxUNESites$dfe == "Open"], x=AmbientPMCompxUNESites$distance_to_boston[AmbientPMCompxUNESites$dfe == "Open"], method = 'spearman')
      urban <- cor.test(y=AmbientPMCompxUNESites[[element]][AmbientPMCompxUNESites$urb_cat_dist == "Urban"], x=AmbientPMCompxUNESites$distance_to_boston[AmbientPMCompxUNESites$urb_cat_dist == "Urban"], method = 'spearman')
      rural <- cor.test(y=AmbientPMCompxUNESites[[element]][AmbientPMCompxUNESites$urb_cat_dist == "Rural"], x=AmbientPMCompxUNESites$distance_to_boston[AmbientPMCompxUNESites$urb_cat_dist == "Rural"], method = 'spearman')
      
    # making significant lines solid and non-significant lines dashed
      edgeline <- ifelse(edge$p.value < 0.05, "solid", "dashed")
      interiorline <- ifelse(interior$p.value < 0.05, "solid", "dashed")
      openline <- ifelse(open$p.value < 0.05, "solid", "dashed")
      urbanline <- ifelse(urban$p.value < 0.05, "solid", "dashed")
      ruralline <- ifelse(rural$p.value < 0.05, "solid", "dashed")
      
    # making labels
      label_dfe <- paste0("Edge: rho = ",signif(edge$estimate, digits = 2),
                        ifelse(edge$p.value > 0.001,
                               paste(", p =",signif(edge$p.value,digits=2)), " , p < 0.001"),
                        "\nInterior: rho = ",signif(interior$estimate, digits = 2),
                        ifelse(interior$p.value > 0.001,
                               paste(", p =",signif(interior$p.value,digits=2)), " , p < 0.001"),
                        "\nOpen: rho = ",signif(open$estimate, digits = 2),
                        ifelse(open$p.value > 0.001,
                               paste(", p =",signif(open$p.value,digits=2)), " , p < 0.001"),
                        "\nAll: rho = ",signif(all$estimate, digits = 2),
                        ifelse(all$p.value > 0.001,
                               paste(", p =",signif(all$p.value, digits = 2)), " , p < 0.001")
                        )
      
      label_urb <- paste0("Urban: rho = ",signif(urban$estimate, digits = 2),
                        ifelse(urban$p.value > 0.001,
                               paste(", p =",signif(urban$p.value,digits=2)), " , p < 0.001"),
                        "\nRural: rho = ",signif(rural$estimate, digits = 2),
                        ifelse(rural$p.value > 0.001,
                               paste(", p =",signif(rural$p.value,digits=2)), " , p < 0.001"),
                        "\nAll: rho = ",signif(all$estimate, digits = 2),
                        ifelse(all$p.value > 0.001,
                               paste(", p =",signif(all$p.value, digits = 2)), " , p < 0.001")
                        )
      
amb_element_dist_dfe <- 
  ggplot(data=AmbientPMCompxUNESites,mapping=aes(x=distance_to_boston,y=.data[[element]],col=dfe)) +
  geom_point(position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), size = 3) +

  geom_smooth(data = subset(AmbientPMCompxUNESites, dfe == 0),

  geom_smooth(data = subset(AmbientPMCompxUNESites, dfe == 90),
```

```{r, eval=FALSE}
    summary <- cbind(aggregate(FoliarPMCompxUNESites[[element]],                          list(FoliarPMCompxUNESites$UNE_site,FoliarPMCompxUNESites$dfe,FoliarPMCompxUNESites$urb_cat_dist),FUN=mean,na.rm=TRUE),
                     aggregate(FoliarPMCompxUNESites[[element]],                            list(FoliarPMCompxUNESites$UNE_site,FoliarPMCompxUNESites$dfe,FoliarPMCompxUNESites$urb_cat_dist),FUN=stderr,na.rm=TRUE),
                     aggregate(FoliarPMCompxUNESites$distance_to_boston,                          list(FoliarPMCompxUNESites$UNE_site,FoliarPMCompxUNESites$dfe,FoliarPMCompxUNESites$urb_cat_dist),FUN=mean,na.rm=TRUE))
```

## Normality Testing
### Foliar
```{r, eval=FALSE}
# Histograms of each element
    
  # making an empty list to put the plots in
          foliar_histograms_list <- list()

    # loop
        
          for (col in names(FoliarPMCompxUNESites)[12:36]) {
            
               p <- ggplot(FoliarPMCompxUNESites, aes(x = .data[[col]])) + 
                  geom_histogram(bins = 30, fill = "skyblue", color = "black") +
                  ggtitle(paste("Histogram of", col)) +
                  theme_minimal()
                
                foliar_histograms_list[[col]] <- p  # Store each histogram in the list
        }
        
          foliar_histograms <- grid.arrange(grobs = foliar_histograms_list, ncol = 6)
        
    # printing figure
          ggsave("foliar_histograms.png", path = file.path(figures_dir,"Normality"), plot = foliar_histograms, width = 20,
                                                height = 20, bg = "white")

# Q-Q plots of each element
      
    # making an empty list to put the plots in
      foliar_QQ_plot_list <- list()
   
    # loop
     for (col in names(FoliarPMCompxUNESites)[12:36])  {
          p <- ggplot(data = FoliarPMCompxUNESites, aes(sample = .data[[col]])) + 
            stat_qq() +
            stat_qq_line() +
            ggtitle(paste("Q-Q Plot of", col)) +
            theme_minimal()
          
          foliar_QQ_plot_list[[col]] <- p  
        }
      
      foliar_QQplots <- grid.arrange(grobs = foliar_QQ_plot_list, ncol = 6)
    
    # printing figure

      ggsave("foliar_QQplots.png", plot = foliar_QQplots, path = file.path(figures_dir,"Normality"), width = 20,
                                            height = 20, bg = "white")

# Shapiro-Wilks statistics
  
    # setting up a table into which the loop will put the Shapiro-Wilks statistic for each element

      foliar_PMcomp_norm_test <- matrix(nrow=27,ncol=5)
      colnames(foliar_PMcomp_norm_test) <- c("element","SW_unt","SW_log","SW_sqrt","SW_inv")
      
    # loop for Shapiro-Wilks statistics on untransformed data as well as log-transformed, square root transformed, and inverse transformed

      for (i in c(12:36)) {
        
        SW_unt <- shapiro.test(FoliarPMCompxUNESites[,i])$p.value
        SW_log <- shapiro.test(log(FoliarPMCompxUNESites[,i]+1))$p.value
        SW_sqrt <- shapiro.test(sqrt(FoliarPMCompxUNESites[,i]))$p.value
        SW_inv <- shapiro.test(1/(FoliarPMCompxUNESites[,i]+0.00001))$p.value
          
        foliar_PMcomp_norm_test[i-11,1] <- colnames(FoliarPMCompxUNESites[i])
        foliar_PMcomp_norm_test[i-11,2] <- SW_unt
        foliar_PMcomp_norm_test[i-11,3] <- SW_log
        foliar_PMcomp_norm_test[i-11,4] <- SW_sqrt
        foliar_PMcomp_norm_test[i-11,5] <- SW_inv
    }

      # let's look at it 
      View(foliar_PMcomp_norm_test)
      
      # save it as a .csv
      write.csv(foliar_PMcomp_norm_test, file.path(stats_dir,"foliar_PMcomp_norm_test.csv"), row.names = FALSE)

# conclusion: not one of these variables is even close to being normal
      
```

### Ambient
```{r, eval=FALSE}
# Histograms of each element
    # making an empty list to put the plots in
          ambient_histograms_list <- list()

    # loop
        
          for (col in names(AmbientPMCompxUNESites)[5:47]) {
            
               p <- ggplot(AmbientPMCompxUNESites, aes(x = .data[[col]])) + 
                  geom_histogram(bins = 30, fill = "skyblue", color = "black") +
                  ggtitle(paste("Histogram of", col)) +
                  theme_minimal()
                
                ambient_histograms_list[[col]] <- p  # Store each histogram in the list
        }
        
          ambient_histograms <- grid.arrange(grobs = ambient_histograms_list, ncol = 6)
        
    # printing figure
          ggsave("ambient_histograms.png", plot = ambient_histograms, width = 20, path = file.path(figures_dir,"Normality"), height = 20, bg = "white")

# Q-Q plots of each element
      
    # making an empty list to put the plots in
      ambient_QQ_plot_list <- list()
   
    # loop
      for (col in names(AmbientPMCompxUNESites)[5:47]) {
          p <- ggplot(data = AmbientPMCompxUNESites, aes(sample = .data[[col]])) + 
            stat_qq() +
            stat_qq_line() +
            ggtitle(paste("Q-Q Plot of", col)) +
            theme_minimal()
          
          ambient_QQ_plot_list[[col]] <- p  
        }
  
      ambient_QQplots <- grid.arrange(grobs = ambient_QQ_plot_list, ncol = 6)
    
    # printing figure
      ggsave("ambient_QQplots.png", plot = ambient_QQplots, path = file.path(figures_dir,"Normality"), width = 20,
                                            height = 20, bg = "white")

# Shapiro-Wilks statistics
  
    # setting up a table into which the loop will put the Shapiro-Wilks statistic for each element

      ambient_PMcomp_norm_test <- matrix(nrow=44,ncol=5)
      colnames(ambient_PMcomp_norm_test) <- c("element","SW_unt","SW_log","SW_sqrt","SW_inv")
      
    # loop for Shapiro-Wilks statistics on untransformed data as well as log-transformed, square root transformed, and inverse transformed

      for (i in c(5:47)) {
        
        SW_unt <- shapiro.test(AmbientPMCompxUNESites[,i])$p.value
        SW_log <- shapiro.test(log(AmbientPMCompxUNESites[,i]+1))$p.value
        SW_sqrt <- shapiro.test(sqrt(AmbientPMCompxUNESites[,i]))$p.value
        SW_inv <- shapiro.test(1/(AmbientPMCompxUNESites[,i]+0.00001))$p.value
          
        ambient_PMcomp_norm_test[i-4,1] <- colnames(AmbientPMCompxUNESites[i])
        ambient_PMcomp_norm_test[i-4,2] <- SW_unt
        ambient_PMcomp_norm_test[i-4,3] <- SW_log
        ambient_PMcomp_norm_test[i-4,4] <- SW_sqrt
        ambient_PMcomp_norm_test[i-4,5] <- SW_inv
      }

      # let's look at it 
      View(ambient_PMcomp_norm_test)
      
      #save it as a .csv
      write.csv(ambient_PMcomp_norm_test, file.path(stats.dir,"ambient_PMcomp_norm_test.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
```

## Standardizing Axes (do NOT run every time, only when needed)
```{r, eval=FALSE}

# means

    # creating a matrix to hold the ymax & ymin values for each element
    axes_limits <- matrix(data=NA, nrow=27, ncol=9)
        colnames(axes_limits) <- c("Element",
                                   "ymin_isa_f","ymax_isa_f","ymin_isa_a","ymax_isa_a",
                                   "ymin_dist_f","ymax_dist_f","ymin_dist_a","ymax_dist_a")
        axes_limits[,1] <- foliar_element_names
        
    # then run the two sections below "Means": "Foliar & Ambient"
        
    axes_limits <- transform(axes_limits, ymin_isa = pmin(ymin_isa_f,ymin_isa_a))
    axes_limits <- transform(axes_limits, ymax_isa = pmax(ymax_isa_f,ymax_isa_a))
    axes_limits <- transform(axes_limits, ymin_dist = pmin(ymin_dist_f,ymin_dist_a))
    axes_limits <- transform(axes_limits, ymax_dist = pmax(ymax_dist_f,ymax_dist_a))
    
    # save it as a .csv
          write.csv(axes_limits, file.path(stats_dir,"axes_limits.csv") row.names = FALSE)
          
# medians          
          
    # creating a matrix to hold the ymax & ymin values for each element
    axes_limits_medians <- matrix(data=NA, nrow=27, ncol=9)
        colnames(axes_limits_medians) <- c("Element",
                                   "ymin_isa_f","ymax_isa_f","ymin_isa_a","ymax_isa_a",
                                   "ymin_dist_f","ymax_dist_f","ymin_dist_a","ymax_dist_a")
        axes_limits_medians[,1] <- foliar_element_names
        
    # then run the two sections below "Medians": "Foliar & Ambient"
        
    axes_limits_medians <- transform(axes_limits_medians, ymin_isa = pmin(ymin_isa_f,ymin_isa_a))
    axes_limits_medians <- transform(axes_limits_medians, ymax_isa = pmax(ymax_isa_f,ymax_isa_a))
    axes_limits_medians <- transform(axes_limits_medians, ymin_dist = pmin(ymin_dist_f,ymin_dist_a))
    axes_limits_medians <- transform(axes_limits_medians, ymax_dist = pmax(ymax_dist_f,ymax_dist_a))
    
    # save it as a .csv
          write.csv(axes_limits_medians, file.path(stats_dir,"axes_limits_medians.csv"), row.names = FALSE)

```

```{r}
         y = expression("Ambient PM"[2.5]*" ("*mu*"g m"^-3*")")) +

   LeafSEM_ANOVA_ISA$foliar_PM2.5 <- LeafSEM_ANOVA_ISA$foliar_PM2.5 + 
    theme(axis.title.x = element_text(color = "black", size = 15),

          axis.ticks = element_line(linewidth = 0.5),
          axis.ticks.length.x = unit(0, "cm")) + 
    labs(title = expression("Foliar PM"[2.5]),
         x = NULL)

  draw_plot(ambient_element_urbcatxdfe_medians_list_isa_pub$cations, x = 0,    y = 0, width = 0.52, height = 1) 
   
panelC <- ggdraw() +

  draw_plot(ambient_element_urbcatxdfe_medians_list_isa_pub$traffic, x = 0,    y = 0, width = 0.52, height = 1)   
  
panelD <- ggdraw() +

  draw_plot(ambient_element_urbcatxdfe_medians_list_isa_pub$Ca, x = -0.03,    y = 0, width = 0.55, height = 1)  
  
    
panelA <- ggdraw() +

  draw_plot(ambient_element_urbcatxdfe_medians_list_isa_pub$Al, x = -0.01,    y = 0, width = 0.54, height = 1) 

figX <- plot_grid(panelA, panelB,
                  panelC, panelD,
                  panelE,
                  ncol = 2,
                  labels = c("A","B","C","D","E"),
                  label_fontface = "bold",
                  label_size = 25)

# printing figure
ggsave("figX.png", plot = figX, path = file.path(figures_dir,"For Pub"), width = 12,
```

## Figure V
```{r}
# this panel draws from the other .Rmd file containing all the figures from the LeafSEM dataset, "2021_UNE_LeafSEM.Rmd". Be sure to run the entire section "# Continuous Comparisons by Distance from Boston, and %ISA > ## Linear Models" before running the chunk below

# manually adjusting to make dashed lines

    p <- LeafSEM_ISA_dfe_list$mean_stomatal_density
    p$layers <- p$layers[!sapply(p$layers, function(x) inherits(x$geom, "GeomSmooth"))]
    p <- p + geom_smooth(method = lm, se = FALSE, linetype = "dashed")
    LeafSEM_ISA_dfe_list$mean_stomatal_density <- p
    
    p <- LeafSEM_ISA_dfe_list$mean_sqrt_perc_occluded_hyphae
    p$layers <- p$layers[!sapply(p$layers, function(x) inherits(x$geom, "GeomSmooth"))]
    p <- p + geom_smooth(method = lm, se = FALSE, linetype = "dashed")
    LeafSEM_ISA_dfe_list$mean_sqrt_perc_occluded_hyphae <- p
    
    p <- LeafSEM_ISA_dfe_list$mean_log_ambient_PM2.5
    p$layers <- p$layers[!sapply(p$layers, function(x) inherits(x$geom, "GeomSmooth"))]
    p <- p +
      geom_smooth(aes(linetype = dfe),method=lm,se=FALSE) +
      scale_linetype_manual(values = c("solid", "dashed")) 
    LeafSEM_ISA_dfe_list$mean_log_ambient_PM2.5 <- p
    
    p <- LeafSEM_ISA_dfe_list$mean_log_perc_occluded
    p$layers <- p$layers[!sapply(p$layers, function(x) inherits(x$geom, "GeomSmooth"))]
    p <- p + geom_smooth(method = lm, se = FALSE, linetype = "dashed")
    LeafSEM_ISA_dfe_list$mean_log_perc_occluded <- p
    
    p <- LeafSEM_ISA_dfe_list$mean_sqrt_hyphal_conc
    p$layers <- p$layers[!sapply(p$layers, function(x) inherits(x$geom, "GeomSmooth"))]
    p <- p + geom_smooth(method = lm, se = FALSE, linetype = "dashed")
    LeafSEM_ISA_dfe_list$mean_sqrt_hyphal_conc <- p
    
    p <- LeafSEM_ISA_dfe_list$mean_log_foliar_PM2.5
    p$layers <- p$layers[!sapply(p$layers, function(x) inherits(x$geom, "GeomSmooth"))]
    p <- p +
      geom_smooth(aes(linetype = dfe),method=lm,se=FALSE)+
      scale_linetype_manual(values = c("solid", "dashed")) 
    LeafSEM_ISA_dfe_list$mean_log_foliar_PM2.5 <- p
    
    

figV <- plot_grid(
  LeafSEM_ISA_dfe_list$mean_log_ambient_PM2.5,
  LeafSEM_ISA_dfe_list$mean_stomatal_density,
  LeafSEM_ISA_dfe_list$mean_sqrt_perc_occluded_hyphae,
  LeafSEM_ISA_dfe_list$mean_log_foliar_PM2.5,
  LeafSEM_ISA_dfe_list$mean_log_perc_occluded,
  LeafSEM_ISA_dfe_list$mean_sqrt_hyphal_conc,
                  ncol = 3,
                  labels=c("A","B","C","D","E","F"),
                  label_fontface = "bold",
                  label_size = 22)

# printing figure
ggsave("figV.png", plot = figV, path = file.path(figures_dir,"For Pub"), width = 16,
  height = 9, bg = "white")

```

```{r}
# this figure draws from the other .Rmd file containing all the figures from the LeafSEM dataset, "2021_UNE_LeafSEM.Rmd". Be sure to run the entire section "Microbial" before running the chunk below

# adjusting figures

  # dashed lines
    p <- hyphal_conc_fg_plots_dfe$litter_sap
    p$layers <- p$layers[!sapply(p$layers, function(x) inherits(x$geom, "GeomSmooth"))]
    p <- p +
      geom_smooth(aes(linetype = dfe),method=lm,se=FALSE)+
    scale_linetype_manual(values = c("solid", "dashed")) 
    hyphal_conc_fg_plots_dfe$litter_sap <- p
    
    p <- hyphal_conc_fg_plots_urb$litter_sap
    p$layers <- p$layers[!sapply(p$layers, function(x) inherits(x$geom, "GeomSmooth"))]
    p <- p +
      geom_smooth(aes(linetype = urb_cat_isa),method=lm,se=FALSE)+
      scale_linetype_manual(values = c("dashed", "solid"))
    hyphal_conc_fg_plots_urb$litter_sap <- p
    
    p <- UNE_ABG_LeafSEM_dfe_list$mean_sqrt_hyphal_conc
    p$layers <- p$layers[!sapply(p$layers, function(x) inherits(x$geom, "GeomSmooth"))]
    p <- p +
      geom_smooth(aes(linetype = dfe),method=lm,se=FALSE)+
      scale_linetype_manual(values = c("solid","dashed")) +
      theme(legend.position="none") 
      #labs(y=expression(atop("Hyphae on Leaf Surface", "(mm hyphae mm"^-2* " leaf)")))
      #labs(y="Hyphae on Leaf Surface\n(mm hyphae mm⁻² leaf)")
    UNE_ABG_LeafSEM_dfe_list$mean_sqrt_hyphal_conc <- p
    
    p <- UNE_ABG_LeafSEM_urb_list$mean_sqrt_hyphal_conc
    p$layers <- p$layers[!sapply(p$layers, function(x) inherits(x$geom, "GeomSmooth"))]
    p <- p +
      geom_smooth(aes(linetype = urb_cat_isa),method=lm,se=FALSE)+
      scale_linetype_manual(values = c("dashed", "solid"))+
      theme(legend.position="none")
    UNE_ABG_LeafSEM_urb_list$mean_sqrt_hyphal_conc <- p
    
    
    
  # axis label
    hyphal_conc_fg_plots_dfe$litter_sap <- hyphal_conc_fg_plots_dfe$litter_sap +
      labs(y="Relative Abundance of \nLitter Saprotrophs (%)",
           x = expression("Hyphae (mm per mm"^-2*" leaf)"))
    
    hyphal_conc_fg_plots_urb$litter_sap <- hyphal_conc_fg_plots_urb$litter_sap +
      labs(y="Relative Abundance of \nLitter Saprotrophs (%)",
           x = expression("Hyphae (mm per mm"^-2*" leaf)"))

figT <- plot_grid(hyphal_conc_fg_plots_dfe$litter_sap,
                  hyphal_conc_fg_plots_urb$litter_sap,
                  UNE_ABG_LeafSEM_dfe_list$mean_sqrt_hyphal_conc,
                  UNE_ABG_LeafSEM_urb_list$mean_sqrt_hyphal_conc,
                  ncol=2)

# printing figure
ggsave("figT.png", plot = figT, path = file.path(figures_dir,"For Pub"), width = 12,
  height = 12, bg = "white")

```

```{r}
amb_element_dist_list_dfe$Na <- amb_element_dist_list_dfe$Na +
                                  theme(legend.position = "none")
```

# PCAs
## Individual Elements
### Foliar
```{r}
# creating new columns to group by both urbanization category and distance from edge
  FoliarPMCompxUNESites$urbcatisa_dfe <- paste(FoliarPMCompxUNESites$urb_cat_isa,
                                               ifelse(FoliarPMCompxUNESites$distance_from_edge.m. == 0,"Edge","Interior"), sep = "")
  FoliarPMCompxUNESites$urbcatdist_dfe <- paste(FoliarPMCompxUNESites$urb_cat_dist,
                                               ifelse(FoliarPMCompxUNESites$distance_from_edge.m. == 0,"Edge","Interior"), sep = "")  
# preparing for the PCA
    
    Leaf_Elements <- FoliarPMCompxUNESites[-194,12:33] # subsetting columns w element abundances
    Leaf_Labels <- FoliarPMCompxUNESites[-194,c(2,38:46)] # subsetting site properties

# PCA 

    FoliarPMPCA <- prcomp(Leaf_Elements,center=T, scale.=T)
    
    # making a data frame with the loadings for each element
    loadings_df <- data.frame(PC1 = FoliarPMPCA$rotation[,1], PC2 = FoliarPMPCA$rotation[,2])
    loadings_df$Variable <- rownames(loadings_df)
    
    # let's look at the loadings
    
      # PC1
      foliar_PC1_loadings <- ggplot(loadings_df, aes(x = reorder(Variable, -abs(PC1)), y = PC1)) +
            geom_bar(stat = "identity", fill = "steelblue") +
            coord_flip() +
            labs(title = "PC1 Loadings", x = "", y = "Loading Value") +
            theme_minimal() +
            theme(text = element_text(size = 30)) 

      
      # PC2
      foliar_PC2_loadings <- ggplot(loadings_df, aes(x = reorder(Variable, -abs(PC2)), y = PC2)) +
            geom_bar(stat = "identity", fill = "steelblue") +
            coord_flip() +
            labs(title = "PC2 Loadings", x = "", y = "Loading Value") +
            theme_minimal() +
            theme(text = element_text(size = 30)) 
        
        # printing loadings figures
          ggsave("foliar_PC1_loadings.png", path = file.path(figures_dir,"PCA/Individual Elements"), plot = foliar_PC1_loadings, width = 5,
            height = 10, bg = "white")
          ggsave("foliar_PC2_loadings.png", path = file.path(figures_dir,"PCA/Individual Elements"), plot = foliar_PC2_loadings, width = 5,
            height = 10, bg = "white")
                  
 # making a data frame with the loadings, sites, and site characteristics
      pca_df <- as.data.frame(cbind(FoliarPMPCA$x,Leaf_Labels))
      
# PCA Plot (Elements)
    
    foliar_PCA_elementsonly <- ggplot(loadings_df, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2)) +
    geom_point(size=1) +  
    labs(x = "PC1", y = "PC2") + 
    geom_text(data = loadings_df, aes(label = rownames(loadings_df)), hjust = 0, vjust = 0) +
    theme_minimal() 
    
    # printing figures
      ggsave("foliar_PCA_elementsonly.png", plot = foliar_PCA_elementsonly, path = file.path(figures_dir,"PCA/Individual Elements"), width = 5,
            height = 5, bg = "white")

# PCA Plots (UNE Sites)
     
    site_means <- pca_df %>% # taking the means of the PC1 and PC2 for each site
      group_by(UNE_site) %>%
      summarize(PC1 = mean(PC1), PC2 = mean(PC2), PC1_se=stderr(PC1), PC2_se=stderr(PC2))

    site_means <- left_join(site_means,UNESites,by="UNE_site") # adding other UNE site data to the site means

 # colored by urb_cat_isa             
    foliar_PCA_by_site_urb_cat_ISA <- ggplot(site_means, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color=urb_cat_isa)) +
        geom_point(size=5) +  
        labs(x = "PC1",
           y = "PC2") +
        guides(color = guide_legend(title = "Urbanization Category\nby % ISA")) +
        geom_text(data = site_means, aes(label = UNE_site, vjust = -1)) +
        theme_minimal() 
    
     # printing figure
        ggsave("foliar_PCA_by_site_urb_cat_ISA.png", plot = foliar_PCA_by_site_urb_cat_ISA, path = file.path(figures_dir,"PCA/Individual Elements"), width = 7,
          height = 6, bg = "white")

 # colored by urb_cat_dist             
    foliar_PCA_by_site_urb_cat_dist <- ggplot(site_means, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color=urb_cat_dist)) +
        geom_point(size=5) +  
        labs(x = "PC1",
           y = "PC2") +
        guides(color = guide_legend(title = "Urbanization Category\nby Distance to Boston")) +
        geom_text(data = site_means, aes(label = UNE_site, vjust = -1)) +
        theme_minimal() 
    
     # printing figure
        ggsave("foliar_PCA_by_site_urb_cat_dist.png", plot = foliar_PCA_by_site_urb_cat_dist, path = file.path(figures_dir,"PCA/Individual Elements"), width = 7,
          height = 6, bg = "white")        

 # colored by edge_type             
    foliar_PCA_by_site_edge_type <- ggplot(site_means, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color=edge_type)) +
        geom_point(size=5) +  
        labs(x = "PC1",
           y = "PC2") +
        guides(color = guide_legend(title = "Edge Type")) +
        scale_color_manual(values = c("#008040", "#63666A")) +
        geom_text(data = site_means, aes(label = UNE_site, vjust = -1)) +
        theme_minimal() 
    
     # printing figure
        ggsave("foliar_PCA_by_site_edge_type.png", plot = foliar_PCA_by_site_edge_type, path = file.path(figures_dir,"PCA/Individual Elements"), width = 7,
          height = 6, bg = "white")         

 # colored by ISA             
    foliar_PCA_by_site_ISA <- ggplot(site_means, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color=ISA)) +
        geom_point(size=5) +  
        labs(x = "PC1",
           y = "PC2") +
        scale_color_gradient(low = "#008040", high = "gray", guide = guide_colorbar()) +
        guides(color = guide_colorbar(title = "%ISA \nSurrounding \nSites")) +
        geom_text(data = site_means, aes(label = UNE_site, vjust = -1)) +
        theme_minimal() 
    
     # printing figure
        ggsave("foliar_PCA_by_site_ISA.png", plot = foliar_PCA_by_site_ISA, path = file.path(figures_dir,"PCA/Individual Elements"), width = 7,
          height = 6, bg = "white")          

 # colored by distance_to_boston             
    foliar_PCA_by_site_distance_to_boston <- ggplot(site_means, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color=distance_to_boston)) +
        geom_point(size=5) +  
        labs(x = "PC1",
           y = "PC2") +
        guides(color = guide_colorbar(title = "Distance to \nBoston (km)")) +
        scale_color_gradient(low = "#001133", high = "#B3CCFF", guide = guide_colorbar()) +
        geom_text(data = site_means, aes(label = UNE_site, vjust = -1)) +
        theme_minimal() 
    
     # printing figure
        ggsave("foliar_PCA_by_site_distance_to_boston.png", path = file.path(figures_dir,"PCA/Individual Elements"), plot = foliar_PCA_by_site_distance_to_boston, width = 7,
          height = 6, bg = "white")   
                                                      
# PCA Plots (UNE Sites + Distance from Edge)
        
    site_dfe_means <- pca_df %>% # taking the means of the PC1 and PC2 for each site & dfe
      group_by(UNE_site,dfe) %>%
      summarize(PC1 = mean(PC1), PC2 = mean(PC2))        

    foliar_PCA_by_site_dfe <- ggplot(site_dfe_means, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color=dfe)) +
        geom_point(size=5) +  
        labs(x = "PC1",
           y = "PC2") +
        guides(color = guide_legend(title = "Distance from Edge (m)")) +
        geom_text(data = site_dfe_means, aes(label = UNE_site, vjust = -1)) +
        theme_minimal() 
    
     # printing figure
        ggsave("foliar_PCA_by_site_dfe.png", plot = foliar_PCA_by_site_dfe, path = file.path(figures_dir,"PCA/Individual Elements"), width = 7,
          height = 6, bg = "white")      
            
# PCA biplot (by site types)
    
   foliar_PCA_biplot_site_type <- ggbiplot(FoliarPMPCA, groups = Leaf_Labels$urbcatisa_dfe, ellipse = TRUE, var.axes = TRUE) +
      coord_fixed(ratio = 0.5) +
      theme_minimal() + 
      theme(axis.text.x = element_text(color = "black",size=35),
        axis.title.x = element_text(color = "black",size=35),
        axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black",size=35),
        axis.title.y = element_text(color = "black",size=35)) 
   
   # printing figure
      ggsave("foliar_PCA_biplot_site_type.png", path = file.path(figures_dir,"PCA/Individual Elements"),plot = foliar_PCA_biplot_site_type, width = 10,
        height = 10, bg = "white")
      
# PCA biplot (with individual sites)
      
      foliar_PCA_biplot_site_name <- ggbiplot(FoliarPMPCA, groups = Leaf_Labels$site_name, ellipse = TRUE, var.axes = TRUE) +
      coord_fixed(ratio = 0.5) +
      theme_minimal() + 
      theme(axis.text.x = element_text(color = "black",size=35),
        axis.title.x = element_text(color = "black",size=35),
        axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black",size=35),
        axis.title.y = element_text(color = "black",size=35)) 
   
   # printing figure
      ggsave("foliar_PCA_biplot_site_name.png", path = file.path(figures_dir,"PCA/Individual Elements"), plot = foliar_PCA_biplot_site_name, width = 10,
        height = 10, bg = "white")
            

# there is a crazy outlier in this PCA, so I will identify it
  #    pca_df <- as.data.frame(FoliarPMPCA$x)
```

### Ambient
```{r}
# creating new columns to group by both urbanization category and distance from edge
  AmbientPMCompxUNESites$urbcatisa_dfe <- paste(AmbientPMCompxUNESites$urb_cat_isa,
                                               ifelse(AmbientPMCompxUNESites$dfe == 0,"Edge",
                                                      ifelse(AmbientPMCompxUNESites$dfe == 90,"Interior","Open")), sep = "")
  AmbientPMCompxUNESites$urbcatdist_dfe <- paste(AmbientPMCompxUNESites$urb_cat_dist,
                                               ifelse(AmbientPMCompxUNESites$dfe == 0,"Edge",
                                                      ifelse(AmbientPMCompxUNESites$dfe == 90,"Interior","Open")), sep = "")
# preparing for the PCA
    
    Ambient_Elements <- AmbientPMCompxUNESites[,5:44] # subsetting columns w element abundances
    Ambient_Labels <- AmbientPMCompxUNESites[,c(2:3,51:58)] # subsetting site properties


# PCA 

    AmbientPMPCA <- prcomp(Ambient_Elements,center=T, scale.=T)
    
    # making a data frame with the loadings for each element
    loadings_df <- data.frame(PC1 = AmbientPMPCA$rotation[,1], PC2 = AmbientPMPCA$rotation[,2],PC3 = AmbientPMPCA$rotation[,3],PC4 = AmbientPMPCA$rotation[,4])
    loadings_df$Variable <- rownames(loadings_df)
    
    # let's look at the loadings
    
      # PC1
      ambient_PC1_loadings <- ggplot(loadings_df, aes(x = reorder(Variable, -abs(PC1)), y = PC1)) +
            geom_bar(stat = "identity", fill = "steelblue") +
            coord_flip() +
            labs(title = "PC1 Loadings", x = "", y = "Loading Value") +
            theme_minimal() +
            theme(text = element_text(size = 30)) 

      
      # PC2
      ambient_PC2_loadings <- ggplot(loadings_df, aes(x = reorder(Variable, -abs(PC2)), y = PC2)) +
            geom_bar(stat = "identity", fill = "steelblue") +
            coord_flip() +
            labs(title = "PC2 Loadings", x = "", y = "Loading Value") +
            theme_minimal() +
            theme(text = element_text(size = 30))
      
      # PC3
      ambient_PC3_loadings <- ggplot(loadings_df, aes(x = reorder(Variable, -abs(PC3)), y = PC3)) +
            geom_bar(stat = "identity", fill = "steelblue") +
            coord_flip() +
            labs(title = "PC3 Loadings", x = "", y = "Loading Value") +
            theme_minimal() +
            theme(text = element_text(size = 30))
 
      # PC4
      ambient_PC4_loadings <- ggplot(loadings_df, aes(x = reorder(Variable, -abs(PC4)), y = PC4)) +
            geom_bar(stat = "identity", fill = "steelblue") +
            coord_flip() +
            labs(title = "PC4 Loadings", x = "", y = "Loading Value") +
            theme_minimal() +
            theme(text = element_text(size = 30))  
      
        # printing loadings figures
          ggsave("ambient_PC1_loadings.png", plot = ambient_PC1_loadings, path = file.path(figures_dir,"PCA/Individual Elements"), width = 5,
            height = 12, bg = "white")
          ggsave("ambient_PC2_loadings.png", plot = ambient_PC2_loadings, path = file.path(figures_dir,"PCA/Individual Elements"), width = 5,
            height = 12, bg = "white")
                  
 # making a data frame with the loadings, sites, and site characteristics
      pca_df <- as.data.frame(cbind(AmbientPMPCA$x,Ambient_Labels))
      
# PCA Plot (Elements)
    
    ambient_PCA_elementsonly <- ggplot(loadings_df, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2)) +
    geom_point(size=1) +  
    labs(x = "PC1", y = "PC2") + 
    geom_text(data = loadings_df, aes(label = rownames(loadings_df)), hjust = 0, vjust = 0) +
    theme_minimal()  # Apply minimal theme
    
    # printing figures
      ggsave("ambient_PCA_elementsonly.png", plot = ambient_PCA_elementsonly, path = file.path(figures_dir,"PCA/Individual Elements"), width = 5,
            height = 5, bg = "white")

# PCA Plots (UNE Sites)
     
    site_means <- pca_df %>% # taking the means of the PC1 and PC2 for each site
      group_by(UNE_site) %>%
      summarize(PC1 = mean(PC1), PC2 = mean(PC2), PC1_se=stderr(PC1), PC2_se=stderr(PC2))

    site_means <- left_join(site_means,UNESites,by="UNE_site") # adding other UNE site data to the site means

 # colored by urb_cat_isa             
    ambient_PCA_by_site_urb_cat_ISA <- ggplot(site_means, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color=urb_cat_isa)) +
        geom_point(size=5) +  
        labs(x = "PC1",
           y = "PC2") +
        guides(color = guide_legend(title = "Urbanization Category\nby % ISA")) +
        geom_text(data = site_means, aes(label = UNE_site, vjust = -1)) +
        theme_minimal() 
    
     # printing figure
        ggsave("ambient_PCA_by_site_urb_cat_ISA.png", plot = ambient_PCA_by_site_urb_cat_ISA, path = file.path(figures_dir,"PCA/Individual Elements"), width = 7,
          height = 6, bg = "white")

 # colored by urb_cat_dist

        geom_point(size=5) +  
        labs(x = "PC1",
           y = "PC2") +
        guides(color = guide_legend(title = "Urbanization Category\nby Distance to Boston")) +
        geom_text(data = site_means, aes(label = UNE_site, vjust = -1)) +
        theme_minimal() 
    
     # printing figure
        ggsave("ambient_PCA_by_site_urb_cat_dist.png", plot = ambient_PCA_by_site_urb_cat_dist, path = file.path(figures_dir,"PCA/Individual Elements"), width = 7,
          height = 6, bg = "white")        

 # colored by edge_type             
    ambient_PCA_by_site_edge_type <- ggplot(site_means, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color=edge_type)) +
        geom_point(size=5) +  
        labs(x = "PC1",
           y = "PC2") +
        guides(color = guide_legend(title = "Edge Type")) +
        scale_color_manual(values = c("#008040", "#63666A")) +
        geom_text(data = site_means, aes(label = UNE_site, vjust = -1)) +
        theme_minimal() 
    
     # printing figure
        ggsave("ambient_PCA_by_site_edge_type.png", plot = ambient_PCA_by_site_edge_type, path = file.path(figures_dir,"PCA/Individual Elements"), width = 7,
          height = 6, bg = "white")         

 # colored by ISA             
    ambient_PCA_by_site_ISA <- ggplot(site_means, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color=ISA)) +
        geom_point(size=5) +  
        labs(x = "PC1",
           y = "PC2") +
        scale_color_gradient(low = "#008040", high = "gray", guide = guide_colorbar()) +
        guides(color = guide_colorbar(title = "%ISA \nSurrounding \nSites")) +
        geom_text(data = site_means, aes(label = UNE_site, vjust = -1)) +
        theme_minimal() 
    
     # printing figure
        ggsave("ambient_PCA_by_site_ISA.png", plot = ambient_PCA_by_site_ISA, path = file.path(figures_dir,"PCA/Individual Elements"), width = 7,
          height = 6, bg = "white")          

 # colored by distance_to_boston             
    ambient_PCA_by_site_distance_to_boston <- ggplot(site_means, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color=distance_to_boston)) +
        geom_point(size=5) +  
        labs(x = "PC1",
           y = "PC2") +
        scale_color_gradient(low = "#001133", high = "#B3CCFF", guide = guide_colorbar()) +
        guides(color = guide_colorbar(title = "Distance to \nBoston (km)")) +

          height = 6, bg = "white")
```

## Grouped Elements
### Foliar
```{r}
# creating new columns to group by both urbanization category and distance from edge
  FoliarPMCompxUNESites$urbcatisa_dfe <- paste(FoliarPMCompxUNESites$urb_cat_isa,
                                               ifelse(FoliarPMCompxUNESites$distance_from_edge.m. == 0,"Edge","Interior"), sep = "")
  FoliarPMCompxUNESites$urbcatdist_dfe <- paste(FoliarPMCompxUNESites$urb_cat_dist,
                                               ifelse(FoliarPMCompxUNESites$distance_from_edge.m. == 0,"Edge","Interior"), sep = "")  
# preparing for the PCA
    
    Leaf_Elements <- FoliarPMCompxUNESites[,c(12,13,14,15,19,20,21,22,34:36)] # subsetting columns w element groups, and elements that are not included in any of these groups
    Leaf_Labels <- FoliarPMCompxUNESites[,c(2,38:46)] # subsetting site properties

# PCA 

    FoliarPMPCA <- prcomp(Leaf_Elements,center=T, scale.=T)
    
    # making a data frame with the loadings for each element
    loadings_df <- data.frame(PC1 = FoliarPMPCA$rotation[,1], PC2 = FoliarPMPCA$rotation[,2])
    loadings_df$Variable <- rownames(loadings_df)
    
    # let's look at the loadings
    
      # PC1
      foliar_PC1_loadings <- ggplot(loadings_df, aes(x = reorder(Variable, -abs(PC1)), y = PC1)) +
            geom_bar(stat = "identity", fill = "steelblue") +
            coord_flip() +
            labs(title = "PC1 Loadings", x = "", y = "Loading Value") +
            theme_minimal() +
            theme(text = element_text(size = 30)) 

      
      # PC2
      foliar_PC2_loadings <- ggplot(loadings_df, aes(x = reorder(Variable, -abs(PC2)), y = PC2)) +
            geom_bar(stat = "identity", fill = "steelblue") +
            coord_flip() +
            labs(title = "PC2 Loadings", x = "", y = "Loading Value") +
            theme_minimal() +
            theme(text = element_text(size = 30)) 
        
        # printing loadings figures
          ggsave("foliar_PC1_loadings_grouped.png", plot = foliar_PC1_loadings, path = file.path(figures_dir,"PCA/Grouped Elements"), width = 5,
            height = 10, bg = "white")
          ggsave("foliar_PC2_loadings_grouped.png", plot = foliar_PC2_loadings, path = file.path(figures_dir,"PCA/Grouped Elements"), width = 5,
            height = 10, bg = "white")
                  
 # making a data frame with the loadings, sites, and site characteristics
      pca_df <- as.data.frame(cbind(FoliarPMPCA$x,Leaf_Labels))
      
# PCA Plot (Elements)
    
    foliar_PCA_elementsonly <- ggplot(loadings_df, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2)) +
    geom_point(size=1) +  
    labs(x = "PC1", y = "PC2") + 
    geom_text(data = loadings_df, aes(label = rownames(loadings_df)), hjust = 0, vjust = 0) +
    theme_minimal()  # Apply minimal theme
    
    # printing figures
      ggsave("foliar_PCA_elementsonly_grouped.png", plot = foliar_PCA_elementsonly, path = file.path(figures_dir,"PCA/Grouped Elements"), width = 5,
            height = 5, bg = "white")

# PCA Plots (UNE Sites)
     
    site_means <- pca_df %>% # taking the means of the PC1 and PC2 for each site
      group_by(UNE_site) %>%
      summarize(PC1 = mean(PC1), PC2 = mean(PC2), PC1_se=stderr(PC1), PC2_se=stderr(PC2))

    site_means <- left_join(site_means,UNESites,by="UNE_site") # adding other UNE site data to the site means

 # colored by urb_cat_isa             
    foliar_PCA_by_site_urb_cat_ISA <- ggplot(site_means, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color=urb_cat_isa)) +
        geom_point(size=5) +  
        labs(x = "PC1",
           y = "PC2") +
        guides(color = guide_legend(title = "Urbanization Category\nby % ISA")) +
        geom_text(data = site_means, aes(label = UNE_site, vjust = -1)) +
        theme_minimal() 
    
     # printing figure
        ggsave("foliar_PCA_by_site_urb_cat_ISA_grouped.png", plot = foliar_PCA_by_site_urb_cat_ISA, path = file.path(figures_dir,"PCA/Grouped Elements"), width = 7,
          height = 6, bg = "white")

 # colored by urb_cat_dist             
    foliar_PCA_by_site_urb_cat_dist <- ggplot(site_means, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color=urb_cat_dist)) +
        geom_point(size=5) +  
        labs(x = "PC1",
           y = "PC2") +
        guides(color = guide_legend(title = "Urbanization Category\nby Distance to Boston")) +
        geom_text(data = site_means, aes(label = UNE_site, vjust = -1)) +
        theme_minimal() 
    
     # printing figure
        ggsave("foliar_PCA_by_site_urb_cat_dist_grouped.png", plot = foliar_PCA_by_site_urb_cat_dist, path = file.path(figures_dir,"PCA/Grouped Elements"), width = 7,
          height = 6, bg = "white")        

 # colored by edge_type             
    foliar_PCA_by_site_edge_type <- ggplot(site_means, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color=edge_type)) +
        geom_point(size=5) +  
        labs(x = "PC1",
           y = "PC2") +
        guides(color = guide_legend(title = "Edge Type")) +
        scale_color_manual(values = c("#008040", "#63666A")) +
        geom_text(data = site_means, aes(label = UNE_site, vjust = -1)) +
        theme_minimal() 
    
     # printing figure
        ggsave("foliar_PCA_by_site_edge_type_grouped.png", plot = foliar_PCA_by_site_edge_type, path = file.path(figures_dir,"PCA/Grouped Elements"), width = 7,
          height = 6, bg = "white")         

 # colored by ISA             
    foliar_PCA_by_site_ISA <- ggplot(site_means, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color=ISA)) +
        geom_point(size=5) +  
        labs(x = "PC1",
           y = "PC2") +
        scale_color_gradient(low = "#008040", high = "gray", guide = guide_colorbar()) +
        guides(color = guide_colorbar(title = "%ISA \nSurrounding \nSites")) +
        geom_text(data = site_means, aes(label = UNE_site, vjust = -1)) +
        theme_minimal() 
    
     # printing figure
        ggsave("foliar_PCA_by_site_ISA_grouped.png", plot = foliar_PCA_by_site_ISA, path = file.path(figures_dir,"PCA/Grouped Elements"), width = 7,
          height = 6, bg = "white")          

 # colored by distance_to_boston             
    foliar_PCA_by_site_distance_to_boston <- ggplot(site_means, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color=distance_to_boston)) +
        geom_point(size=5) +  
        labs(x = "PC1",
           y = "PC2") +
        scale_color_gradient(low = "#001133", high = "#B3CCFF", guide = guide_colorbar()) +
        guides(color = guide_colorbar(title = "Distance to \nBoston (km)")) +
        geom_text(data = site_means, aes(label = UNE_site, vjust = -1)) +
        theme_minimal() 
    
     # printing figure
        ggsave("foliar_PCA_by_site_distance_to_boston_grouped.png", plot = foliar_PCA_by_site_distance_to_boston, path = file.path(figures_dir,"PCA/Grouped Elements"), width = 7,
          height = 6, bg = "white")   
                                                      
# PCA Plots (UNE Sites + Distance from Edge)
        
    site_dfe_means <- pca_df %>% # taking the means of the PC1 and PC2 for each site & dfe
      group_by(UNE_site,dfe) %>%
      summarize(PC1 = mean(PC1), PC2 = mean(PC2))        

    foliar_PCA_by_site_dfe <- ggplot(site_dfe_means, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color=dfe)) +
        geom_point(size=5) +  
        labs(x = "PC1",
           y = "PC2") +
        guides(color = guide_legend(title = "Distance from Edge (m)")) +
        geom_text(data = site_dfe_means, aes(label = UNE_site, vjust = -1)) +
        theme_minimal() 
    
     # printing figure
        ggsave("foliar_PCA_by_site_dfe_grouped.png", plot = foliar_PCA_by_site_dfe, path = file.path(figures_dir,"PCA/Grouped Elements"), width = 7,
          height = 6, bg = "white")      
            
# PCA biplot (by site types)
    
   foliar_PCA_biplot_site_type <- ggbiplot(FoliarPMPCA, groups = Leaf_Labels$urbcatisa_dfe, ellipse = TRUE, var.axes = TRUE) +
      coord_fixed(ratio = 0.5) +
      theme_minimal() + 
      theme(axis.text.x = element_text(color = "black",size=35),
        axis.title.x = element_text(color = "black",size=35),
        axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black",size=35),
        axis.title.y = element_text(color = "black",size=35)) 
   
   # printing figure
      ggsave("foliar_PCA_biplot_site_type_grouped.png", plot = foliar_PCA_biplot_site_type, path = file.path(figures_dir,"PCA/Grouped Elements"), width = 10,
        height = 10, bg = "white")
      
# PCA biplot (with individual sites)
      
foliar_PCA_biplot_site_name <- ggbiplot(FoliarPMPCA, groups = Leaf_Labels$site_name, ellipse = TRUE, var.axes = TRUE) +
      coord_fixed(ratio = 0.5) +
      theme_minimal() + 
      theme(axis.text.x = element_text(color = "black",size=35),
        axis.title.x = element_text(color = "black",size=35),
        axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black",size=35),
        axis.title.y = element_text(color = "black",size=35))  
   
   # printing figure

      ggsave("foliar_PCA_biplot_site_name_grouped.png", plot = foliar_PCA_biplot_site_name, path = file.path(figures_dir,"PCA/Grouped Elements"), width = 10,
        height = 10, bg = "white")
      
```
### Ambient
```{r}
# creating new columns to group by both urbanization category and distance from edge
  AmbientPMCompxUNESites$urbcatisa_dfe <- paste(AmbientPMCompxUNESites$urb_cat_isa,
                                               ifelse(AmbientPMCompxUNESites$dfe == 0,"Edge",
                                                      ifelse(AmbientPMCompxUNESites$dfe == 90,"Interior","Open")), sep = "")
  AmbientPMCompxUNESites$urbcatdist_dfe <- paste(AmbientPMCompxUNESites$urb_cat_dist,
                                               ifelse(AmbientPMCompxUNESites$dfe == 0,"Edge",
                                                      ifelse(AmbientPMCompxUNESites$dfe == 90,"Interior","Open")), sep = "")
# preparing for the PCA
    
    Ambient_Elements <- AmbientPMCompxUNESites[,c(5,6,7,8,12,13,14,15,45:47)] # subsetting columns w element groups, and elements not included in any of these groups
    Ambient_Labels <- AmbientPMCompxUNESites[,c(2:3,51:58)] # subsetting site properties


# PCA 

    AmbientPMPCA <- prcomp(Ambient_Elements,center=T, scale.=T)
    
    # making a data frame with the loadings for each element
    loadings_df <- data.frame(PC1 = AmbientPMPCA$rotation[,1], PC2 = AmbientPMPCA$rotation[,2])
    loadings_df$Variable <- rownames(loadings_df)
    
    # let's look at the loadings
    
      # PC1
      ambient_PC1_loadings <- ggplot(loadings_df, aes(x = reorder(Variable, -abs(PC1)), y = PC1)) +
            geom_bar(stat = "identity", fill = "steelblue") +
            coord_flip() +
            labs(title = "PC1 Loadings", x = "", y = "Loading Value") +
            theme_minimal() +
            theme(text = element_text(size = 30)) 

      
      # PC2
      ambient_PC2_loadings <- ggplot(loadings_df, aes(x = reorder(Variable, -abs(PC2)), y = PC2)) +
            geom_bar(stat = "identity", fill = "steelblue") +
            coord_flip() +
            labs(title = "PC2 Loadings", x = "", y = "Loading Value") +
            theme_minimal() +
            theme(text = element_text(size = 30)) 
        
        # printing loadings figures
          ggsave("ambient_PC1_loadings_grouped.png", plot = ambient_PC1_loadings, path = file.path(figures_dir,"PCA/Grouped Elements"), width = 5,
            height = 10, bg = "white")
          ggsave("ambient_PC2_loadings_grouped.png", plot = ambient_PC2_loadings, path = file.path(figures_dir,"PCA/Grouped Elements"), width = 5,
            height = 10, bg = "white")
                  
 # making a data frame with the loadings, sites, and site characteristics
      pca_df <- as.data.frame(cbind(AmbientPMPCA$x,Ambient_Labels))
      
# PCA Plot (Elements)
    
    ambient_PCA_elementsonly <- ggplot(loadings_df, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2)) +
    geom_point(size=1) +  
    labs(x = "PC1", y = "PC2") + 
    geom_text(data = loadings_df, aes(label = rownames(loadings_df)), hjust = 0, vjust = 0) +
    theme_minimal()  # Apply minimal theme
    
    # printing figures
      ggsave("ambient_PCA_elementsonly_grouped.png", plot = ambient_PCA_elementsonly, path = file.path(figures_dir,"PCA/Grouped Elements"), width = 5,
            height = 5, bg = "white")

# PCA Plots (UNE Sites)
     
    site_means <- pca_df %>% # taking the means of the PC1 and PC2 for each site
      group_by(UNE_site) %>%
      summarize(PC1 = mean(PC1), PC2 = mean(PC2), PC1_se=stderr(PC1), PC2_se=stderr(PC2))

    site_means <- left_join(site_means,UNESites,by="UNE_site") # adding other UNE site data to the site means

 # colored by urb_cat_isa             
    ambient_PCA_by_site_urb_cat_ISA <- ggplot(site_means, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color=urb_cat_isa)) +
        geom_point(size=5) +  
        labs(x = "PC1",
           y = "PC2") +
        guides(color = guide_legend(title = "Urbanization Category\nby % ISA")) +
        geom_text(data = site_means, aes(label = UNE_site, vjust = -1)) +
        theme_minimal() 
    
     # printing figure
        ggsave("ambient_PCA_by_site_urb_cat_ISA_grouped.png", plot = ambient_PCA_by_site_urb_cat_ISA, path = file.path(figures_dir,"PCA/Grouped Elements"), width = 7,
          height = 6, bg = "white")

 # colored by urb_cat_dist             
    ambient_PCA_by_site_urb_cat_dist <- ggplot(site_means, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color=urb_cat_dist)) +
        geom_point(size=5) +  
        labs(x = "PC1",
           y = "PC2") +
        guides(color = guide_legend(title = "Urbanization Category\nby Distance to Boston")) +
        geom_text(data = site_means, aes(label = UNE_site, vjust = -1)) +
        theme_minimal() 
    
     # printing figure
        ggsave("ambient_PCA_by_site_urb_cat_dist_grouped.png", plot = ambient_PCA_by_site_urb_cat_dist, path = file.path(figures_dir,"PCA/Grouped Elements"), width = 7,
          height = 6, bg = "white")        

 # colored by edge_type             
    ambient_PCA_by_site_edge_type <- ggplot(site_means, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color=edge_type)) +
        geom_point(size=5) +  
        labs(x = "PC1",
           y = "PC2") +
        guides(color = guide_legend(title = "Edge Type")) +
        scale_color_manual(values = c("#008040", "#63666A")) +
        geom_text(data = site_means, aes(label = UNE_site, vjust = -1)) +
        theme_minimal() 
    
     # printing figure
        ggsave("ambient_PCA_by_site_edge_type_grouped.png", plot = ambient_PCA_by_site_edge_type, path = file.path(figures_dir,"PCA/Grouped Elements"), width = 7,
          height = 6, bg = "white")         

 # colored by ISA             
    ambient_PCA_by_site_ISA <- ggplot(site_means, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color=ISA)) +
        geom_point(size=5) +  
        labs(x = "PC1",
           y = "PC2") +
        scale_color_gradient(low = "#008040", high = "gray", guide = guide_colorbar()) +
        guides(color = guide_colorbar(title = "%ISA \nSurrounding \nSites")) +
        geom_text(data = site_means, aes(label = UNE_site, vjust = -1)) +
        theme_minimal() 
    
     # printing figure
        ggsave("ambient_PCA_by_site_ISA_grouped.png", plot = ambient_PCA_by_site_ISA, path = file.path(figures_dir,"PCA/Grouped Elements"), width = 7,
          height = 6, bg = "white")          

 # colored by distance_to_boston             
    ambient_PCA_by_site_distance_to_boston <- ggplot(site_means, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color=distance_to_boston)) +
        geom_point(size=5) +  
        labs(x = "PC1",
           y = "PC2") +
        scale_color_gradient(low = "#001133", high = "#B3CCFF", guide = guide_colorbar()) +
        guides(color = guide_colorbar(title = "Distance to \nBoston (km)")) +
        geom_text(data = site_means, aes(label = UNE_site, vjust = -1)) +
        theme_minimal() 
    
     # printing figure
        ggsave("ambient_PCA_by_site_distance_to_boston_grouped.png", plot = ambient_PCA_by_site_distance_to_boston, path = file.path(figures_dir,"PCA/Grouped Elements"), width = 7,
          height = 6, bg = "white")   
                                                      
# PCA Plots (UNE Sites + Distance from Edge)
        
    site_dfe_means <- pca_df %>% # taking the means of the PC1 and PC2 for each site & dfe
      group_by(UNE_site,dfe) %>%
      summarize(PC1 = mean(PC1), PC2 = mean(PC2))        

    ambient_PCA_by_site_dfe <- ggplot(site_dfe_means, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color=dfe)) +
        geom_point(size=5) +  
        labs(x = "PC1",
           y = "PC2") +
        guides(color = guide_legend(title = "Distance from Edge (m)")) +
        geom_text(data = site_dfe_means, aes(label = UNE_site, vjust = -1)) +
        theme_minimal() 
    
     # printing figure
        ggsave("ambient_PCA_by_site_dfe_grouped.png", plot = ambient_PCA_by_site_dfe, path = file.path(figures_dir,"PCA/Grouped Elements"), width = 7,
          height = 6, bg = "white")      
            
# PCA biplot (by site types)
    
   ambient_PCA_biplot_site_type <- ggbiplot(AmbientPMPCA, groups = Ambient_Labels$urbcatisa_dfe, ellipse = TRUE, var.axes = TRUE) +
      coord_fixed(ratio = 0.5) +
      theme_minimal() + 
      theme(axis.text.x = element_text(color = "black",size=35),
        axis.title.x = element_text(color = "black",size=35),
        axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black",size=35),
        axis.title.y = element_text(color = "black",size=35)) 
   
   # printing figure

      ggsave("ambient_PCA_biplot_site_type_grouped.png", plot = ambient_PCA_biplot_site_type, path = file.path(figures_dir,"PCA/Grouped Elements"), width = 10,
        height = 10, bg = "white")
      
# PCA biplot (with individual sites)
      
ambient_PCA_biplot_site_name <- ggbiplot(AmbientPMPCA, groups = Ambient_Labels$site_name, ellipse = TRUE, var.axes = TRUE) +
```

## Ambient vs. Foliar
```{r}
# creating new columns to group by both urbanization category and distance from edge
  AllCompxUNESites$urbcatisa_dfe <- paste(AllCompxUNESites$urb_cat_isa,
                                               ifelse(AllCompxUNESites$dfe == 0,"Edge",
                                                      ifelse(AllCompxUNESites$dfe == 90,"Interior","Open")), sep = "")
  AllCompxUNESites$urbcatdist_dfe <- paste(AllCompxUNESites$urb_cat_dist,
                                               ifelse(AllCompxUNESites$dfe == 0,"Edge",
                                                      ifelse(AllCompxUNESites$dfe == 90,"Interior","Open")), sep = "")
# preparing for the PCA
    
    All_Elements <- AllCompxUNESites[,2:26] # subsetting columns w element abundances
    All_Labels <- AllCompxUNESites[,c(1,26:34)] # subsetting site properties


# PCA 

    AllPCA <- prcomp(All_Elements,center=T, scale.=T)
    
    # making a data frame with the loadings for each element
    loadings_df <- data.frame(PC1 = AllPCA$rotation[,1], PC2 = AllPCA$rotation[,2],PC3 = AllPCA$rotation[,3],PC4 = AllPCA$rotation[,4])
    loadings_df$Variable <- rownames(loadings_df)
    
    # let's look at the loadings
    
      # PC1
      all_PC1_loadings <- ggplot(loadings_df, aes(x = reorder(Variable, -abs(PC1)), y = PC1)) +
            geom_bar(stat = "identity", fill = "steelblue") +
            coord_flip() +
            labs(title = "PC1 Loadings", x = "", y = "Loading Value") +
            theme_minimal() +
            theme(text = element_text(size = 30)) 

      
      # PC2
      all_PC2_loadings <- ggplot(loadings_df, aes(x = reorder(Variable, -abs(PC2)), y = PC2)) +
            geom_bar(stat = "identity", fill = "steelblue") +
            coord_flip() +
            labs(title = "PC2 Loadings", x = "", y = "Loading Value") +
            theme_minimal() +
            theme(text = element_text(size = 30))
    
        # printing loadings figures
          ggsave("all_PC1_loadings.png", plot = all_PC1_loadings, path = file.path(figures_dir,"PCA/Ambient vs. Foliar"), width = 5,
            height = 12, bg = "white")
          ggsave("all_PC2_loadings.png", plot = all_PC2_loadings, path = file.path(figures_dir,"PCA/Ambient vs. Foliar"), width = 5,
            height = 12, bg = "white")

        # making a data frame with the loadings, sites, and site characteristics
          pca_df <- as.data.frame(cbind(AllPCA$x,All_Labels))
      
  # PCA biplot (with individual sites)
      
   all_PCA_biplot_site_name <- ggbiplot(AllPCA, groups = All_Labels$site_name, ellipse = TRUE, var.axes = TRUE) +
      coord_fixed(ratio = 0.5) +
      theme_minimal() +
      theme(axis.text.x = element_text(color = "black",size=35),
        axis.title.x = element_text(color = "black",size=35),
        axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black",size=35),
        axis.title.y = element_text(color = "black",size=35)) 

      ggsave("all_PCA_biplot_site_name.png", plot = all_PCA_biplot_site_name, path = file.path(figures_dir,"PCA/Ambient vs. Foliar"), width = 10, height = 10, bg = "white")
   
  # PCA Plot (Elements)
    
    all_PCA_elementsonly <- ggplot(loadings_df, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2)) +
    geom_point(size=1) +  
    labs(x = "PC1", y = "PC2") + 
    geom_text(data = loadings_df, aes(label = rownames(loadings_df)), hjust = 0, vjust = 0) +
    theme_minimal()  

      ggsave("all_PCA_elementsonly.png", plot = all_PCA_elementsonly, width = 10, path = file.path(figures_dir,"PCA/Ambient vs. Foliar"), height = 10, bg = "white")
      
  # PCA Plots (UNE Sites + Distance from Edge)
        
    site_means <- pca_df %>% # taking the means of the PC1 and PC2 for each site & dfe
      group_by(particle_source,dfe,UNE_site) %>%
      summarize(PC1 = mean(PC1), PC2 = mean(PC2))        

    all_PCA_by_site_dfe_AvF <- ggplot(site_means, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color=particle_source,shape=dfe)) +
        geom_point(size=5) +
        scale_color_manual(values=c("#B3CCFF","#008040")) +
        labs(x = "PC1",
           y = "PC2") +
        guides(color = guide_legend(title = "Particle Source")) +
        geom_text(data = site_means, aes(label = UNE_site, vjust = -1)) +
        theme_minimal()

    ggsave("all_PCA_by_site_dfe_AvF.png", plot = all_PCA_by_site_dfe_AvF, path = file.path(figures_dir,"PCA/Ambient vs. Foliar"), width = 10,
        height = 10, bg = "white")
    
```

## Dynamic
### Foliar
```{r}
# creating new columns to group by both urbanization category and distance from edge
  FoliarPMCompxUNESites$urbcatisa_dfe <- paste(FoliarPMCompxUNESites$urb_cat_isa,
                                               ifelse(FoliarPMCompxUNESites$distance_from_edge.m. == 0,"Edge","Interior"), sep = "")
  FoliarPMCompxUNESites$urbcatdist_dfe <- paste(FoliarPMCompxUNESites$urb_cat_dist,
                                               ifelse(FoliarPMCompxUNESites$distance_from_edge.m. == 0,"Edge","Interior"), sep = "")  
# preparing for the PCA
    
    Leaf_Elements <- FoliarPMCompxUNESites[-194,12:33] # subsetting columns w element abundances
    Leaf_Labels <- FoliarPMCompxUNESites[-194,c(2,38:46)] # subsetting site properties

# PCA 

    FoliarPMPCA <- prcomp(Leaf_Elements,center=T, scale.=T)
    
    # making a data frame with the loadings for each element
    loadings_df <- data.frame(PC1 = FoliarPMPCA$rotation[,1], PC2 = FoliarPMPCA$rotation[,2])
    loadings_df$Variable <- rownames(loadings_df)
    
    # let's look at the loadings
    
      # PC1
      foliar_PC1_loadings <- ggplot(loadings_df, aes(x = reorder(Variable, -abs(PC1)), y = PC1)) +
            geom_bar(stat = "identity", fill = "steelblue") +
            coord_flip() +
            labs(title = "PC1 Loadings", x = "Variable", y = "Loading Value") +
            theme_minimal() +
            theme(text = element_text(size = 30)) 

      
      # PC2
      foliar_PC2_loadings <- ggplot(loadings_df, aes(x = reorder(Variable, -abs(PC2)), y = PC2)) +
            geom_bar(stat = "identity", fill = "steelblue") +
            coord_flip() +
            labs(title = "PC2 Loadings", x = "Variable", y = "Loading Value") +
            theme_minimal() +
            theme(text = element_text(size = 30)) 
        
        # printing loadings figures
          ggsave("foliar_PC1_loadings.png", plot = foliar_PC1_loadings, width = 5, path = file.path(figures_dir, "PCA/Individual Elements"), 
            height = 10, bg = "white")
          ggsave("foliar_PC2_loadings.png", plot = foliar_PC2_loadings, width = 5, path = file.path(figures_dir, "PCA/Individual Elements"),
            height = 10, bg = "white")
                  
 # making a data frame with the loadings, sites, and site characteristics
      pca_df <- as.data.frame(cbind(FoliarPMPCA$x,Leaf_Labels))
      
# PCA Plot (Elements)
    
    foliar_PCA_elementsonly <- ggplot(loadings_df, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2)) +
    geom_point(size=1) +  
    labs(x = "PC1", y = "PC2") + 
    geom_text(data = loadings_df, aes(label = rownames(loadings_df)), hjust = 0, vjust = 0) +
    theme_minimal()  # Apply minimal theme
    
    # printing figures
      ggsave("foliar_PCA_elementsonly.png", plot = foliar_PCA_elementsonly, path = file.path(figures_dir, "PCA/Individual Elements"),width = 5,
            height = 5, bg = "white")

# PCA Plots (UNE Sites)
     
    site_means <- pca_df %>% # taking the means of the PC1 and PC2 for each site
      group_by(UNE_site) %>%
      summarize(PC1 = mean(PC1), PC2 = mean(PC2), PC1_se=stderr(PC1), PC2_se=stderr(PC2))

    site_means <- left_join(site_means,UNESites,by="UNE_site") # adding other UNE site data to the site means

 # colored by urb_cat_isa             
    foliar_PCA_by_site_urb_cat_ISA <- ggplot(site_means, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color=urb_cat_isa)) +
        geom_point(size=5) +  
        labs(x = "PC1",
           y = "PC2") +
        guides(color = guide_legend(title = "Urbanization Category\nby % ISA")) +
        geom_text(data = site_means, aes(label = UNE_site, vjust = -1)) +
        theme_minimal() 
    
     # printing figure
        ggsave("foliar_PCA_by_site_urb_cat_ISA.png", plot = foliar_PCA_by_site_urb_cat_ISA, path = file.path(figures_dir, "PCA/Individual Elements"), width = 7,
          height = 6, bg = "white")

 # colored by urb_cat_dist             
    foliar_PCA_by_site_urb_cat_dist <- ggplot(site_means, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color=urb_cat_dist)) +
        geom_point(size=5) +  
        labs(x = "PC1",
           y = "PC2") +
        guides(color = guide_legend(title = "Urbanization Category\nby Distance to Boston")) +
        geom_text(data = site_means, aes(label = UNE_site, vjust = -1)) +
        theme_minimal() 
    
     # printing figure
        ggsave("foliar_PCA_by_site_urb_cat_dist.png", plot = foliar_PCA_by_site_urb_cat_dist, path = file.path(figures_dir, "PCA/Individual Elements"), width = 7,
          height = 6, bg = "white")        

 # colored by edge_type

 # colored by distance_to_boston
```

```{r}
      pca_df <- as.data.frame(cbind(AmbientPMPCA$x,Ambient_Labels))
      
# PCA Plot (Elements)
```
