## Urbanization Category AND dfe
```{r}

# ensure that particle size classification is a factor rather than a numeric
FoliarPMCompxUNESites$size_category <- as.factor(FoliarPMCompxUNESites$size_category)


# Figure Loop    
            
   # defining list of element names
element_names <- all_element_names

# creating a list for figures
foliar_element_size_int_medians_list <- list()

# loop to make categorical figures 

for (i in c(1:26)) {
  
element <- element_names[i] 

# summarize the element by urbanization and distance from edge
    summary_isa <- cbind(aggregate(FoliarPMCompxUNESites[[element]],
                                   list(FoliarPMCompxUNESites$urb_cat_isa,
                                        FoliarPMCompxUNESites$size_category,
                                        FoliarPMCompxUNESites$dfe),
                                   FUN=ci95_median_boot))
    summary_isa <- as.matrix(summary_isa)
    colnames(summary_isa) <- c("urb_cat_isa","size_category","dfe","perc_comp","lower","upper")
    summary_isa <- as.data.frame(summary_isa)
    summary_isa$perc_comp <- as.numeric(summary_isa$perc_comp)
    summary_isa$lower     <- as.numeric(summary_isa$lower)
    summary_isa$upper     <- as.numeric(summary_isa$upper)
 
  # add in the significance letter associated with each group
      summary_isa$letter <- NA
      summary_isa$letter[1] <- foliar_PM_size_art_pairwise_isa$RuralPM2.5[foliar_PM_size_art_pairwise_isa$Element==element]
      summary_isa$letter[2] <- foliar_PM_size_art_pairwise_isa$UrbanPM2.5[foliar_PM_size_art_pairwise_isa$Element==element]
      summary_isa$letter[3] <- foliar_PM_size_art_pairwise_isa$RuralPM10[foliar_PM_size_art_pairwise_isa$Element==element]
      summary_isa$letter[4] <- foliar_PM_size_art_pairwise_isa$UrbanPM10[foliar_PM_size_art_pairwise_isa$Element==element]

# figures
      
  dodge <- position_dodge(width = 0.3)

fig <- ggplot(data = summary_isa,
                      mapping = aes(x = urb_cat_isa,
                                    y = perc_comp,
                                    col = size_category,
                                    shape = dfe,
                                    group = interaction(size_category, dfe))) +   # ensures consistent dodging
      scale_color_manual(values = c("orange","navyblue")) +
      
        # y limits 
        ylim(axes_limits_medians$ymin_isa[i]*1.3,axes_limits_medians$ymax_isa[i]*1.3) +
      
        # Points
        geom_point(position = dodge, size = 3) +
        
        # Error bars
        geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper),
                      width = 0.2,
                      position = dodge) +
        
        # Labels and theme
        labs(title = "Foliar PM", x = "Site Type by %ISA", y = paste("%",element)) +
        theme_minimal() +
        theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 25),
              #legend.position = "none",
              panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
              panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
              axis.line = element_line(colour = "black"),
              aspect.ratio = 1,
              axis.text.x = element_text(color = "black", size = 15),
              axis.title.x = element_text(color = "black", size = 15),
              axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 15),
              axis.title.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 15)) +
    guides(
      color = guide_legend(title = expression("Particle Size ("*mu*"m)")),
      shape = guide_legend(title = "Distance From Edge (m)"))

foliar_element_size_int_medians_list[[element]] <- fig

# printing figure

ggsave(paste(element,"particle_size.png"), plot = fig, path = file.path(figures_dir,"Particle Size"), width = 6,
  height = 4, bg = "white")
}

```


## By %ISA (continuous)
```{r}


# by dfe

particle_size_ISA <- 
  ggplot(data=FoliarPMCompxUNESites,mapping=aes(x=ISA,y=actual_size,col=dfe)) +
  geom_smooth(method=lm,se=FALSE)+
  geom_point(position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), size = 3) +
  theme(panel.background = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 1)) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12), 
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12)) +
  theme(axis.line.x = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
        axis.line.y = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5)) +
  #ylim(0,800) +
  xlab("% ISA (Impervious Surface Area)") +
  ylab(expression("Particle Size ("*mu*"m)")) +
  guides(color = guide_legend(title = "Distance\nFrom Edge (m)")) +
  theme(axis.title=element_text(size=15))+
  scale_color_manual(values=c("#999999", "#060000"))

# by urb_cat

particle_size_ISA <- 
  ggplot(data=FoliarPMCompxUNESites,mapping=aes(x=ISA,y=actual_size,col=urb_cat_isa)) +
  geom_smooth(method=lm,se=FALSE)+
  geom_point(position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), size = 3) +
  theme(panel.background = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 1)) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12), 
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12)) +
  theme(axis.line.x = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
        axis.line.y = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5)) +
  #ylim(0,800) +
  xlab("% ISA (Impervious Surface Area)") +
  ylab(expression("Particle Size ("*mu*"m)")) +
  guides(color = guide_legend(title = "Urbanization Category \nby %ISA")) +
  theme(axis.title=element_text(size=15))+
  scale_color_manual(values=c("#eab676", "#154c79"))

```

## Ambient
### By Distance to Boston
```{r}

# subsetting the groups

  urban_edge_dist_ambient <- subset(AmbientPMCompxUNESites, dfe=="0" & urb_cat_dist=="Urban")
  urban_interior_dist_ambient <- subset(AmbientPMCompxUNESites, dfe=="90" & urb_cat_dist=="Urban")
  urban_open_dist_ambient <- subset(AmbientPMCompxUNESites, dfe=="Open" & urb_cat_dist=="Urban")
  rural_edge_dist_ambient <- subset(AmbientPMCompxUNESites, dfe=="0" & urb_cat_dist=="Rural")
  rural_interior_dist_ambient <- subset(AmbientPMCompxUNESites, dfe=="90" & urb_cat_dist=="Rural")
  rural_open_dist_ambient <- subset(AmbientPMCompxUNESites, dfe=="Open" & urb_cat_dist=="Rural")

# making summary tables
  
  # initializing a blank summary table
  
  sum_urban_edge_dist_ambient <- matrix(nrow=40,ncol=3)
  colnames(sum_urban_edge_dist_ambient) <- c("element","mean","se")
  
  sum_urban_interior_dist_ambient <- matrix(nrow=40,ncol=3)
  colnames(sum_urban_interior_dist_ambient) <- c("element","mean","se")
  
  sum_urban_open_dist_ambient <- matrix(nrow=40,ncol=3)
  colnames(sum_urban_open_dist_ambient) <- c("element","mean","se")
  
  sum_rural_edge_dist_ambient <- matrix(nrow=40,ncol=3)
  colnames(sum_rural_edge_dist_ambient) <- c("element","mean","se")
  
  sum_rural_interior_dist_ambient <- matrix(nrow=40,ncol=3)
  colnames(sum_rural_interior_dist_ambient) <- c("element","mean","se")
  
  sum_rural_open_dist_ambient <- matrix(nrow=40,ncol=3)
  colnames(sum_rural_open_dist_ambient) <- c("element","mean","se")
  
  # testing the code for the loop: calculating means of each sampler
    # samp1 <- subset(urban_edge_dist_ambient,sampler=="1")
    # samp2 <- subset(urban_edge_dist_ambient,sampler=="2")
    # meansamp1 <- mean(samp1[,3])
    # meansamp2 <- mean(samp2[,3])
    # mean <- mean(meansamp1,meansamp2)
  
  # loops to calculate the mean and standard error for all elements
  for (i in c(5:44)) {
    
    samp1 <- subset(urban_edge_dist_ambient,sampler=="1")
    samp2 <- subset(urban_edge_dist_ambient,sampler=="2")
    meansamp1 <- mean(samp1[,i])
    meansamp2 <- mean(samp2[,i])
    mean <- mean(c(meansamp1,meansamp2))
    se <- sd(c(meansamp1,meansamp2)) / sqrt(2)
    sum_urban_edge_dist_ambient[i-4,1] <- colnames(urban_edge_dist_ambient[i])
    sum_urban_edge_dist_ambient[i-4,2] <- mean
    sum_urban_edge_dist_ambient[i-4,3] <- se
  }
  
    # converting the matrix to a dataframe with the classes we want
    sum_urban_edge_dist_ambient <- as.data.frame(sum_urban_edge_dist_ambient)
    sum_urban_edge_dist_ambient$mean <- as.numeric(sum_urban_edge_dist_ambient$mean)
    sum_urban_edge_dist_ambient$se <- as.numeric(sum_urban_edge_dist_ambient$se)
  
  for (i in c(5:44)) {
    samp1 <- subset(urban_interior_dist_ambient,sampler=="1")
    samp2 <- subset(urban_interior_dist_ambient,sampler=="2")
    meansamp1 <- mean(samp1[,i])
    meansamp2 <- mean(samp2[,i])
    mean <- mean(c(meansamp1,meansamp2))
    se <- sd(c(meansamp1,meansamp2)) / sqrt(2)
    sum_urban_interior_dist_ambient[i-4,1] <- colnames(urban_interior_dist_ambient[i])
    sum_urban_interior_dist_ambient[i-4,2] <- mean
    sum_urban_interior_dist_ambient[i-4,3] <- se
  }
  
    # converting the matrix to a dataframe with the classes we want
    sum_urban_interior_dist_ambient <- as.data.frame(sum_urban_interior_dist_ambient)
    sum_urban_interior_dist_ambient$mean <- as.numeric(sum_urban_interior_dist_ambient$mean)
    sum_urban_interior_dist_ambient$se <- as.numeric(sum_urban_interior_dist_ambient$se)
    
  for (i in c(5:44)) {
    
    samp1 <- subset(urban_open_dist_ambient,sampler=="1")
    samp2 <- subset(urban_open_dist_ambient,sampler=="2")
    meansamp1 <- mean(samp1[,i])
    meansamp2 <- mean(samp2[,i])
    mean <- mean(c(meansamp1,meansamp2))
    se <- sd(c(meansamp1,meansamp2)) / sqrt(2)
    sum_urban_open_dist_ambient[i-4,1] <- colnames(urban_open_dist_ambient[i])
    sum_urban_open_dist_ambient[i-4,2] <- mean
    sum_urban_open_dist_ambient[i-4,3] <- se
  }
  
    # converting the matrix to a dataframe with the classes we want
    sum_urban_open_dist_ambient <- as.data.frame(sum_urban_open_dist_ambient)
    sum_urban_open_dist_ambient$mean <- as.numeric(sum_urban_open_dist_ambient$mean)
    sum_urban_open_dist_ambient$se <- as.numeric(sum_urban_open_dist_ambient$se)
    
    
    for (i in c(5:44)) {
    
    samp1 <- subset(rural_edge_dist_ambient,sampler=="1")
    samp2 <- subset(rural_edge_dist_ambient,sampler=="2")
    meansamp1 <- mean(samp1[,i])
    meansamp2 <- mean(samp2[,i])
    mean <- mean(c(meansamp1,meansamp2))
    se <- sd(c(meansamp1,meansamp2)) / sqrt(2)
    sum_rural_edge_dist_ambient[i-4,1] <- colnames(rural_edge_dist_ambient[i])
    sum_rural_edge_dist_ambient[i-4,2] <- mean
    sum_rural_edge_dist_ambient[i-4,3] <- se
  }
  
    # converting the matrix to a dataframe with the classes we want
    sum_rural_edge_dist_ambient <- as.data.frame(sum_rural_edge_dist_ambient)
    sum_rural_edge_dist_ambient$mean <- as.numeric(sum_rural_edge_dist_ambient$mean)
    sum_rural_edge_dist_ambient$se <- as.numeric(sum_rural_edge_dist_ambient$se)
  
  for (i in c(5:44)) {
    samp1 <- subset(rural_interior_dist_ambient,sampler=="1")
    samp2 <- subset(rural_interior_dist_ambient,sampler=="2")
    meansamp1 <- mean(samp1[,i])
    meansamp2 <- mean(samp2[,i])
    mean <- mean(c(meansamp1,meansamp2))
    se <- sd(c(meansamp1,meansamp2)) / sqrt(2)
    sum_rural_interior_dist_ambient[i-4,1] <- colnames(rural_interior_dist_ambient[i])
    sum_rural_interior_dist_ambient[i-4,2] <- mean
    sum_rural_interior_dist_ambient[i-4,3] <- se
  }
  
    # converting the matrix to a dataframe with the classes we want
    sum_rural_interior_dist_ambient <- as.data.frame(sum_rural_interior_dist_ambient)
    sum_rural_interior_dist_ambient$mean <- as.numeric(sum_rural_interior_dist_ambient$mean)
    sum_rural_interior_dist_ambient$se <- as.numeric(sum_rural_interior_dist_ambient$se)
    
  for (i in c(5:44)) {
    
    samp1 <- subset(rural_open_dist_ambient,sampler=="1")
    samp2 <- subset(rural_open_dist_ambient,sampler=="2")
    meansamp1 <- mean(samp1[,i])
    meansamp2 <- mean(samp2[,i])
    mean <- mean(c(meansamp1,meansamp2))
    se <- sd(c(meansamp1,meansamp2)) / sqrt(2)
    sum_rural_open_dist_ambient[i-4,1] <- colnames(rural_open_dist_ambient[i])
    sum_rural_open_dist_ambient[i-4,2] <- mean
    sum_rural_open_dist_ambient[i-4,3] <- se
  }
  
    # converting the matrix to a dataframe with the classes we want
    sum_rural_open_dist_ambient <- as.data.frame(sum_rural_open_dist_ambient)
    sum_rural_open_dist_ambient$mean <- as.numeric(sum_rural_open_dist_ambient$mean)
    sum_rural_open_dist_ambient$se <- as.numeric(sum_rural_open_dist_ambient$se)
    
# barplots
  
     urban_edge_dist_ambient_barplot <- 
      ggplot(sum_urban_edge_dist_ambient, aes(x = element, y = mean)) +
      geom_bar(stat = "identity", fill = "steelblue", alpha = 0.7) +  # Bar plot
      geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean - se, ymax = mean + se), width = 0.2) +  # Error bars
      labs(x = "Element", y = "Mean Percent Composition", title= "Ambient PM at the Urban Edge") +
      theme_minimal() +
      theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) 
     
     urban_interior_dist_ambient_barplot <- 
      ggplot(sum_urban_interior_dist_ambient, aes(x = element, y = mean)) +
      geom_bar(stat = "identity", fill = "steelblue", alpha = 0.7) +  # Bar plot
      geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean - se, ymax = mean + se), width = 0.2) +  # Error bars
      labs(x = "Element", y = "Mean Percent Composition", title= "Ambient PM at the Urban Interior") +
      theme_minimal() +
      theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) 
  
     urban_open_dist_ambient_barplot <- 
      ggplot(sum_urban_open_dist_ambient, aes(x = element, y = mean)) +
      geom_bar(stat = "identity", fill = "steelblue", alpha = 0.7) +  # Bar plot
      geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean - se, ymax = mean + se), width = 0.2) +  # Error bars
      labs(x = "Element", y = "Mean Percent Composition", title= "Ambient PM at Urban Open Sites") +
      theme_minimal() +
      theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) 
     
     rural_edge_dist_ambient_barplot <- 
      ggplot(sum_rural_edge_dist_ambient, aes(x = element, y = mean)) +
      geom_bar(stat = "identity", fill = "steelblue", alpha = 0.7) +  # Bar plot
      geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean - se, ymax = mean + se), width = 0.2) +  # Error bars
      labs(x = "Element", y = "Mean Percent Composition", title= "Ambient PM at the Rural Edge") +
      theme_minimal() +
      theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) 
     
     rural_interior_dist_ambient_barplot <- 
      ggplot(sum_rural_interior_dist_ambient, aes(x = element, y = mean)) +
      geom_bar(stat = "identity", fill = "steelblue", alpha = 0.7) +  # Bar plot
      geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean - se, ymax = mean + se), width = 0.2) +  # Error bars
      labs(x = "Element", y = "Mean Percent Composition", title= "Ambient PM at the Rural Interior") +
      theme_minimal() +
      theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) 
  
     rural_open_dist_ambient_barplot <- 
      ggplot(sum_rural_open_dist_ambient, aes(x = element, y = mean)) +
      geom_bar(stat = "identity", fill = "steelblue", alpha = 0.7) +  # Bar plot
      geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean - se, ymax = mean + se), width = 0.2) +  # Error bars
      labs(x = "Element", y = "Mean Percent Composition", title= "Ambient PM at Rural Open Sites") +
      theme_minimal() +
      theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) 
     
ambient_comp_dist <- 
  plot_grid(urban_edge_dist_ambient_barplot, rural_edge_dist_ambient_barplot,
            urban_interior_dist_ambient_barplot, rural_interior_dist_ambient_barplot,
            urban_open_dist_ambient_barplot, rural_open_dist_ambient_barplot,
            labels=NULL,ncol=2)  

# printing figure
ggsave("ambient_comp_dist.png", plot = ambient_comp_dist, path = file.path(figures_dir,"All-element Barplots"), width = 20,
  height = 10, bg = "white")
```

```{r}
     rural_edge_isa_ambient_barplot <- 
      ggplot(sum_rural_edge_isa_ambient, aes(x = element, y = mean)) +
      geom_bar(stat = "identity", fill = "steelblue", alpha = 0.7) +  # Bar plot
      geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean - se, ymax = mean + se), width = 0.2) +  # Error bars
      labs(x = "Element", y = "Mean Percent Composition", title= "Ambient PM at the Rural Edge") +
      theme_minimal() +
      theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) 
     
     rural_interior_isa_ambient_barplot <- 
      ggplot(sum_rural_interior_isa_ambient, aes(x = element, y = mean)) +
      geom_bar(stat = "identity", fill = "steelblue", alpha = 0.7) +  # Bar plot
      geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean - se, ymax = mean + se), width = 0.2) +  # Error bars
      labs(x = "Element", y = "Mean Percent Composition", title= "Ambient PM at the Rural Interior") +
      theme_minimal() +
      theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) 
  
     rural_open_isa_ambient_barplot <- 
      ggplot(sum_rural_open_isa_ambient, aes(x = element, y = mean)) +
      geom_bar(stat = "identity", fill = "steelblue", alpha = 0.7) +  # Bar plot
      geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean - se, ymax = mean + se), width = 0.2) +  # Error bars
      labs(x = "Element", y = "Mean Percent Composition", title= "Ambient PM at Rural Open Sites") +
      theme_minimal() +
      theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) 
     
ambient_comp_isa <- 
  plot_grid(urban_edge_isa_ambient_barplot, rural_edge_isa_ambient_barplot,
            urban_interior_isa_ambient_barplot, rural_interior_isa_ambient_barplot,
            urban_open_isa_ambient_barplot, rural_open_isa_ambient_barplot,
            labels=NULL,ncol=2)  

# printing figure
ggsave("ambient_comp_isa.png", plot = ambient_comp_isa, path = file.path(figures_dir,"All-element Barplots"), width = 20,
  height = 10, bg = "white")
```

# Template/Unused Code
## Loops to run one-way ANOVA on 
```{r}
# Edge
    
    # create an empty matrix, with a row for each element and a column for p-values comparing ambient & foliar, urban vs rural by distance to Boston, the interactive effect of those two, urban vs rural by %isa, & the interactive effect of those two
      allPM_edge_art_pvals <- matrix(data=NA, nrow=27, ncol=6)
        colnames(allPM_edge_art_pvals) <-
          c("Element",
            "Ambient_v_Foliar","Urb_v_Rural_Dist","Interaction_Dist","Urb_v_Rural_ISA","Interaction_ISA" )
        allPM_edge_art_pvals[,1] <- all_element_names
    
    # create an empty matrix, with a row for each element and a column for each pairwise comparison
        
        allPM_edge_art_pairwise_isa <- matrix(data=NA, nrow=26, ncol=11)
        allPM_edge_art_pairwise_isa[,1] <- all_element_names
        colnames(allPM_edge_art_pairwise_isa) <- 
          c("Element",
            "Rural,Ambient - Rural,Foliar",
            "Rural,Ambient - Urban,Ambient",
            "Rural,Ambient - Urban,Foliar",
            "Rural,Foliar - Urban,Ambient",
            "Rural,Foliar - Urban,Foliar",
            "Urban,Ambient - Urban,Foliar",
            "Rural,Ambient",
            "Rural,Foliar",
            "Urban,Ambient",
            "Urban,Foliar"
            )
        
        allPM_edge_art_pairwise_dist <- matrix(data=NA, nrow=26, ncol=11)
        allPM_edge_art_pairwise_dist[,1] <- all_element_names
        colnames(allPM_edge_art_pairwise_dist) <- 
          c("Element",
            "Rural,Ambient - Rural,Foliar",
            "Rural,Ambient - Urban,Ambient",
            "Rural,Ambient - Urban,Foliar",
            "Rural,Foliar - Urban,Ambient",
            "Rural,Foliar - Urban,Foliar",
            "Urban,Ambient - Urban,Foliar",
            "Rural,Ambient",
            "Rural,Foliar",
            "Urban,Ambient",
            "Urban,Foliar"
            )
        
    for (i in c(1:26)) {
      
    
    element <- all_element_names[i]  
    
    # ART Anova
        
      # Ambient vs. Foliar
      formula <- as.formula(paste(all_element_names[i], "~ particle_source"))
      X_ART_AvF <- art(formula, data = edge)
      X_aovART_AvF <- anova(X_ART_AvF)
      X_aovART_AvF_pval <- X_aovART_AvF["particle_source","Pr(>F)"] # this extracts the p-value for edge vs. interior
      allPM_edge_art_pvals[i,2] <- X_aovART_AvF_pval # this places it into the matrix we made
      
      # Urban vs. Rural
        # dist
        formula <- as.formula(paste(all_element_names[i], "~urb_cat_dist"))
        X_ART_dist <- art(formula, data = edge)
        X_aovART_dist <- anova(X_ART_dist)
        U_R_art_dist_pval <- X_aovART_dist["urb_cat_dist","Pr(>F)"] # this extracts the p-value for urban vs. rural
        allPM_edge_art_pvals[i,3] <- U_R_art_dist_pval # this places it into the matrix we made
        
        # isa
        formula <- as.formula(paste(all_element_names[i], "~urb_cat_isa*particle_source"))
        X_ART_isa <- art(formula, data = edge)
        X_aovART_isa <- anova(X_ART_isa)
        U_R_art_isa_pval <- X_aovART_isa["urb_cat_isa","Pr(>F)"] # this extracts the p-value for urban vs. rural
        allPM_edge_art_pvals[i,5] <- U_R_art_isa_pval # this places it into the matrix we made
      
      # Urban vs. Rural and Interaction Term
        # dist
        formula <- as.formula(paste(all_element_names[i], "~urb_cat_dist*particle_source"))
        X_ART_dist <- art(formula, data = edge)
        X_aovART_dist <- anova(X_ART_dist)
        Int_art_dist_pval <- X_aovART_dist["urb_cat_dist:particle_source","Pr(>F)"] # this extracts the p-value for the interaction term
        allPM_edge_art_pvals[i,4] <- Int_art_dist_pval # this places it into the matrix we made
      
      # Urban vs. Rural and Interaction Term (by %ISA)
        # isa
        formula <- as.formula(paste(all_element_names[i], "~urb_cat_isa*particle_source"))
        X_ART_isa <- art(formula, data = edge)
        X_aovART_isa <- anova(X_ART_isa)
        U_R_art_isa_pval <- X_aovART_isa["urb_cat_isa","Pr(>F)"] # this extracts the p-value for urban vs. rural
        Int_art_isa_pval <- X_aovART_isa["urb_cat_isa:particle_source","Pr(>F)"] # this extracts the p-value for the interaction term
        allPM_edge_art_pvals[i,6] <- Int_art_isa_pval # this places it into the matrix we made
    
    
    # pairwise comparisons
    
        # isa
          art.con_X_ART_isa <- art.con(X_ART_isa,~urb_cat_isa*particle_source, adjust="none")
          art.con_X_ART_isa <- as.data.frame(art.con_X_ART_isa)
          letters_isa <- cldList(
          p.value ~ contrast,
          data = art.con_X_ART_isa,
          threshold = 0.05  )
          
          # placing these results into our matrix
        
            # pairwise comparisons
            allPM_edge_art_pairwise_isa[i,2] <- art.con_X_ART_isa$p.value[1]
            allPM_edge_art_pairwise_isa[i,3] <- art.con_X_ART_isa$p.value[2]
            allPM_edge_art_pairwise_isa[i,4] <- art.con_X_ART_isa$p.value[3]
            allPM_edge_art_pairwise_isa[i,5] <- art.con_X_ART_isa$p.value[4]
            allPM_edge_art_pairwise_isa[i,6] <- art.con_X_ART_isa$p.value[5]
            allPM_edge_art_pairwise_isa[i,7] <- art.con_X_ART_isa$p.value[6]
            
            # letters
            allPM_edge_art_pairwise_isa[i,8] <- letters_isa$Letter[1]
            allPM_edge_art_pairwise_isa[i,9] <- letters_isa$Letter[2]
            allPM_edge_art_pairwise_isa[i,10] <- letters_isa$Letter[3]
            allPM_edge_art_pairwise_isa[i,11] <- letters_isa$Letter[4]
      
        # dist
          art.con_X_ART_dist <- art.con(X_ART_dist,~urb_cat_dist*particle_source, adjust="none")
          art.con_X_ART_dist <- as.data.frame(art.con_X_ART_dist)
          letters_dist <- cldList(
          p.value ~ contrast,
          data = art.con_X_ART_dist,
          threshold = 0.05  )
          
        # placing these results into our matrix
      
          # pairwise comparisons
          allPM_edge_art_pairwise_dist[i,2] <- art.con_X_ART_dist$p.value[1]
          allPM_edge_art_pairwise_dist[i,3] <- art.con_X_ART_dist$p.value[2]
          allPM_edge_art_pairwise_dist[i,4] <- art.con_X_ART_dist$p.value[3]
          allPM_edge_art_pairwise_dist[i,5] <- art.con_X_ART_dist$p.value[4]
          allPM_edge_art_pairwise_dist[i,6] <- art.con_X_ART_dist$p.value[5]
          allPM_edge_art_pairwise_dist[i,7] <- art.con_X_ART_dist$p.value[6]
          
          # letters
          allPM_edge_art_pairwise_dist[i,8] <- letters_dist$Letter[1]
          allPM_edge_art_pairwise_dist[i,9] <- letters_dist$Letter[2]
          allPM_edge_art_pairwise_dist[i,10] <- letters_dist$Letter[3]
          allPM_edge_art_pairwise_dist[i,11] <- letters_dist$Letter[4]      
          
    }

# Interior
    
    # create an empty matrix, with a row for each element and a column for p-values comparing ambient & foliar, urban vs rural by distance to Boston, the interactive effect of those two, urban vs rural by %isa, & the interactive effect of those two
      allPM_interior_art_pvals <- matrix(data=NA, nrow=26, ncol=6)
        colnames(allPM_interior_art_pvals) <-
          c("Element",
            "Ambient_v_Foliar","Urb_v_Rural_Dist","Interaction_Dist","Urb_v_Rural_ISA","Interaction_ISA" )
        allPM_interior_art_pvals[,1] <- all_element_names
    
    # create an empty matrix, with a row for each element and a column for each pairwise comparison
        
        allPM_interior_art_pairwise_isa <- matrix(data=NA, nrow=26, ncol=11)
        allPM_interior_art_pairwise_isa[,1] <- all_element_names
        colnames(allPM_interior_art_pairwise_isa) <- 
          c("Element",
            "Rural,Ambient - Rural,Foliar",
            "Rural,Ambient - Urban,Ambient",
            "Rural,Ambient - Urban,Foliar",
            "Rural,Foliar - Urban,Ambient",
            "Rural,Foliar - Urban,Foliar",
            "Urban,Ambient - Urban,Foliar",
            "Rural,Ambient",
            "Rural,Foliar",
            "Urban,Ambient",
            "Urban,Foliar"
            )
        
        allPM_interior_art_pairwise_dist <- matrix(data=NA, nrow=26, ncol=11)
        allPM_interior_art_pairwise_dist[,1] <- all_element_names
        colnames(allPM_interior_art_pairwise_dist) <- 
          c("Element",
            "Rural,Ambient - Rural,Foliar",
            "Rural,Ambient - Urban,Ambient",
            "Rural,Ambient - Urban,Foliar",
            "Rural,Foliar - Urban,Ambient",
            "Rural,Foliar - Urban,Foliar",
            "Urban,Ambient - Urban,Foliar",
            "Rural,Ambient",
            "Rural,Foliar",
            "Urban,Ambient",
            "Urban,Foliar"
            )
        
    for (i in c(1:26)) {
      
    
    element <- all_element_names[i]  
    
    # ART Anova
        
      # Ambient vs. Foliar
      formula <- as.formula(paste(all_element_names[i], "~ particle_source"))
      X_ART_AvF <- art(formula, data = interior)
      X_aovART_AvF <- anova(X_ART_AvF)
      X_aovART_AvF_pval <- X_aovART_AvF["particle_source","Pr(>F)"] # this extracts the p-value for edge vs. interior
      allPM_interior_art_pvals[i,2] <- X_aovART_AvF_pval # this places it into the matrix we made
      
      # Urban vs. Rural
        # dist
        formula <- as.formula(paste(all_element_names[i], "~urb_cat_dist"))
        X_ART_dist <- art(formula, data = interior)
        X_aovART_dist <- anova(X_ART_dist)
        U_R_art_dist_pval <- X_aovART_dist["urb_cat_dist","Pr(>F)"] # this extracts the p-value for urban vs. rural
        allPM_interior_art_pvals[i,3] <- U_R_art_dist_pval # this places it into the matrix we made
        
        # isa
        formula <- as.formula(paste(all_element_names[i], "~urb_cat_isa*particle_source"))
        X_ART_isa <- art(formula, data = interior)
        X_aovART_isa <- anova(X_ART_isa)
        U_R_art_isa_pval <- X_aovART_isa["urb_cat_isa","Pr(>F)"] # this extracts the p-value for urban vs. rural
        allPM_interior_art_pvals[i,5] <- U_R_art_isa_pval # this places it into the matrix we made
      
      # Urban vs. Rural and Interaction Term
        # dist
        formula <- as.formula(paste(all_element_names[i], "~urb_cat_dist*particle_source"))
        X_ART_dist <- art(formula, data = interior)
        X_aovART_dist <- anova(X_ART_dist)
        Int_art_dist_pval <- X_aovART_dist["urb_cat_dist:particle_source","Pr(>F)"] # this extracts the p-value for the interaction term
        allPM_interior_art_pvals[i,4] <- Int_art_dist_pval # this places it into the matrix we made
      
      # Urban vs. Rural and Interaction Term (by %ISA)
        # isa
        formula <- as.formula(paste(all_element_names[i], "~urb_cat_isa*particle_source"))
        X_ART_isa <- art(formula, data = interior)
        X_aovART_isa <- anova(X_ART_isa)
        U_R_art_isa_pval <- X_aovART_isa["urb_cat_isa","Pr(>F)"] # this extracts the p-value for urban vs. rural
        Int_art_isa_pval <- X_aovART_isa["urb_cat_isa:particle_source","Pr(>F)"] # this extracts the p-value for the interaction term
        allPM_interior_art_pvals[i,6] <- Int_art_isa_pval # this places it into the matrix we made
    
    
    # pairwise comparisons
    
        # isa
          art.con_X_ART_isa <- art.con(X_ART_isa,~urb_cat_isa*particle_source, adjust="none")
          art.con_X_ART_isa <- as.data.frame(art.con_X_ART_isa)
          letters_isa <- cldList(
          p.value ~ contrast,
          data = art.con_X_ART_isa,
          threshold = 0.05  )
          
          # placing these results into our matrix
        
            # pairwise comparisons
            allPM_interior_art_pairwise_isa[i,2] <- art.con_X_ART_isa$p.value[1]
            allPM_interior_art_pairwise_isa[i,3] <- art.con_X_ART_isa$p.value[2]
            allPM_interior_art_pairwise_isa[i,4] <- art.con_X_ART_isa$p.value[3]
            allPM_interior_art_pairwise_isa[i,5] <- art.con_X_ART_isa$p.value[4]
            allPM_interior_art_pairwise_isa[i,6] <- art.con_X_ART_isa$p.value[5]
            allPM_interior_art_pairwise_isa[i,7] <- art.con_X_ART_isa$p.value[6]
            
            # letters
            allPM_interior_art_pairwise_isa[i,8] <- letters_isa$Letter[1]
            allPM_interior_art_pairwise_isa[i,9] <- letters_isa$Letter[2]
            allPM_interior_art_pairwise_isa[i,10] <- letters_isa$Letter[3]
            allPM_interior_art_pairwise_isa[i,11] <- letters_isa$Letter[4]
      
        # dist
          art.con_X_ART_dist <- art.con(X_ART_dist,~urb_cat_dist*particle_source, adjust="none")
          art.con_X_ART_dist <- as.data.frame(art.con_X_ART_dist)
          letters_dist <- cldList(
          p.value ~ contrast,
          data = art.con_X_ART_dist,
          threshold = 0.05  )
          
        # placing these results into our matrix
      
          # pairwise comparisons
          allPM_interior_art_pairwise_dist[i,2] <- art.con_X_ART_dist$p.value[1]
          allPM_interior_art_pairwise_dist[i,3] <- art.con_X_ART_dist$p.value[2]
          allPM_interior_art_pairwise_dist[i,4] <- art.con_X_ART_dist$p.value[3]
          allPM_interior_art_pairwise_dist[i,5] <- art.con_X_ART_dist$p.value[4]
          allPM_interior_art_pairwise_dist[i,6] <- art.con_X_ART_dist$p.value[5]
          allPM_interior_art_pairwise_dist[i,7] <- art.con_X_ART_dist$p.value[6]
          
          # letters
          allPM_interior_art_pairwise_dist[i,8] <- letters_dist$Letter[1]
          allPM_interior_art_pairwise_dist[i,9] <- letters_dist$Letter[2]
          allPM_interior_art_pairwise_dist[i,10] <- letters_dist$Letter[3]
          allPM_interior_art_pairwise_dist[i,11] <- letters_dist$Letter[4]      
          
    }  
```

#### Just Edge & Interior Sites
```{r}

# subsetting just the edge & interior sites

AllCompxUNESites_NOopen <- subset(AllCompxUNESites, dfe=="0"|dfe=="90")

# create an empty matrix, with a row for each response variable and a column each for: p-values

  all_PM_NOopen_art_pvals_isa <- matrix(data=NA, nrow=26, ncol=8)
  all_PM_NOopen_art_pvals_isa <- as.data.frame(all_PM_NOopen_art_pvals_isa)
  names(all_PM_NOopen_art_pvals_isa)[1] <- c("Element")
  all_PM_NOopen_art_pvals_isa[,1] <- all_element_names
  
  
  all_PM_NOopen_art_pvals_dist <- matrix(data=NA, nrow=26, ncol=8)
  all_PM_NOopen_art_pvals_dist <- as.data.frame(all_PM_NOopen_art_pvals_dist)
  names(all_PM_NOopen_art_pvals_dist)[1] <- c("Element")
  all_PM_NOopen_art_pvals_dist[,1] <- all_element_names
    
  all_PM_NOopen_pairwise_isa <- matrix(data=NA, nrow=26, ncol=37)
  all_PM_NOopen_pairwise_isa <- as.data.frame(all_PM_NOopen_pairwise_isa)
  names(all_PM_NOopen_pairwise_isa)[1] <- c("Element")
  all_PM_NOopen_pairwise_isa[,1] <- all_element_names
   
  all_PM_NOopen_pairwise_dist <- matrix(data=NA, nrow=26, ncol=37)
  all_PM_NOopen_pairwise_dist <- as.data.frame(all_PM_NOopen_pairwise_dist)
  names(all_PM_NOopen_pairwise_dist)[1] <- c("Element")
  all_PM_NOopen_pairwise_dist[,1] <- all_element_names

# now the matrices are ready to go, and we can fill it with these p-values using the loop below

library(ARTool)

for (i in c(1:26)) {
  

element <- all_element_names[i]  

# ART Anova
    
  # isa

    # ambient

      # edge vs interior
  
      # urban vs. rural
  
      # interaction effect

    # foliar

      # edge vs interior
  
      # urban vs. rural
  
      # interaction effect

    # ambient vs. foliar

      # 

    formula <- as.formula(paste(all_element_names[i], "~particle_source"))
    X_ART <- art(formula, data = AllCompxUNESites_NOopen)
    X_aovART <- anova(X_ART)
    
    for (j in groupnames_isa){
    all_PM_NOopen_art_pvals_isa[i,j] <- X_aovART_AvF[j,"Pr(>F)"] # this extracts the p-value
    }
    
  # dist
    formula <- as.formula(paste(all_element_names[i], "~particle_source*dfe*urb_cat_dist"))
    X_ART_AvF <- art(formula, data = AllCompxUNESites_NOopen)
    X_aovART_AvF <- anova(X_ART_AvF)
    groupnames_dist <- X_aovART_AvF$Term
    colnames(all_PM_NOopen_art_pvals_dist)[2:8] <- groupnames_dist
    
    for (j in groupnames_dist){
    all_PM_NOopen_art_pvals_dist[i,j] <- X_aovART_AvF[j,"Pr(>F)"] # this extracts the p-value
    } 
       
# Pairwise Comparisons

  # isa
    
  formula <- as.formula(paste(all_element_names[i], "~urb_cat_isa*dfe*particle_source"))
  X_ART_isa <- art(formula, data = AllCompxUNESites_NOopen)
  X_aovART <- anova(X_ART_isa)
  art.con_X_ART_isa <- art.con(X_ART_isa,~urb_cat_isa*dfe*particle_source, adjust="none")
  art.con_X_ART_isa <- as.data.frame(art.con_X_ART_isa)
  contrastnames_isa <- art.con_X_ART_isa$contrast
  colnames(all_PM_NOopen_pairwise_isa)[2:29] <- contrastnames_isa
    
  letters_isa <- cldList(
  p.value ~ contrast,
  data = art.con_X_ART_isa,
  threshold = 0.05  
)
  letternames <- letters_isa$Group
  colnames(all_PM_NOopen_pairwise_isa)[30:37] <- letternames
      
  # dist
    
  formula <- as.formula(paste(all_element_names[i], "~urb_cat_dist*dfe*particle_source"))
  X_ART_dist <- art(formula, data = AllCompxUNESites_NOopen)
  X_aovART <- anova(X_ART_dist)
  art.con_X_ART_dist <- art.con(X_ART_dist,~urb_cat_dist*dfe*particle_source, adjust="none")
  art.con_X_ART_dist <- as.data.frame(art.con_X_ART_dist)
  contrastnames_dist <- art.con_X_ART_dist$contrast
  colnames(all_PM_NOopen_pairwise_dist)[2:29] <- contrastnames_dist
  
  letters_dist <- cldList(
  p.value ~ contrast,
  data = art.con_X_ART_dist,
  threshold = 0.05  
)
  letternames <- letters_dist$Group
  colnames(all_PM_NOopen_pairwise_dist)[30:37] <- letternames
  
    # placing these results into our matrix
  
      # pairwise comparisons
      for (j in contrastnames_isa) {
        all_PM_NOopen_pairwise_isa[i,j] <- art.con_X_ART_isa$p.value[art.con_X_ART_isa$contrast==j]
      }
  
      for (j in contrastnames_dist) {
        all_PM_NOopen_pairwise_dist[i,j] <- art.con_X_ART_dist$p.value[art.con_X_ART_dist$contrast==j]
      }
  
      # letters
      for (j in letternames_isa){
      all_PM_NOopen_pairwise_isa[i,j] <- letters_isa$Letter[letters_isa$Group==j]
      }
  
      for (j in letternames_dist){
      all_PM_NOopen_pairwise_dist[i,j] <- letters_dist$Letter[letters_dist$Group==j]
    }
}
    
# this is the matrix with p-values! now we make it into a data frame 
    all_PM_NOopen_art_pvals_isa <- as.data.frame(all_PM_NOopen_art_pvals_isa)
    all_PM_NOopen_pairwise_isa <- as.data.frame(all_PM_NOopen_pairwise_isa)
    all_PM_NOopen_art_pvals_dist <- as.data.frame(all_PM_NOopen_art_pvals_dist)
    all_PM_NOopen_pairwise_dist <- as.data.frame(all_PM_NOopen_pairwise_dist)
    
    # make sure all the numbers are classified as "numeric"
    all_PM_NOopen_art_pvals_isa[,2:8] <- lapply(all_PM_NOopen_art_pvals_isa[,2:8],as.numeric)
    all_PM_NOopen_art_pvals_dist[,2:8] <- lapply(all_PM_NOopen_art_pvals_dist[,2:8],as.numeric)
    
    # reduce all p-values in the matrix to two decimal points
    all_PM_NOopen_art_pvals_isa[] <- lapply(all_PM_NOopen_art_pvals_isa, function(x) if (is.numeric(x)) signif(x, digits = 2) else x)
    all_PM_NOopen_art_pvals_dist[] <- lapply(all_PM_NOopen_art_pvals_dist, function(x) if (is.numeric(x)) signif(x, digits = 2) else x)
    
    # write the data frame to a csv
    write.csv(all_PM_NOopen_art_pvals_isa, file.path(stats_dir,"all_PM_NOopen_art_pvals_isa.csv"), row.names = TRUE)
    write.csv(all_PM_NOopen_art_pvals_dist, file.path(stats_dir,"all_PM_NOopen_art_pvals_dist.csv"), row.names = TRUE)
    write.csv(all_PM_NOopen_pairwise_isa, file.path(stats_dir,"all_PM_NOopen_pairwise_isa.csv"), row.names = TRUE)
    write.csv(all_PM_NOopen_pairwise_dist, file.path(stats_dir,"all_PM_NOopen_pairwise_dist.csv"), row.names = TRUE)    
```
## Categorical Plots for Ambient vs. Foliar (by UvR & dfe)
```{r}

# creating a list for figures
all_element_cat_list <- list()
all_element_cat_list_isa <- list()
all_element_cat_list_dist <- list()

# loop to make categorical figures

for (i in c(1:26)) {
  
element <- all_element_names[i]

summary_isa <- cbind(aggregate(AllCompxUNESites_NOopen[element],
                           list(AllCompxUNESites_NOopen$dfe,AllCompxUNESites_NOopen$urb_cat_isa,AllCompxUNESites_NOopen$particle_source),FUN=mean),
                 aggregate(AllCompxUNESites_NOopen[element],
                           list(AllCompxUNESites_NOopen$dfe,AllCompxUNESites_NOopen$urb_cat_isa,AllCompxUNESites_NOopen$particle_source),FUN=stderr))
summary_isa <- summary_isa[,c(1:4,8)]
colnames(summary_isa) <- c("dfe","urb_cat_isa","particle_source","perc_comp","se")
summary_isa$Group <- paste(summary_isa$urb_cat_isa,ifelse(summary_isa$dfe==0,"","9"),summary_isa$particle_source,sep = ",")

summary_dist <- cbind(aggregate(AllCompxUNESites_NOopen[element],
                           list(AllCompxUNESites_NOopen$dfe,AllCompxUNESites_NOopen$urb_cat_dist,AllCompxUNESites_NOopen$particle_source),FUN=mean),
                 aggregate(AllCompxUNESites_NOopen[element],
                           list(AllCompxUNESites_NOopen$dfe,AllCompxUNESites_NOopen$urb_cat_dist,AllCompxUNESites_NOopen$particle_source),FUN=stderr))
summary_dist <- summary_dist[,c(1:4,8)]
colnames(summary_dist) <- c("dfe","urb_cat_dist","particle_source","perc_comp","se")
summary_dist$Group <- paste(summary_dist$urb_cat_dist,ifelse(summary_dist$dfe==0,"","9"),summary_dist$particle_source,sep = ",")

  # add in maximum for y axis in each group (for positioning letter)
      summary_isa$max <- NA
      summary_dist$max <- NA
      
      for (j in c(1:8)) {
      summary_isa$max[j] <- summary_isa$perc_comp[j]+summary_isa$se[j]+(max(summary_isa$perc_comp))*0.01
      summary_dist$max[j] <- summary_dist$perc_comp[j]+summary_dist$se[j]+(max(summary_dist$perc_comp))*0.01
      }
      
  # add in significance letter associated with each group
      groups_isa <- summary_isa$Group
      groups_dist <- summary_dist$Group
      
      summary_isa$letter <- NA
      summary_dist$letter <- NA
  
      
      vals_i <- all_PM_NOopen_pairwise_isa[i, summary_isa$Group]
      summary_isa$letter <-
        unlist(vals_i[match(summary_isa$Group, names(vals_i))])

      vals_i <- all_PM_NOopen_pairwise_dist[i, summary_dist$Group]
      summary_dist$letter <-
        unlist(vals_i[match(summary_dist$Group, names(vals_i))])
      
      # making annotation with significance letters
      
      text_pos_isa <- axes_limits$ymax_isa[i]
      text_pos_dist <- axes_limits$ymax_dist[i]

        annot_isa <- data.frame(
          particle_source = "Ambient",  
          x = 0.5,
          y = text_pos_isa,
          label = paste(
            "Ambient vs. Foliar: p",ifelse(all_PM_NOopen_art_pvals_isa$particle_source[i]>0.001,paste("=",all_PM_NOopen_art_pvals_isa$particle_source[i])," < 0.001"),
            "\nDistance from Edge: p",ifelse(all_PM_NOopen_art_pvals_isa$dfe[i]>0.001,paste("=",all_PM_NOopen_art_pvals_isa$dfe[i])," < 0.001  "),
            "\nUrban vs. Rural: p",ifelse(all_PM_NOopen_art_pvals_isa$urb_cat_isa[i]>0.001,paste("=",all_PM_NOopen_art_pvals_isa$urb_cat_isa[i])," < 0.001 "),
            "\nAmbient vs. Foliar X Dist. from Edge: p",ifelse(all_PM_NOopen_art_pvals_isa$`particle_source:dfe`[i]>0.001,paste("=",all_PM_NOopen_art_pvals_isa$`particle_source:dfe`[i])," < 0.001 "),
            "\nAmbient vs. Foliar X Urban vs. Rural: p",ifelse(all_PM_NOopen_art_pvals_isa$`particle_source:urb_cat_isa`[i]>0.001,paste("=",all_PM_NOopen_art_pvals_isa$`particle_source:urb_cat_isa`[i])," < 0.001"),
            "\nDist. from Edge X Urban vs. Rural: p",ifelse(all_PM_NOopen_art_pvals_isa$`dfe:urb_cat_isa`[i]>0.001,paste("=",all_PM_NOopen_art_pvals_isa$`dfe:urb_cat_isa`[i])," < 0.001"),
            "\nAmbient vs. Foliar X Dist. from Edge X Urban vs. Rural : p",ifelse(all_PM_NOopen_art_pvals_isa$`particle_source:dfe:urb_cat_isa`[i]>0.001,paste("=",all_PM_NOopen_art_pvals_isa$`particle_source:dfe:urb_cat_isa`[i])," < 0.001"))
          )
        
        annot_dist <- data.frame(
          particle_source = "Ambient",  
          x = 0.5,
          y = text_pos_dist,
          label = paste(
            "Ambient vs. Foliar: p",ifelse(all_PM_NOopen_art_pvals_dist$particle_source[i]>0.001,paste("=",all_PM_NOopen_art_pvals_dist$particle_source[i])," < 0.001"),
            "\nDistance from Edge: p", ifelse(all_PM_NOopen_art_pvals_dist$dfe[i]>0.001,paste("=",all_PM_NOopen_art_pvals_dist$dfe[i])," < 0.001"),
            "\nUrban vs. Rural: p", ifelse(all_PM_NOopen_art_pvals_dist$urb_cat_dist[i]>0.001,paste("=",all_PM_NOopen_art_pvals_dist$urb_cat_dist[i])," < 0.001"),
            "\nAmbient vs. Foliar X Dist. from Edge: p",ifelse(all_PM_NOopen_art_pvals_dist$`particle_source:dfe`[i]>0.001,paste("=",all_PM_NOopen_art_pvals_dist$`particle_source:dfe`[i])," < 0.001"),
            "\nAmbient vs. Foliar X Urban vs. Rural: p",ifelse(all_PM_NOopen_art_pvals_dist$`particle_source:urb_cat_dist`[i]>0.001,paste("=",all_PM_NOopen_art_pvals_dist$`particle_source:urb_cat_dist`[i])," < 0.001"),
            "\nDist. from Edge X Urban vs. Rural: p",ifelse(all_PM_NOopen_art_pvals_dist$`dfe:urb_cat_dist`[i]>0.001,paste("=",all_PM_NOopen_art_pvals_dist$`dfe:urb_cat_dist`[i])," < 0.001"),
            "\nAmbient vs. Foliar X Dist. from Edge X Urban vs. Rural : p",ifelse(all_PM_NOopen_art_pvals_dist$`particle_source:dfe:urb_cat_dist`[i]>0.001,paste("=",all_PM_NOopen_art_pvals_dist$`particle_source:dfe:urb_cat_dist`[i])," < 0.001"))
          )

fig_isa <- ggplot(data=summary_isa, aes(x=urb_cat_isa, y=perc_comp, col=dfe)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("grey", "black", "lightblue")) +
  geom_point(position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), size = 3) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = perc_comp - se, ymax = perc_comp + se),
                width = 0.2,
                position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +
  labs(title = paste(element),
       x = "Urbanization Category by % ISA", 
       y = paste("%", element)) +
  theme_minimal() + 
  facet_wrap(~particle_source) +
  geom_text(
            data = annot_isa,
            position = "identity",
            aes(x = x, y = text_pos_dist, label = label),
            inherit.aes = FALSE,
            hjust = 0,
            vjust = 1,
            size = 3
    ) +
  geom_text(data = summary_isa,
    aes(label = letter, y = max), position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), hjust=0.5, vjust=0, size = 5, fontface = "bold") +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size=25),
        legend.position = "right",
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        axis.line = element_line(colour = "black"),
        aspect.ratio = 1,
        axis.text.x = element_text(color = "black", size=15),
        axis.title.x = element_text(color = "black", size=15),
        axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", size=15),
        axis.title.y = element_text(color = "black", size=15)) +
  guides(color = guide_legend(title = "Distance\nFrom Edge (m)")) +
  theme(legend.position="none")

fig_dist <- ggplot(data=summary_dist, aes(x=urb_cat_dist, y=perc_comp, col=dfe)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("grey", "black", "lightblue")) +
  geom_point(position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), size = 3) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = perc_comp - se, ymax = perc_comp + se),
                width = 0.2,
                position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +
  labs(title = paste(element),
       x = "Urbanization Category by Distance to Boston", 
       y = paste("%", element)) +
  theme_minimal() + 
  facet_wrap(~particle_source) +
  geom_text(
            data = annot_dist,
            position = "identity",
            aes(x = x, y = text_pos_isa, label = label),
            inherit.aes = FALSE,
            hjust = 0,
            vjust = 1,
            size = 3
    ) +
  geom_text(data = summary_dist,
    aes(label = letter, y = max), position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), hjust=0.5, vjust=0, size = 5, fontface = "bold") +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size=25),
        legend.position = "right",
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        axis.line = element_line(colour = "black"),
        aspect.ratio = 1,
        axis.text.x = element_text(color = "black", size=15),
        axis.title.x = element_text(color = "black", size=15),
        axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", size=15),
        axis.title.y = element_text(color = "black", size=15)) +
  guides(color = guide_legend(title = "Distance\nFrom Edge (m)")) +
  theme(legend.position="none")

figs <- plot_grid(fig_isa,fig_dist,labels=NULL,ncol=1,rel_widths=c(1,1))

all_element_cat_list[[element]] <- figs  # Store each figure in the list we made
all_element_cat_list_isa[[element]] <- fig_isa  # Store each figure in the list we made
all_element_cat_list_dist[[element]] <- fig_dist  # Store each figure in the list we made

# printing figure
ggsave(paste(element,"all_cat.png"), plot = fig_isa, path = file.path(figures_dir,"Elements/Ambient vs. Foliar"), width = 12,
  height = 8, bg = "white")
}


```
### Foliar plots
```{r}
fig_isa <-
  ggplot(data=summary_isa,mapping=aes(x=urb_cat_isa,y=perc_comp,col=dfe)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("grey","black")) +
  geom_point(position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), size = 3) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper), width = 0.2,
              position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +
  labs(title = "Foliar PM",
       #x = "Site Type by %ISA",
       x = NULL,
       y = NULL
       #y = paste("%",element)
       ) +
  theme_minimal() + 
  #ylim(axes_limits$ymin_isa[i],axes_limits$ymax_isa[i]) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size=25)) +
  theme(legend.position="none") +
  annotate(geom = "text", x=0.5, y=text_pos_isa, size = 3, label=paste(
    "Distance from Edge: p",ifelse(foliar_PM_art_edgetype_pvals$Edge_vs_Interior[i]>0.001,paste("=",foliar_PM_art_edgetype_pvals$Edge_vs_Interior[i])," < 0.001"),
    "\nUrban vs. Rural: p",ifelse(foliar_PM_art_edgetype_pvals$Urb_v_Rural_ISA[i]>0.001,paste("=",foliar_PM_art_edgetype_pvals$Urb_v_Rural_ISA[i])," < 0.001"),
    "\nDfE X Urb. Cat.: p",ifelse(foliar_PM_art_edgetype_pvals$Interaction_ISA[i]>0.001,paste("=",foliar_PM_art_edgetype_pvals$Interaction_ISA[i])," < 0.001")),
           hjust=0,
           vjust=1) +
  geom_text(aes(label = letter, y = upper), position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), hjust=0.5, vjust=0, size = 5, fontface = "bold") +
  # geom_text(aes(label = LETTER, y = min), position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), hjust=0.5, vjust=1.5, size = 5, fontface = "bold") +
  guides(color = guide_legend(title = "Distance\nFrom Edge (m)")) +
  theme(panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        axis.line = element_line(colour = "black"),
        aspect.ratio = 1,
        axis.text.x = element_text(color = "black",size=15),
        axis.title.x = element_text(color = "black",size=15),
        axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black",size=15),
        axis.title.y = element_text(color = "black",size=15))
```
